name: GOTV PAC
subject: Republicans just voted for higher health care premiums
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Today, Senate Republicans blocked a bill that would have extended health insurance subsidies for millions of Americans.
If those subsidies expire, premiums are projected to jump 30+% next year. For many families, monthly costs will more than double – not because care improved, but because Republicans chose obstruction over people.
They knew exactly what they were doing.
This wasn’t a complicated reform. It was a simple extension to keep health care affordable, and Republicans said no.
That’s why taking back the House isn’t optional – it’s essential. With a Democratic House, we can:
* Force votes Republicans are trying to avoid
* Stop partisan sabotage of health care
* Hold the line against policies that raise costs on working families
The House is the firewall, and without it, Republicans will keep blocking solutions while families pay the price.
GOTV PAC is focused on one thing: turning outrage into turnout and flipping the seats that decide control of Congress. If you can, chip in today to help us fund the organizing, turnout, and voter protection efforts it will take to take back the House in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12112025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Tim Walz
subject: Mike Lindell has OFFICIALLY announced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party
body:
Mike Lindell and Donald Trump are two peas in a pod. | | | |
---
**Mike Lindell announced he’s officially running for Governor of Minnesota.**
That’s right, Donald Trump’s biggest ally in Minnesota is officially in the race.
We know who Mike Lindell is.
❌ He’s a snake oil salesman
❌ He’s an election denier
❌ He’s a con man
If you read that and think it sounds familiar... yes, Mike Lindell and Donald Trump are two peas in a pod.
**Mike Lindell’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and we can be sure they’ll empty their pockets to support his campaign. That’s why we’ve launched our 48-hour goal to stop him and his ultrawealthy friends.**

clean_body: Mike Lindell and Donald Trump are two peas in a pod. | | | | Mike Lindell announced he’s officially running for Governor of Minnesota. That’s right, Donald Trump’s biggest ally in Minnesota is officially in the race. We know who Mike Lindell is. ❌ He’s a snake oil salesman ❌ He’s an election denier ❌ He’s a con man If you read that and think it sounds familiar... yes, Mike Lindell and Donald Trump are two peas in a pod. Mike Lindell’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and we can be sure they’ll empty their pockets to support his campaign. That’s why we’ve launched our 48-hour goal to stop him and his ultrawealthy friends. ** ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | I’m grateful, Tim Walz The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. | | Friend, As we close out the first year of President Trump’s second Administration—and Congressman Addison McDowell’s first year in office—it’s clear that America is moving in the right direction.

**From the passage of President Trump’s One Big, Beautiful Bill to renewed foreign strength, a more secure border, historic peace initiatives, and many other achievements...the results speak for themselves.**

But we MUST ask: **Do you feel you are better off today than you were a year ago?**

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, As we close out the first year of President Trump’s second Administration—and Congressman Addison McDowell’s first year in office—it’s clear that America is moving in the right direction. From the passage of President Trump’s One Big, Beautiful Bill to renewed foreign strength, a more secure border, historic peace initiatives, and many other achievements...the results speak for themselves. But we MUST ask: Do you feel you are better off today than you were a year ago? Fellow American,

**We did it.** We stood up to The Satanic Temple. Good has defeated evil once again. But the fight is not over.

I'm not afraid to call it how I see it: The Satanic Temple of Iowa is evil and dangerous to our children. When they tried again this year to hold a ritual in our state capitol, I stood my ground. I demanded our state leaders step in, and the event was denied. And let me be clear: **[I will never stop fighting to protect our youngest citizens.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37cd173d0fc44710a5b9068a10a87077&_e=26oD-G-6Ivx1sW3vYbgBGITTDknPI5_dyRToVfFwb8xxr9ASqNyoyXVovjZg8mcXV46CADtoOjMsK80rBUVKBDvj-vsSMUSPPNAO8S-geYzmG7VvZJShAGHjLK5oFXk5hck7vWkOMPqlEg1cG3dJP_JFV2jzJPOoTMmkrxAXv2HF7vxAKolWFzWXYr6loiDKj6Uc-aRGlsQRqvgAD1PqiV7WKdSGOUdyuoY9LbRhy_AmuCMTEwNY1UNv0sHSV7eWIjFF4Q90TnlA4ebWu63NsvCDbTfuvCasiIzVQrHvlYCp-QZa3_Ta_om92uFMmkp1gU-6jJ328yenlRwn8JcPnRdY4gx1sk1dCXIw9pkv4pWuqnYk0fUkG7v_ys15ufvuqO3RLl4gI8vfaGxudd8Mgls2NYOHIkZl7ONnVdXnBrc9keIwd46TkoOCNK2qu70XW82EQRYOrn9w1QfS205hkQ-fxo6NcmlpwmzXBHZ41WRwlkBaJ4pjoNxoICYYGu-mB7n118-OS8fsNfJW0Xf8j7DohY_LVfgCvJtrr76DMivv-oSLcg5bLyM-1Z7-kRclmPFze3vj-M9xPn0l4R141WsbCISGD_57dLMEVDz5OUEQ_ijPapVNhPA42elnQBE9ntWFyLcvzJZi2n_dwj3p9IxJ2oMZwi6JDjP8HJyk3vyjGD0GqFWkTHgQgCWETaFb)**

My commitment to Iowa is deeply personal. I am a lifelong Iowan from Indianola, a father, husband, and a successful business owner. I want to preserve Iowa and keep the Washington D.C. special interests OUT of our state.

I get things done. It is who I am, and it is how I have always worked. As Iowa's Director of the Department of Administrative Services, I was confirmed twice—including a unanimous 50-0 vote by the Iowa Senate—because I cut waste, streamlined processes, and delivered for the taxpayer. I know what it takes to get rid of corruption and bring transparency to government, because I've done it. I'll do the same as your Governor.

I'm running to put Iowans FIRST and ONLY.

**If you share my convictions and believe that a proven leader is required to stand in the gap and protect Iowa,[I need you to stand with me today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37cd173d0fc44710a5b9068a10a87077&_e=26oD-G-6Ivx1sW3vYbgBGITTDknPI5_dyRToVfFwb8xxr9ASqNyoyXVovjZg8mcXV46CADtoOjMsK80rBUVKBDvj-vsSMUSPPNAO8S-geYzmG7VvZJShAGHjLK5oFXk5hck7vWkOMPqlEg1cG3dJP_JFV2jzJPOoTMmkrxAXv2HF7vxAKolWFzWXYr6loiDKj6Uc-aRGlsQRqvgAD1PqiV7WKdSGOUdyuoY9LbRhy_Cx5xJmNJ-crf5_jBD-s5-S8tjc3KfDBuaPNzCItiTEnmwIEtlkgEdoOJn8XoMa4ZNWbQQVR2G9Hy00nFSNwe-7o3JG9m9BRorCnYR3JS5MbRu7ntVCMpEYNn_sMqILRdh9X7jUSe-JDjp91QEibvwOnXlSSl3yfeBKcqJipJ_S-HbHBpPAgbfBqZgwlsLY2-aVE_7c1nxDzTSXq2pTnIAGHC5ZsPkBwrFphuIbHSXHD6qfRO80Li7FAqopYX1xHymrqbutc_gSSCypbCw-kZfkaBWzxqSubaMk2bmSQxgc7v2ZHj4ylsqrplRjVdvIDCCAXxKVgukA-EiDFCTFlBAb6FxsIO1PA-QeRORRIx2Ou6QEUzzuGjCb_H-CuPqZX9bvb3MskzAhLuhbwy-RtpKh6YcLprmF1ReB7eg4PDJ-lUAZ4h7MHzcGuZQHv14qCqwqy7Uydv6G-E7-4a0EZSwD)**

The political establishment and the special interests are lining up against us, but we can't let them win. **[Your immediate contribution–of $10, $25, or whatever you can spare–sends a clear message: We will not back down from the fight for Iowa's future.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37cd173d0fc44710a5b9068a10a87077&_e=26oD-G-6Ivx1sW3vYbgBGITTDknPI5_dyRToVfFwb8xxr9ASqNyoyXVovjZg8mcXV46CADtoOjMsK80rBUVKBDvj-vsSMUSPPNAO8S-geYzmG7VvZJShAGHjLK5oFXk5hck7vWkOMPqlEg1cG3dJP_JFV2jzJPOoTMmkrxAXv2HF7vxAKolWFzWXYr6loiDKj6Uc-aRGlsQRqvgAD1PqiV7WKdSGOUdyuoY9LbRhy_AgA80xlphSy-uSECl59AjMCOCHukxneC9X5PHi01BhBZyfV8eG1IZcrzDhdRYNh01DJBqopsbt1kbNBPfD_qs-Pu0tvltFLbVsgfY3x1o9fYApQC-UpH1tNF6ly8ex3U53cJvjKq4V1HLu-Duu7fym4B42lVpqjdv6NF6TgQvettl7skMcM8rk-xIpSdaDSs0HKT2bCGfM7OfBLegIOCE8fLbbfDV5URErw3LkvZvTKS7z_9VlLQfwLVqsppanG-YzWmZ9opfsTyiftk64k9nar8pz-yfb10D3hNXHC6_0ojWj88EYCGq0xnQpqqGqjJvT12ZpkLNITGjHRFy716HNkRrQUsj6qLkhf6GnMxaP9BjiQ3sdAaec1h-pn8uO6VjlsoKHmrz0ZPjRActbj-hrCPDhedvYh25POR_ummzwK0mxpDn6Uno54dmbaI7oT-xiytRDInLFSLHM8hO3rNId)**

When it comes to battling good vs. evil, I will always stand on the side of good—and that means protecting our children from violence, radical extremists, and those who seek to undermine our values. **["Stand With Steen" and help me protect Iowa.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37cd173d0fc44710a5b9068a10a87077&_e=26oD-G-6Ivx1sW3vYbgBGITTDknPI5_dyRToVfFwb8xxr9ASqNyoyXVovjZg8mcXV46CADtoOjMsK80rBUVKBDvj-vsSMUSPPNAO8S-geYzmG7VvZJShAGHjLK5oFXk5hck7vWkOMPqlEg1cG3dJP_JFV2jzJPOoTMmkrxAXv2HF7vxAKolWFzWXYr6loiDKj6Uc-aRGlsQRqvgAD1PqiV7WKdSGOUdyuoY9LbRhy_BzMLYG_hEXSZFS2Q2dg_7kBnjruJGaK1xP57e743nJuD_ZQ7cUxzn8MUKl7KIP54X5q18iZVdONSVIF7vYdKTPOgzqHddbisfQEnmjAPFQfbNRXXGxAr8BiZE6RnjYtNLL6A1a2xSMUX7K6bVefB9OoLndFHe8MtQrg9NojS9h6Pl7h0srQn1ZL_aKWZ_efbgPKpoAK8hr5yH3uJu6s4hxd9UUHojTask_ouCPA98HQyYnjuMijtNNegoosmnvzxr4KIy4i24anN18E60jURpYHfcL2oFOpXtJ4wBCMoXIUDNabqlACVwT1a4KqCjUaWzhfVvGpMXW5BRdT1l4_G2R3cyfQtElc9kK9t674LxqKAEZYIlFPOluTqlJWMZqKedxzZ6HuPHrbqikzpOQA8Luq2yGjMD91z6ezltxJyttXldJxcdNCw5l8JPlFJLSkzcYNw7sGCsusToGQjmi87WI) **

clean_body: Now, I Need You to Stand With Me. | Fellow American, We did it. We stood up to The Satanic Temple. Good has defeated evil once again. But the fight is not over. I'm not afraid to call it how I see it: The Satanic Temple of Iowa is evil and dangerous to our children. When they tried again this year to hold a ritual in our state capitol, I stood my ground. I demanded our state leaders step in, and the event was denied. And let me be clear: My commitment to Iowa is deeply personal. I am a lifelong Iowan from Indianola, a father, husband, and a successful business owner. I want to preserve Iowa and keep the Washington D.C. special interests OUT of our state. I get things done. It is who I am, and it is how I have always worked. As Iowa's Director of the Department of Administrative Services, I was confirmed twice—including a unanimous 50-0 vote by the Iowa Senate—because I cut waste, streamlined processes, and delivered for the taxpayer. I know what it takes to get rid of corruption and bring transparency to government, because I've done it. I'll do the same as your Governor. I'm running to put Iowans FIRST and ONLY. If you share my convictions and believe that a proven leader is required to stand in the gap and protect Iowa, The political establishment and the special interests are lining up against us, but we can't let them win. When it comes to battling good vs. evil, I will always stand on the side of good—and that means protecting our children from violence, radical extremists, and those who seek to undermine our values. Thank you for standing for good. Adam Steen Conservative for Iowa | | Paid for by Adam Steen for Iowa Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

| | Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get _enough_ of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need _more_ of. **We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need _you_ , Peter.** [**_If you believe in having representatives who can _actually_ represent the lives real people live, will you chip in to my campaign right now? Every dollar helps me keep fighting for us in Congress, and build a fair future for the working class >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EuAymmsRZglsm_VkJ_UZDA~~/AAPPABA~/olByNzZEIQofIgH7rE-CVQ8kLk2fZs9v4Zs4bjIkWm8bVhv47eBLXDoqKL948WVZjcc85WIDGK0lsN8QhwwRzcCsJVWj9uSZFOOPwPCneCuckOGXA7QcyqWY87ctUrFQ5SOwuGaXTgY-FoLtmpzKFl4eW2CGKy0VV3m0PqBolcWlE2heiIad242G0qvj31j9M3onQ-c3RrCNiA46YslAP85Qp1EGgjaHH0kOzMKMXt-1DCGgjzxmE94NNu9yICvSLLmn0NvUN97MSEIm96yuUTSQs_cKcBs6917bxTcr_9Qa5WXA1lyAolbDzRI1niyzLTHKs-STLHJro7Y7GDXvPHWDoiN0A1nZwGMjPIGNGLA~) | [DONATE $27 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/OMn9kbujKqC9_mPuvMdt1A~~/AAPPABA~/olByNzZEIQofIgH7rE-CVQ8kLk2fZs9v4Zs4bjIkWm8bVhv47eBLXDoqKL948WVZ9Tff7fRa5S-O8txuia1hPLg8LmWmctOYRXRssjo82_SUFBNrtdoFpwLsgoerbsvIVpyXQYqV14mOjW3zbhkLkaDJ47_7voJDuVrcm8L0SLBvJzC5q2PX8eS3qycsRNxO1aQx930yCXVtC9Y8O1-wlnuxwQnob-eHel7V_NOL766BnP68rvn7N7X22EBZzNIO6tmNtUiAbDbk0huJb5N3NI-2rua1UZ_mm2M0W5-gosk1eXaFqPPLFyiY8fUrArP3u-MN6kM-fdS398qPnFIQ3wFijOCpPRgUUHCAVlN4FlU~)

I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family _fought_ to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot.
It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, Peter. Because working people know – we’re in this together.
But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class _priorities._ **You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care.
**
[**_I’m fighting to stay in Congress because I care, Peter. But the born-rich Republican donor class hates that, and will spend whatever it takes to hold me back. I need your help to stay here and build the world we deserve _despite_ them. clean_body: | ~ | | Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get enough of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need more of. We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need you , Peter. ~ | ~ I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family fought to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot. It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, Peter. Because working people know – we’re in this together. But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class priorities. You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | ~~ In this together, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. [ ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/HvNc8JE1heHI1uCIk0Qd_SMKw0BZsqbvq7v7kHxbxIEug5-q4sz6czo6N8vI5lv7A7U-tD5JYSU-r6GGc35KHq-v9PO74JVVprecgFubXLDEck2BWYRL5w4lsk24wGu9brF6mBAiiArTqZt_qjlKZSE-BrgtGcmWTcFvtJkuyzHLE4on4XF7doYs_Yl8jYPwB8K8MBPYhs9gRviuHQbOQ1WyF389wC3cSJquV9Lil5m_LRT812XDoydBK2whHxHTnXCO8ziOOUBlqbzM5Meer4zEKRBFkO2bfPrYLOwNLd0q9670h4I7eokKpxI5HxYfnpWnsnsIeX2VdtJri3_djpQLG6pk_w10Ec9wQHA3S0rpj8YPBGSR5aSVHAkyQ_oxGptQYklylIrZYH_CXNzsy7Y6_Dce_GcWkOATjaI5b8TVGhL4LRdOst_-5Lnrl_Tyi1XAcbBjn9lsQsyknCt1AJRJwFqJQFTeMsM5UVFhcthU2rJwjrZzIsXeshNlDPfywt4fGCNZFY0dEss-iSqTfuFp1Okv-AnEdzlaVrQlLg/40xmXojvXjFw_uTBdEYtbkELOLH2cbsk/15)

Peter,

A few days ago, I walked alone into the California School Boards Association conference in Sacramento, encircled by career politicians and union allies like Antonio Villaraigosa, Betty Yee, and Tony Thurmond.

By the way, their combined poll numbers aren’t close to ours.

I looked out at a room filled with members of the "education establishment" and, instead of seeking their approval, I told them the truth:

California needs school vouchers.

You could hear a pin drop.

While every other candidate on that stage scrambled to support teachers' unions and the status quo, I stood for **School Choice and Parents’ Rights.**

As an American, a Californian, and a taxpayer, your zip code should not determine where you educate your children.

Here’s exactly what that means: send your kids to the school that’s best for them. Make schools compete for every student. **Competition will save California’s failing public schools.**

That’s what I believe. But what do you think? Should California have school choice? Answer below and let me know:
[ YES, PUBLIC SCHOOLS MUST COMPETE ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/wcKLgSvIG7WZqwkc33Y5PY9Rm1QZAu-FmnCxd85X66GTDM7AITXE2MzE6OZDoU9gagHhpf2aYWWfZwPYmvNFTWsPOnoZUPFbQza6p-hwcRTV6FCZ8L3RH4-Jl09z0_5XELPKYmHoEX-lzDs4MlvAGPZ73u6b92GTFFhZp_ydoUy-9MY_TygULcziIGi4_tuFR7i34xHRGHiJmtb-QQ9LQhsULY-L8jbvI7tgWubK0ZFRC61x6evQYqXcNk2IU3Q8Vg043cUZ0NddiIM6Wp8YiKCZ-VFGbLtXwMTNhANX9Qqt3O5caQtnp_ZfkxIO2-CXEYVsIRptfT5G5WJx0_cCaaKVeq-qqq0BCfjTiNF3OGqq46PTwNpvnTwVSMi6JcjL0YUM3qTrbXniyBP4sNqz6y7sKIuBC03QWn_VFAvk5ATnCwEXtEiYolbJgogGclAo1vwHpmAd6CwAOnFoapQi2ZSaRIap4EcM_ReIb4oWKfZPDLbTcz9m31lHwvsZznMAvJViOJuvk70hrU10DqRbjU2h5t-Gw4HQhQKa0OYa-w/r96wv7eq99FCprv-9qqJmdmmrLSCQTii/15)
OR

Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and its Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101578/588391914/1498593520?refcode=121125_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhMjJmMjBhLWY2ZDYtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aRd5W0G-cj65KKUZHNt0AgpnbNNvTA_ILPZTy9Ajo24=)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | On her first day as attorney general, Pam Bondi penned a memo requiring DOJ lawyers to “ zealously ” advocate for administration positions or face disciplinary action and potential firing. It's clear we can no longer depend on the office that was created to defend our rights to actually defend them anymore. = | | | = Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them. Under his watch, the DOJ and its Civil Rights Division -- once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department \-- has abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote. Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates." We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. That's why we need to stand up and defend things from the outside. = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! name: Eliza Walton
subject: OCN's 2026 legislative priorities are here!
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2?contactdata=uOSfEX4MC6V0Q/G5J7+yqlFJbSpZEj6AUSwNu1W4ZMqg0iEsdeO6cXSyndUPEZ42OIUQdFxInsXF3DsscRD9XDgKLVeT8LKnMIMQ22o10Qtdnh3FqNZBLQROY++oLll3 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2?contactdata=uOSfEX4MC6V0Q/G5J7+yqlFJbSpZEj6AUSwNu1W4ZMqg0iEsdeO6cXSyndUPEZ42OIUQdFxInsXF3DsscRD9XDgKLVeT8LKnMIMQ22o10Qtdnh3FqNZBLQROY++oLll3]
Hi Peter,
The 2026 legislative session is right around the corner, and I’ve already begun meeting with legislators and partners to make sure we’re ready to advance pro-climate and pro-environment legislation. I’m excited to share the Oregon League of Conservation Voters’ (OLCV) and the Oregon Conservation Network's (OCN) 2026 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon [https://olcveducationfund.org/2026-legislative-session/] .
While we anticipate another year of defending hard-won progress, we’re also stepping forward with a powerful, proactive agenda that will protect Oregon’s climate, wildlife, and communities. Below are our top priorities for this session:
1.25% for Wildlife: Landmark Wildlife & Habitat Conservation Funding
Oregon is home to nearly 300 species at elevated risk of extinction and 11 habitats of greatest conservation need but our state lacks stable funding to protect them. This bill would raise the statewide lodging tax from 1.5% to 2.75%, dedicating the additional revenue to imperiled fish, wildlife, and habitat recovery efforts. These investments are essential to safeguarding Oregon’s rich biodiversity and natural legacy.
Make Polluters Pay: Climate Superfund
This bill holds major global polluters - like ExxonMobil, Chevron, and dozens more - accountable for ever-worsening climate disasters. Oregonians have already paid billions of dollars for past harms caused by the largest polluters, and will need to invest billions more into future climate adaptation. The funds will be distributed 30% to wildfire mitigation and the rest directed towards climate resilience programs, with 40% prioritized for environmental justice communities. Oregon has already spent billions responding to climate disasters; this bill ensures polluters, not communities, pay for past harms.
Natural Resource Agency Budgets
Protecting investments in Oregon’s climate, natural resources, clean energy, conservation, and wildlife agencies are essential, especially with continued federal uncertainty. Budgets are always a top priority, and 2026 is no exception.
I hope you’ll take a moment this session to message your legislators and urge them to support OLCV & OCN’s 2026 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon [https://olcveducationfund.org/2026-legislative-session/] .
Take action on these priorities [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tponcAOETE2WZW9d_LA_-Q2]
Together,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
P.S.: Another great way to support our work this session is by making a gift of any amount! Your contribution is what allows us to pass strong pro-climate and pro-environment legislation. We can’t do it without you. [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2]
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=zO5KDoXbZxNsCAM3LHu%2BKz%2BZj4fUPaMswJMu6YH3u6CEaQXmYdaEWXRuZMVUZV414gI0OEBUUgkSxlz2KCsTXv0bpIz%2Fk9mQnmuw9mW37Wq6Adsxs7RWSQrP1BI%2F7GAddJwymr3HFh60yI8NwjC6f9fB3sg%2B9zRKFP5QzVCLqo8CI5gqUmrTsrGTvs5INoWP2WHdqP1owNoOq2OTKOZ%2F963vxoUtnFh9EDqecrDb%2BS5CIuY%2BXvRf4k794LQzPYE77pgDjAg8ry7ghn%2FQ55bdnP46CcGUdc%2FiKS83S%2Fc3Uzt9P8XfY%2BQC41JEyumF2gsObzIclrtsVnyW%2BIwaJtvmwCR2WIfH6ngecFmXCssmxjXLrXPWvD%2BVh1QqjyGiTtTtebyIIKfkOWfpMnqnsRKh7QNxpWbDT8yfHvJJzC%2BfODY%3D .

body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101994/588402101/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA0MzYxMzUtZmFkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qaSiboh7cLy4fCA8dkokBW7XS9uOQSyIJhTksBjjTaM=)
Hi there, Nobody should have to fight cancer -- and their congressman -- at the same time. But that’s what families are up against here in the Central Valley. Our healthcare system is broken, and people are being crushed by rising premiums, medical debt, and insurance companies that deny the care we need. I recently joined the Left Coast podcast to talk about why I’m fighting for Medicare for All -- and what it would mean for working families in CA-22. Watch the full episode **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101995/588402102/-1324525532?refcode=em-12.11.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA0MzYxMzUtZmFkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qaSiboh7cLy4fCA8dkokBW7XS9uOQSyIJhTksBjjTaM=)** : [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101996/588402103/-1324525532?refcode=em-12.11.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA0MzYxMzUtZmFkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qaSiboh7cLy4fCA8dkokBW7XS9uOQSyIJhTksBjjTaM=) | [CHECK OUT THE EPISODE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101997/588402104/-1324525532?refcode=em-12.11.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA0MzYxMzUtZmFkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qaSiboh7cLy4fCA8dkokBW7XS9uOQSyIJhTksBjjTaM=)
---
I shared how I grew up on Medicaid and WIC. How I watched my parents work every day in our family’s auto repair shop and still struggle to afford care. And how those experiences shaped my decision to reject all corporate PAC money and run for Congress.
**[This is personal. And if you’ve ever skipped a check-up, held off on a scan, or rationed medicine to make it through the month -- I hope you’ll take a few minutes to listen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101998/588402105/-1324525532?refcode=em-12.11.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA0MzYxMzUtZmFkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qaSiboh7cLy4fCA8dkokBW7XS9uOQSyIJhTksBjjTaM=)**
[CHECK OUT THE EPISODE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121101999/588402106/-1324525532?refcode=em-12.11.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA0MzYxMzUtZmFkNi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qaSiboh7cLy4fCA8dkokBW7XS9uOQSyIJhTksBjjTaM=)

Thanks for being in this fight with me,
Randy

clean_body: | = Hi there, Nobody should have to fight cancer -- and their congressman -- at the same time. But that’s what families are up against here in the Central Valley. Our healthcare system is broken, and people are being crushed by rising premiums, medical debt, and insurance companies that deny the care we need. I recently joined the Left Coast podcast to talk about why I’m fighting for Medicare for All -- and what it would mean for working families in CA-22. Watch the full episode = : = | = I shared how I grew up on Medicaid and WIC. How I watched my parents work every day in our family’s auto repair shop and still struggle to afford care. And how those experiences shaped my decision to reject all corporate PAC money and run for Congress. = = Thanks for being in this fight with me, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress: Trump must be impeached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Moments ago, I voted in support of articles of impeachment against President Trump for abuse of power and inciting violence against lawmakers and federal judges.
Trump has called for the execution of Democratic lawmakers [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/nov/20/democrats-condemn-trump-military-video-post] and encouraged threats against public officials who ruled against him. This isn’t “politics as usual”–it’s an attack on democracy itself.
That’s why I voted in favor of beginning the impeachment debate.
And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with me – because this is how we fight back against fear, intimidation, and lawlessness.
Add your name: Impeach Donald Trump. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/impeach-trump-petition?contactdata=AGu9i4YQ/AhLcGCni7Y/fVK3OUXbHtmaECMwezFYG5bAF/dcz7RAJgxoUZdJ3CxR2sMyTFxrwAQwDn67XiWxWKFD0rsM8M5PmfjRLjOqAALh3AsrNz9gAN43aeMEYvJ35QpI2xDGRbvmrtBeF0hQx0B/ClGQoc0R3Q9E8ptXa44Lsq/LPSb9Lq8IYDZaP0yI]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/impeach-trump-petition?contactdata=AGu9i4YQ/AhLcGCni7Y/fVK3OUXbHtmaECMwezFYG5bAF/dcz7RAJgxoUZdJ3CxR2sMyTFxrwAQwDn67XiWxWKFD0rsM8M5PmfjRLjOqAALh3AsrNz9gAN43aeMEYvJ35QpI2xDGRbvmrtBeF0hQx0B/ClGQoc0R3Q9E8ptXa44Lsq/LPSb9Lq8IYDZaP0yI]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Tactical
subject: 10 Million Volts (Free)
body:
That's right, we're giving you 10 million volts for free - plus this other little beauty.
| | | |
---
---
|
---
# __BOTH FOR FREE__
---
|
---
The world is not a safe place... That's why, today, we are sending you the ultimate tactical advantage **for free**. We’ve set aside **100 Tactical Bundles** for our subscribers. We are taking a loss on these units because we know that once you handle the materials—the stainless steel, the Pakkawood, the electronics—you’ll be a customer for life. **Here is what we are shipping you:** **FREE GIFT #1: THE 10-MILLION VOLT STOPPER** **10-Million Volt Knockout Power:** Violent enough to drop a threat instantly. **Cord-Free Charging:** No hunting for cables. The prongs slide out to plug directly into any standard wall outlet. **Dual-Mode Defense:** Switch the stun mode off to use it as a high-powered LED tactical flashlight. **Lithium-Ion Core:** Long-lasting charge so it’s ready when you need it. **FREE GIFT #2: THE BLOODWOOD STILETTO** **Precision Engineering:** A matte, 3.5-inch spear point blade designed for maximum piercing power. **Premium Materials:** Built with solid stainless steel for durability and a stunning dark Pakkawood handle for a classic look **Secure Grip:** The handle isn't just pretty; it offers a secure, non-slip grip when it counts. **EDC Ready:** Features a sturdy pocket clip and a 5-inch closed length for convenient everyday carry. name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: Your gift saves lives and shares the gospel
body:
For nearly two decades, PreBorn! has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgau2pprgv1dhk9tf1vjin6qk2jpjqai0jkpajto_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clgm0o76cdh2bs)
---
Hi Advocate for Life, For nearly two decades, **PreBorn!** has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation. We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis **see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds** , and we offer **gospel-centered, compassionate care** at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can’t do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child’s heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith.

A tiny miracle begins the story of a mighty future.

Hope breaks through the darkness. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and shares the love of Christ with a woman in need. name: There is no referee
subject: Dems will be knocked unconscious maybe even killed in ring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
It’s time for blue state Colorado to step up and do its part to counter Trump’s power grab.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-_SpLo_9ha2LtamZx1jHcr6k5o9O1VLFGL1UOByVmJUTPhpG7qWlY0OUhIWTjhtvYh7o2Ifo7IX_3zGSAlshYr_K_yqpaX6I0okOU_QxQq3J1DT5gjscFWv_rPqCm5Ib4HSe42O0Ks12oamyGqpCLPmoL_4cqeEi7zYlMr2yIYlPmPu0kAapgaiUlH_JWYXxRMWDFPGlonOpU7W_38VB4jAm23niL4rxNswVEqAEubxbLXgZeT4xSQ==&c=J4M3Qi52oIMXKR8XJUMZnoEFR5mcN6UA9aLO_LA93pSn6IdlnXk3dw==&ch=Q3LtM90uXGIIkfkFqesKO9taa_C5C9ko2y3c31ViraU7dtLHVWq8qg==)
---
Peter,
This is a plea to every American to take action to save our democracy before it is too late.
Donald Trump is strongarming the Republican Party into rigging dozens of House districts ahead of the Midterm election.
And he is taunting Democrats, daring us to take off the gloves and try to stop him. But so far, only California under Gov. Gavin Newsom's leadership has punched back.
We're getting pummeled. And we're running out of time to fight back against Trump's fascism, cheating, and corruption.
We have to do more. The Democratic Party is getting into the ring with MAGA with one arm tied behind their backs, donning 12 oz padded gloves, and crying foul to the referees when Trump lands painful low blows.
If we don't dig deep and commit to this fight, we will be knocked unconscious or even killed in the ring. The referees aren't going to save us: Trump already bought most of them off.
That's why Fair Fight Colorado is leading the charge for a ballot initiative that will let Colorado voters approve a new congressional map to counter MAGA's gerrymandering and election rigging.
Trump is fighting dirty, and we need to use every tool and lever at our disposal to fight back effectively. Democracy and freedom are too important to pat ourselves on the back for going high when they go low.
[Fair Fight Colorado is taking off the gloves and fighting back. But to pull this off, we are going to need the support of millions of Americans across the country. Can you make a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to support Fair Fight Colorado as we go to the mat for democracy?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-_SpLo_9ha2LtamZx1jHcr6k5o9O1VLFGL1UOByVmJUTPhpG7qWlY0OUhIWTjhtvEF2LVTZrt0he1x7YYz74FGCI-aEalkEliYdswZrWRZgE9dweRajWsYfr5WJjzfo3jgHk0DXZ76kMQWJaYWCqsw3ccVCHWg3bKr0wJGn8Q2VJemh71k0hAzfTgetaR3shBl5bXT7cbxKl3RApeHKJ6dVrTpTvlkzKlT8w-TkikK9LhR4oRmLvxaXlF5g7LiS5&c=J4M3Qi52oIMXKR8XJUMZnoEFR5mcN6UA9aLO_LA93pSn6IdlnXk3dw==&ch=Q3LtM90uXGIIkfkFqesKO9taa_C5C9ko2y3c31ViraU7dtLHVWq8qg==)

clean_body: It’s time for blue state Colorado to step up and do its part to counter Trump’s power grab. | | | | | == Peter, This is a plea to every American to take action to save our democracy before it is too late. Donald Trump is strongarming the Republican Party into rigging dozens of House districts ahead of the Midterm election. And he is taunting Democrats, daring us to take off the gloves and try to stop him. But so far, only California under Gov. Gavin Newsom's leadership has punched back. We're getting pummeled. And we're running out of time to fight back against Trump's fascism, cheating, and corruption. We have to do more. The Democratic Party is getting into the ring with MAGA with one arm tied behind their backs, donning 12 oz padded gloves, and crying foul to the referees when Trump lands painful low blows. If we don't dig deep and commit to this fight, we will be knocked unconscious or even killed in the ring. The referees aren't going to save us: Trump already bought most of them off. That's why Fair Fight Colorado is leading the charge for a ballot initiative that will let Colorado voters approve a new congressional map to counter MAGA's gerrymandering and election rigging. Trump is fighting dirty, and we need to use every tool and lever at our disposal to fight back effectively. Democracy and freedom are too important to pat ourselves on the back for going high when they go low. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == We are in this fight together, and will rise or fall as one. Let's get to work. -- Fair Fight Colorado | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Fair Fight Colorado == == | Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Trump’s $12b bailout for farmers is an outrage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Farmers want market access, not a handout to Big Ag: the rage, sadness, and betrayal is awful, and it is motivating a shift
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VLO7RSPrSLUyatuDxSHoyNMvsKy-_ZnOwZVJApaXsIZXBYLhPfZpviIVvROXjPw8Xi4LqWKRshEY0aQGpKlly1m7vnjSpyCWOUfaRHXUGd3OuZEgCiANfwVASHJnqVuLlfUgPOF-V830NhN7DYcd6SjRssXNWLzG2Xos95ph4vamARGMmrhBCOmGCuBq2i-uzI5ElS7OUdFDrvh2ISj5qD3J0n90rON9kXtja9b8E5I=&c=Jil0mOG8kZw5k16uIeoOmNmsNmK1rp1yfLL1PHHd4vXmWG2XCLNK2A==&ch=ivb4ANVx_pJ7sFbwrcUABZDIKWnbylCgIIBi1bspegJxiIv12ZOR1g==)
---
|

Peter,
Many consultants have given me the same bad, unsolicited advice: focus only on wedge issues to fire up my base, and abandon any attempt at finding common ground with rural voters. I reject this false choice. And I hope you do too.
I have become radicalized for our rural communities. I care deeply about what happens to farmers and ranchers in this country--the people who work the land make up the backbone of my district, we all rely on their work to survive. Food isn't optional!
Donald Trump is destroying American agriculture. He is killing family farms and farming communities, decimating small towns, and ruining rural America with economic policies that only benefit billionaires and Big Ag.
Working people are not looking for handouts. They are looking for leaders who will tell the truth, recognize what is happening in this country that puts the American Dream out of reach for millions of us, and then DO SOMETHING about it.
So that's why I share my constituents' outrage and insult about Trump's pathetic "bailout" for Big Ag. Trump's policies are driving bankruptcy and despair. The depth of the rage, sadness, and betrayal so many are feeling in my district is awful, and it is motivating a shift.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VLO7RSPrSLUyatuDxSHoyNMvsKy-_ZnOwZVJApaXsIZXBYLhPfZpviIVvROXjPw8Xi4LqWKRshEY0aQGpKlly1m7vnjSpyCWOUfaRHXUGd3OuZEgCiANfwVASHJnqVuLlfUgPOF-V830NhN7DYcd6SjRssXNWLzG2Xos95ph4vamARGMmrhBCOmGCuBq2i-uzI5ElS7OUdFDrvh2ISj5qB52v1dfrsNvL4cieLYLoaU=&c=Jil0mOG8kZw5k16uIeoOmNmsNmK1rp1yfLL1PHHd4vXmWG2XCLNK2A==&ch=ivb4ANVx_pJ7sFbwrcUABZDIKWnbylCgIIBi1bspegJxiIv12ZOR1g==)
---

Trump only gets away with this because he owns and controls Republicans in Congress. And Trump's Enabler-In-Chief is my opponent, carpetbagger Lauren Boebert, who has wrecked my district in only 11 short months in office. Maybe if she were from here she'd care more about us.
I am building a massive grassroots machine that will get rid of Boebert for good. And I need you with me to get this done, for all of us.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in my district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Will you please help me stand up for farming families, working people, and everyone who sees the damage Trump is doing to our country and wants to stop it? Right now, the best thing you can do is make a donation to keep our campaign on the ground and as strong as possible to defeat Lauren Boebert this election:](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VLO7RSPrSLUyatuDxSHoyNMvsKy-_ZnOwZVJApaXsIZXBYLhPfZpviIVvROXjPw8Xi4LqWKRshEY0aQGpKlly1m7vnjSpyCWOUfaRHXUGd3OuZEgCiANfwVASHJnqVuLlfUgPOF-V830NhN7DYcd6SjRssXNWLzG2Xos95ph4vamARGMmrhBCOmGCuBq2i-uzI5ElS7OUdFDrvh2ISj5qFm6XQkGQYGUcxJhbpAmdvY=&c=Jil0mOG8kZw5k16uIeoOmNmsNmK1rp1yfLL1PHHd4vXmWG2XCLNK2A==&ch=ivb4ANVx_pJ7sFbwrcUABZDIKWnbylCgIIBi1bspegJxiIv12ZOR1g==)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Trump’s $12b bailout for farmers is an outrage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Farmers want market access, not a handout to Big Ag: the rage, sadness, and betrayal is awful, and it is motivating a shift
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VypFRP_vXirvNsGmFZYs96r48agmfi8yTNfFaQ9Tfo1Ne7BeoCv9ieWGxpXo0rT5g8lzYCvXNIGu3lqi1QsEEtYCMV_7B-o8mUH_PDa9Z1lC3VSMGJFrda11wcnB-sUSaOSfhJ-yP2JgiivFFfKyzEoV6IEgfGnChQq9lmmNR3JrlM94nnj4nvufEFwBqsLlln5zravoF9Zzdt0slbffrywSzL5XCTss97aWQaGOneM=&c=yDB0rnjUPb7tDKPD2tHwljWZIxYBoLznDFgPITnv6wAJbMwggZ3D2w==&ch=JhlF0ULytsmH3TFr_SrUQVo5j5U59k_qjJXTdc88yvBsTSSdonneZg==)
---
|

Peter,
Many consultants have given me the same bad, unsolicited advice: focus only on wedge issues to fire up my base, and abandon any attempt at finding common ground with rural voters. I reject this false choice. And I hope you do too.
I have become radicalized for our rural communities. I care deeply about what happens to farmers and ranchers in this country--the people who work the land make up the backbone of my district, we all rely on their work to survive. Food isn't optional!
Donald Trump is destroying American agriculture. He is killing family farms and farming communities, decimating small towns, and ruining rural America with economic policies that only benefit billionaires and Big Ag.
Working people are not looking for handouts. They are looking for leaders who will tell the truth, recognize what is happening in this country that puts the American Dream out of reach for millions of us, and then DO SOMETHING about it.
So that's why I share my constituents' outrage and insult about Trump's pathetic "bailout" for Big Ag. Trump's policies are driving bankruptcy and despair. The depth of the rage, sadness, and betrayal so many are feeling in my district is awful, and it is motivating a shift.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VypFRP_vXirvNsGmFZYs96r48agmfi8yTNfFaQ9Tfo1Ne7BeoCv9ieWGxpXo0rT5g8lzYCvXNIGu3lqi1QsEEtYCMV_7B-o8mUH_PDa9Z1lC3VSMGJFrda11wcnB-sUSaOSfhJ-yP2JgiivFFfKyzEoV6IEgfGnChQq9lmmNR3JrlM94nnj4nvufEFwBqsLlln5zravoF9Zzdt0slbffrz1P8OdvW2t-H0FQ_46Sm-Y=&c=yDB0rnjUPb7tDKPD2tHwljWZIxYBoLznDFgPITnv6wAJbMwggZ3D2w==&ch=JhlF0ULytsmH3TFr_SrUQVo5j5U59k_qjJXTdc88yvBsTSSdonneZg==)
---

Trump only gets away with this because he owns and controls Republicans in Congress. And Trump's Enabler-In-Chief is my opponent, carpetbagger Lauren Boebert, who has wrecked my district in only 11 short months in office. Maybe if she were from here she'd care more about us.
I am building a massive grassroots machine that will get rid of Boebert for good. And I need you with me to get this done, for all of us.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in my district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Will you please help me stand up for farming families, working people, and everyone who sees the damage Trump is doing to our country and wants to stop it? Right now, the best thing you can do is make a donation to keep our campaign on the ground and as strong as possible to defeat Lauren Boebert this election:](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VypFRP_vXirvNsGmFZYs96r48agmfi8yTNfFaQ9Tfo1Ne7BeoCv9ieWGxpXo0rT5g8lzYCvXNIGu3lqi1QsEEtYCMV_7B-o8mUH_PDa9Z1lC3VSMGJFrda11wcnB-sUSaOSfhJ-yP2JgiivFFfKyzEoV6IEgfGnChQq9lmmNR3JrlM94nnj4nvufEFwBqsLlln5zravoF9Zzdt0slbffrxZ_XooH0fCl4EnfHTeuilU=&c=yDB0rnjUPb7tDKPD2tHwljWZIxYBoLznDFgPITnv6wAJbMwggZ3D2w==&ch=JhlF0ULytsmH3TFr_SrUQVo5j5U59k_qjJXTdc88yvBsTSSdonneZg==)
---

clean_body: Farmers want market access, not a handout to Big Ag: the rage, sadness, and betrayal is awful, and it is motivating a shift | | | | | == | Peter, Many consultants have given me the same bad, unsolicited advice: focus only on wedge issues to fire up my base, and abandon any attempt at finding common ground with rural voters. I reject this false choice. And I hope you do too. I have become radicalized for our rural communities. I care deeply about what happens to farmers and ranchers in this country--the people who work the land make up the backbone of my district, we all rely on their work to survive. Food isn't optional! Donald Trump is destroying American agriculture. He is killing family farms and farming communities, decimating small towns, and ruining rural America with economic policies that only benefit billionaires and Big Ag. Working people are not looking for handouts. They are looking for leaders who will tell the truth, recognize what is happening in this country that puts the American Dream out of reach for millions of us, and then DO SOMETHING about it. So that's why I share my constituents' outrage and insult about Trump's pathetic "bailout" for Big Ag. Trump's policies are driving bankruptcy and despair. The depth of the rage, sadness, and betrayal so many are feeling in my district is awful, and it is motivating a shift. | == Trump only gets away with this because he owns and controls Republicans in Congress. And Trump's Enabler-In-Chief is my opponent, carpetbagger Lauren Boebert, who has wrecked my district in only 11 short months in office. Maybe if she were from here she'd care more about us. I am building a massive grassroots machine that will get rid of Boebert for good. And I need you with me to get this done, for all of us. Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in my district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you, Trisha Calvarese | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

| Hi Peter,
Don your merriest holiday outfit and come celebrate the season with the MassGOP! We're decking the halls for a night of Christmas cheer, good company, and what's sure to be an exciting straw poll for Governor on Thursday, December 18 in Boston. Your personal invitation is tucked below like a present under the tree. 🎁✨
To RSVP and claim your straw-poll ballot, simply follow this link: [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/christmasparty25](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P8JadOwRjyTtQFbato6QAoVqIeAndCF-uDTPdFu41tU-59Lj6bm8ffLC95z0sVmzsN8xOumOfyeb08Dm8O3bCD5KXqHrLhSL0vJVG3iwizU58fYKqixyEv72CgFL9POmHBmyz1qs8f7hs-Qjuw5egaSdVUyiD9BSPYilUxOGx5iWoDDeZfyZVfZNJmDVIJ_Cmr0-tznMaBsnMB-s7I1OiA==&c=KU_qJCuzgaLXWnMDJf-V9DlQdAnHE7i7LRxy3WvLmXsEJkpQdF_iPg==&ch=tikarGJIuqdseLHZcftOiOi5aN6Ml9eIF15PckRDYRrO3F6aeG8b6Q==)
Or, email me directly to say you're coming at [haley@massgop.com](mailto:haley@massgop.com).
Votes must be cast in person.
If you're able to chip in a little extra, or haven't contributed yet this year, now is the perfect time. Best positioning Republicans for victory in 2026 is the best gift you can give to the MassGOP this holiday season: [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/christmasparty25](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P8JadOwRjyTtQFbato6QAoVqIeAndCF-uDTPdFu41tU-59Lj6bm8ffLC95z0sVmzsN8xOumOfyeb08Dm8O3bCD5KXqHrLhSL0vJVG3iwizU58fYKqixyEv72CgFL9POmHBmyz1qs8f7hs-Qjuw5egaSdVUyiD9BSPYilUxOGx5iWoDDeZfyZVfZNJmDVIJ_C8QOZVqEkw6eU_S-9gfzmAA==&c=KU_qJCuzgaLXWnMDJf-V9DlQdAnHE7i7LRxy3WvLmXsEJkpQdF_iPg==&ch=tikarGJIuqdseLHZcftOiOi5aN6Ml9eIF15PckRDYRrO3F6aeG8b6Q==)
Can't wait to celebrate the magic of the season, our 2025 wins, and all that's to come in 2026.
See you on the 18th! Haley

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Josh Kaul is HIDING the Truth. Chip In to Hold Him Accountable!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alkkjty-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, Josh Kaul promised transparency as Attorney General. Instead, he's desperately hiding his failures at the Department of Justice.A new [Federalist expose](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alkkjty-didthutlhu-y/) reveals the shocking cover-up:Annual crime lab reports have vanished from the DOJ website, links redirect to the homepage, press releases provide no documents, and reports are delayed until the holidays to avoid scrutiny. A 2024 state audit caught Kaul's team cherry-picking data to fake better performance, then dismissing it as an "oversight." Auditors blasted the department for botched records, missing standards, and ignoring transparency laws. When pressed, Kaul's office refused to comment.Victims deserve justice, not cover-ups. [EXPOSE JOSH KAUL](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alkkjty-didthutlhu-j/) We need your help right now to expose Kaul's failures and win this fight.**Will you chip in [$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-alkkjty-didthutlhu-d/) _?_** Every dollar helps us shine a light on the truth and put victims first.-Team WisGOP | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. ## Senate Rejects Extending Insurance Subsidies
The Senate rejected both Democratic and Republican [health care proposals Thursday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M3unSAQBfCnwR0GBvxasGjSuPs33XVpEEedBsXA9N749o23j9D1ZE7O7_z6mr48RTq3H_5Ax2uaTnyXiMyYpx195D34jFfGg_4cZaFy4o0TKGikBqlhWjzFe7LV4lZEQFOh013bNKZrTV_trtUW-raB3nozzyEM3mKnBtXYZoY-rBW5J02DBq1Vp5vatKgHOyuvQzesphdW4UKccv070ck7rvFOL8x1SEcV3c58FWG-CRgFjH4Oj6De0nMWMP5MkZhCETAWPD2jvBIVXGTwheUrMRYZ0nEh07nJf2T5mOWV05WKj59XTvkWZqRFmO8aehiU7lSV3XK9KUYqbSes2g5P8VOL_2vLl4O_AQAA__8iBojD), virtually guaranteeing that millions of Americans will see steep premium increases in January when enhanced Affordable Care Act subsidies expire. The Democratic bill to extend subsidies for three years failed 51-48, with four Republicans crossing party lines to support it. The Republican alternative, which [offered health savings accounts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnDAUhZ_GdB7ha36WgmKiFd2m2SJKhS5wWO7K2Mj2DJq3j0geIfWRPp3v-_UxfrA48V8_eUef1zB6nMkhZ8RxA7u8zRxxROzy2NMiyeOFkUqqtSFtaFxY3GusiqVfAYIt0Ju2qWvbNvat2Ppprqu5gaWysxWhm8qubGCnituua9elkP6iGTJkTNma-mYbmK6aSjZz2632TVUlFskh3r6D-Lxhda_wRLzNYS9cv-V8JGXvigZFw3metz35a1M0wOtHUjT8M1E0hLwhKhoSPGfoiG_MOekoT3Y6TLzzpasncS7pDRFJnxtnvYN90muImmfW6TElWQQXmqO-380nvze_lR3CLIuy7z-uojjTJ-JRxH45TnFOUtOqqvzaWdzf7_m_gj97-hMAAP__F5qWXw) instead of extending subsidies, also failed 51-48. Premiums are [expected to double on average](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GOiPbGPsoXKSh-9OmRHv2AvvHGGTvHbq3j4iUJ0g30kij-b5fX_MXUKK8_oQdPS_HnPGqCZmxzBtC4i1AwbPgTq-9RqoZPzhrqQehtFB6jkDpM5s2-gVRY9-iV84OQ-9s_2g3b5xxFqQyowY7joOWo1GLDDb2CNLGlvy9prTSSkmnhq63qEbzlKCCG5f-0RiJkfgo3fdBmTdc0ud4Y-nCsbfJb8xnbfofjZ4aPV3X1eVnuCnuvtHTeSRiCrXRUzjyWrDesWIGRlHwGwNXAQHE8sqR8ioKnq9nogBZQGIsGZjeKP45EBVZ1JN-oyghgzYPM7q2-HhelBJV6xoj1x0o_T3I_2X17fWfAAAA__8qjY4w) for the 22 million Americans who had benefited from the expiring COVID-era tax credits.
## Mass Evacuations Ordered as Washington Floods
More than [100,000 people in western Washington](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M3unCAUBfCnwR1GLh86CxZNGnfTTdN0aRi46G1QDNCZ-PaNfYX_-pecnHN-P5eno0TH-sPtaFvMy4GfmrA1LMuGLrXNu4JnwZ3-7jVQPfDCBQbQXAAXsARH6VpUF2xEBJQdWjEareVo5NRt9hWj0t6ADvgwxgk1KWlGPTgNRikzdWTvNAEChBhGoXtpUDzUa3DCj48oJ6YGDNRy6f9kOtqGMV35jaX3ee-S3Vo7K5PfGMwMZvfy94J-zTczmH_9ZDAX9LkEHlPOgY6Vn85TJM-PXNr2wdp4bbnslbu253puWMjzQm8sDOabLiZnCkx-FzDBKGESXbHh_FBKVM3I1LDujtL_Su1LP74t_AsAAP__puaHDA) were ordered to evacuate as heavy rain pushed multiple rivers to historic flood levels. The flooding, caused by a strong atmospheric river system, affected communities from Mount Vernon to Monroe, triggering widespread road closures, school shutdowns, and emergency rescues. [See photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EFv1DAQBeBf49y8iieJvXvwoQXSInWRCqIILtFsPN4MOHbkmI3236PwF3p-0qf33o_zcEYOHK9fcCZbfBoibWugUigPE2Eo04iZlkwz_51Xx2ukOw1QQycVSAWDQw73oa2c9URATUVWGd11jdHNsZqsvxCi6ZpL62o8al1DrbxraPTHk9FaV2x3TYECpWqjukOjSZ3aS41qNCffHEVbk-OS8uF34lgm8uGebpQPY5qrYKdSllU0DwJ6Af22bYc_nJPZUwH9PkdAH9KIQUC_cFx2RGKgXOScHGUsJCfC211m5CgnLqvETCg3jk5umCPH6yrJexqLgP7Ty-tX8_3t7fz49Pn5QX97_qk_Pr58ePr1KqCvsnXLxiHwqo1o6-uMHP43Le-692bhXwAAAP__6XaPSA). Governor Bob Ferguson declared a state of emergency and deployed the National Guard. Officials reported that the Skagit and Snohomish Rivers were expected to crest near or above levels not seen since the major floods of 2006 and 1990. Local authorities warned residents in floodplains to evacuate immediately, citing life-threatening conditions and the potential for levee failures. [Watch footage from the state here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMV2Qd41xKFz8DV3-9krLsZewJ4MT4wvH25-4V7hupJE-aebj5m6eE6-P_34hW6fsVtq3RLVScTP5VOfgCz0LLfy1bJG3lQ5yKFFfAC-ALnpOh-uaaCciJNWQBdNrrUyvrs1sUQ_USy8nA8Z0vfaKJKAGGWQkGnTD9tQAAQGkAd2qnmDo7tJDMMOkrqKTFLnm0n5mXutMUzrym0ob8tIkO9f63IT6J3AUOO773t7v4ewEjucYgeObI-UzhNf3S5lXFweZm2Ljc-eUeOuN6ORj8Zx-zfqnI94WfwIAAP__yWtweQ).
## Disney Sends Characters to OpenAI
The Walt Disney Co. has agreed to [invest $1 billion in OpenAI](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAQRL-G6miISz0LFQ4CpbppbpFSWJPLqw34EEjagv8-UPIJaWeAg5nz62P7QPYcv35ioKW6tEU6i6daKW87oa-7wUxHpsDPUCyXSG_aoIVeKpAKNovs31vX2MURAemGFjUOfa_HQU_Nvig3zw8YzGi1VZ3Wczf3E6oJZnSt6V3Dy0VToECpdlT9TQ-k5u7RojLj7PQkupYs15RvvxPHupPz7_SifDMpNH7Zaz2K0HcBq4D1PM9bKPHqBKwU5bMIWEOK9BawmhQOjExXdqKv8t8hWZPk-KJSpZIP9p5TlBxlOigiS8-GYiFpdsxoKuUiXcqypIwCVszyflefON1_CL0mw1bo798upXSWT8pHkxd7nBe1DKPo2q-A7P-Or_9l_LXAnwAAAP__aL-WdA) and will use the AI company's technology to build new tools and experiences for Disney+ subscribers in a three-year deal that amounts to a major Hollywood endorsement of AI-created content. Disney will use OpenAI's technology to develop new products for its streaming service, give employees access to ChatGPT, and license its characters for use in OpenAI's Sora video-generation platform. As part of the agreement, [fans can create short videos](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb8Gd3SgsEEXLGbj7s12lqYayrYmKAYYX_z7if0Lb1snOalz_3zNX8iJ9_dv3Mi3Jc87fddErVGZV8LU1oCFjkIb_9tq5LrTRTMoeEoNUsMckdM19130CxGQ6chrZ59P46wZutX32mHoFzdYOy7ORHDBjEEHcONiXzB07G-bBg1aK6efD2NJj_1LoQ5uXMwgekWRWy6Pv5n3ttKSrnxSeYS8dcmvrR1VmF8CJgHTiYWpXTcTMN1mAVPkNzdMAqa77nO4O2Q-aEeWkTBJUEqGFQuGRqXKlmXNBeXJkbLk_aTaqtTyxSlx3qUGY62yvdICpq74eHzfpFonevXekNPnvfajTU8P_wMAAP__IxOJdg) featuring more than 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars characters on Sora, though voices won't be included. The deal marks Disney's first major AI partnership and comes on the same day that the company [accused Google](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb0TwsMEeGLp4S9eOFoFrmwqbyNBE-fvK6Sd0Pnrn3Xu_rtPVxRT35dNtsHXO045nSagVx7TCpbp6d-B-YIs_Wwmx7HhhIkEdl8QlTcHF9JraJtgZIKgGVhrddcpo1TerbTVu_aDVYIL3QjgygjTdQt9BOXjVRHvaJEmSUhjZXZSGHNqbcNKbYVY9awVCrPm4fOe41xVzeuUHjovPW5PsWuu9MPXBaGQ0BriQ4o4TMhpPNaNR0one4fmS85LAPVwBd3vgASWWyv9Kc0lK67brxXnSHDbcnzGlWLRhrVg2F9P7b_3XWA9LvwEAAP___nt7cw) of using its copyrighted content to train AI without permission.

Governor Bob Ferguson declared a state of emergency and deployed the National Guard. Disney will use OpenAI's technology to develop new products for its streaming service, give employees access to ChatGPT, and license its characters for use in OpenAI's Sora video-generation platform. As part of the agreement, featuring more than 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars characters on Sora, though voices won't be included. The deal marks Disney's first major AI partnership and comes on the same day that the company of using its copyrighted content to train AI without permission. body:
Our cities are still far more violent than Berlin, Tokyo, or Toronto -- and pretending otherwise is killing people.

# [Democrat Crime Denial Is Hurting the People It Claims To Protect](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=180985618&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTg1NjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NDE1OTcsImV4cCI6MTc2ODEzMzU5NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Dz15wuqE7yMTWkOs0FxWeR5hRcHTuB7GfszdQa-DhJo)
### Our cities are still far more violent than Berlin, Tokyo, or Toronto -- and pretending otherwise is killing people.
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---
| Dec 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=180985618&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTg1NjE4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTU0MTU5NywiZXhwIjoxNzY4MTMzNTk3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzE1OTI1OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Rshcm1sscF6mxDTCod3MRZMXJNf07IR27NOayeaq1M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=180985618&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTg1NjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NDE1OTcsImV4cCI6MTc2ODEzMzU5NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Dz15wuqE7yMTWkOs0FxWeR5hRcHTuB7GfszdQa-DhJo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=180985618&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwOTg1NjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NDE1OTcsImV4cCI6MTc2ODEzMzU5NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Dz15wuqE7yMTWkOs0FxWeR5hRcHTuB7GfszdQa-DhJo)
---
| | [](https://substack..GI7Yn00Kiutdsdv2w1Ohd8TniVgSeP-1gnueRZapIPw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mattdiemer/p/the-lefts-crime-denial-is-hurting?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

A couple months ago, President Trump deployed the National Guard into Washington, DC after an attempted carjacking and assault left a staffer from his administration injured near Capitol Hill. The White House claimed the goal was to curb crime and make the city safer. Trump supporters praised it. Trump critics denounced it.
What almost no one wanted to talk about was the real problem underneath all of this. **Crime**. The everyday violence that has been baked into American life for decades and that Dems still refuse to confront honestly.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ebe11f1-6c4f-457b-8945-e14ae131fdcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**America Has a Crime Problem. Stop Pretending It Does Not.**
Cleveland has roughly 365,000 residents. In the early 2020s it recorded between about 100 and 180 homicides a year, which works out to roughly 30 to nearly 50 murders per 100,000 residents depending on the year. That is consistently among the highest homicide rates of any major city in the United States. Recent years have seen some improvement, but the city still sits in the high tier of violent places in this country. [Ideastream Public Media](https://substack.com/redirect/96d5c0d3-c1e0-493c-be5c-4b9762367dd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Berlin, a city of about 3.8 million people, generally records a few dozen homicides a year. In 2024, Berlin police counted just over 50 homicide offenses, which is roughly 1 to 2 murders per 100,000 residents. [Berlin](https://substack.com/redirect/7c94607a-a381-4b2e-897b-f36f72daac4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tokyo, the largest metro area on the planet, has a national context where Japan's homicide rate is around a quarter of a murder per 100,000 people. Even as Japan has seen small increases in crime, it still remains one of the safest countries on Earth compared to the United States. [MacroTrends](https://substack.com/redirect/78052852-32d3-48cc-b064-7e3180734f45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Honolulu, with a city population roughly three times Cleveland's and about a million people on the island of Oahu, usually records homicides in the tens, not the hundreds, each year. Its per-capita homicide rate is far below Cleveland's and far below the worst American cities. [Honolulu Civil Beat](https://substack.com/redirect/46c1bd1e-0e48-48bb-98ad-4bc5098c95d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So when we compare cities on a per-capita basis, which is the only honest way to do it, American cities are much more violent than cities in Western Europe or East Asia.
Yes, homicide rose during the pandemic years. Yes, national violent crime has trended down again since 2022 and 2023. In 2023 the national homicide rate fell from its recent peak and has continued to move downward in 2024 and 2025. That is real. [Bureau of Justice Statistics](https://substack.com/redirect/9abb1989-7570-4aa9-b66a-14901754dc47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is also real that the United States still sits far above its peer countries. Germany, Japan, the United Kingdom, Canada and other wealthy nations typically sit between about 0.3 and 1.5 homicides per 100,000 people. The United States has hovered somewhere between 5 and 7 for much of the last decade, with some cities blowing past that. [East Asia Forum](https://substack.com/redirect/ee180e49-d227-4bb4-9c62-138b772a4149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Some American cities have homicide rates that live in the same neighborhood as some of the most violent cities in Latin America and South Africa. That is not "vibes." That is math.
America has a violent crime problem. Full stop.
You do not need a spreadsheet to understand the next part.
Crime in poor neighborhoods almost never produces fast, serious political action. Crime in affluent neighborhoods almost always does.
If violence stays boxed into neighborhoods without money, without heavy homeownership, without organized political power, it gets speeches and hashtags. When shootings, carjackings and robberies spill into high-income areas, suddenly everyone discovers that crime is bad.
If Bay Village or [Olmsted Falls](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6bc3ab-141d-4d85-b124-2875ac7f8f0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), two suburban affluent cities outside Cleveland, had [Cleveland's](https://substack.com/redirect/e7de0479-ef04-48aa-a22d-c0ed5db445e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) murder rate, [Bay Village](https://substack.com/redirect/27aed2f9-8f91-4ea1-9e5c-c9c3112e02d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) would see roughly **5 to 8 murders a year** , and Olmsted Falls would see **3 to 5 murders a year** , instead of the **zero** they typically report.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e97ce7e-a683-48ba-8fe6-572737c5bb3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Imagine the outrage in Olmsted Falls or Bay Village if those communities experienced 15-24 murders every three years.
That has been true for decades. A lot of people in poor neighborhoods have been begging for help for years. No one listens until someone with a title or a donor list catches a bullet or loses a car.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b3a70c3-9822-4ccd-80c0-097be0d460d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Bureau of Justice Statistics](https://substack.com/redirect/9abb1989-7570-4aa9-b66a-14901754dc47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**The National Guard Deployment**
Troops on American streets should always make you nervous. History has shown us again and again that when leaders decide they can deploy soldiers domestically at will, the outcome is rarely good for the people. Kings did it. Dictators did it. Presidents have abused that power. So it makes sense that the instinct for many people is to recoil when the National Guard rolls into Washington, DC.
But here is the part almost no one wants to say out loud. If you live in a neighborhood where gunshots are a weekly soundtrack, where carjackings happen in broad daylight, where walking home is a daily gamble, seeing more uniforms and hearing fewer gunshots does not feel like tyranny. It feels like a breath of air. You can still worry about civil liberties and be honest about the fact that safety matters. For people in high crime neighborhoods, safety is not an abstract concept or a Twitter argument. It is life or death.
The Guard is not a real solution. It is not something you want permanently. But it can act as a reset, a hard reset, in places where violence has been allowed to grow for decades while politicians posture, filibuster, and argue about whose talking point sounds nicer on the local news.
A responsible city leader would treat a National Guard deployment the same way you treat a burst pipe. First, turn the water off. Stop the immediate crisis. Then, while everything is calm, fix the structural problem. When the work is finished, turn the water back on. There is no virtue in letting the leak destroy the whole house while you debate the purity of your repair technique.
If I were a mayor of a city drowning in violent crime, here is what I would do. I would set a defined, public time period. Say... six months. Not indefinite. Not open ended. Six months. During that time, every rule of engagement for the Guard would be strict, monitored, and public. Any member of the Guard who hurt or harassed a resident without cause would be prosecuted to the full extent of the law.
Then I would call in my police chief, my social service directors, community organizers, neighborhood watch groups, religious leaders, youth program leaders, mental health workers, and anyone else who has been begging the city for support. I would say:
"We have six months to get our house in order. Crime is down because the Guard is here. It will not stay that way. When they are gone, we need a real system ready to stand on its own."
This is the golden window that cities almost never get. A moment of calm inside a long storm. The job of a mayor is not to go on MSNBC or Fox News and yell about Trump. The job is not to perform outrage for donors. The job is to take advantage of rare breathing room and build something permanent so your residents can walk their streets without fear.
That means addressing the things that actually drive crime. Mental health. Addiction. Youth program collapse. Lack of transportation. Housing instability. The absence of credible messengers in violent neighborhoods. The shortage of local police who know the communities they patrol. Bad policy choices that stack the deck against people trying to climb out of poverty. All of it.
You cannot fix those problems in chaos. You need a stable period to refocus and rebuild.
After six months, the Guard leaves. Full stop. No attempt to extend their presence. No attempt to normalize military force in civilian life. The city takes back control because it has prepared real solutions.
But here is what I do not hear in the suburban, affluent conversations about this deployment. I do not hear a single word about the safety of the people who live in the poorest neighborhoods. I do not hear concern for the families who have been dealing with shootings, break-ins, drug activity, and fear for generations. I hear outrage about the idea of troops downtown, but nothing about the decades of violence in communities that have begged for help and gotten empty speeches instead...by people that don't even live downtown. People that are just comfortable tweeting from their safe, suburban homes.
People only care when crime spills into places with money. They care when it touches donors. They care when it inconveniences professionals and political staffers. They care when it disrupts brunch. If it does disrupt brunch, the mayor runs out and signs a [Flock camera contract](https://substack.com/redirect/e5e3dc79-07e9-40cd-8b27-aa9e51c58639?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to track everyone coming in and out of the city.

But when it crushes poor neighborhoods, year after year, no one in power gives a damn. Suddenly the moral outrage disappears. Suddenly the nuance comes back. Suddenly the conversation shifts to excuses instead of solutions.
Our cities are not fine. They are not safe simply because crime dipped in the aggregate. On a global scale, American cities are more dangerous than almost every major city in Europe, Japan, South Korea, or Australia. Some of our cities are as violent as the most dangerous parts of Latin America and Africa. This is not partisan. It is the truth.
So let us stop pretending that deploying the Guard is the apocalypse, while ignoring the fact that families in poor neighborhoods have been living in fear for decades. Let us stop comforting the wealthy first and abandoning everyone else. And let us stop the dishonest argument that things are basically fine when every statistic and every lived experience in these communities tells you the opposite.
Do I think the National Guard is the long-term answer. No. Can it be a stopgap that allows cities to address issues. Maybe. But damn it, have the real conversation of crime and find some damn bold solutions. We can not pretend that our cities are safe just because we do not personally experience the danger.
Crime is real. Violent crime is worse in the United States than in almost every developed nation. And the people screaming the loudest about troops on the street are usually the ones least affected by the violence itself.
We need real solutions. We need honesty. We need urgency. And we need leaders who care about more than the safest zip codes.
* * *
**What We Have Seen When Uniformed Presence Increases**
In several recent cases, a larger uniformed footprint has produced short term drops in violent crime. In Washington, DC in 2025, violent crime fell during the first nineteen days after National Guard and federal agents were deployed compared with the same period in 2024 and with the five year average (CBS News, Feb 2025). Cities that were targeted or threatened with deployments, including Memphis, Chicago, and Portland, also saw violent crime and homicide rates decline after federal attention increased (Axios, Jan 2025). A similar pattern appeared during Operation Legend in 2020, when surges of federal officers in Chicago, Kansas City, and Albuquerque coincided with short term reductions in shootings and homicides (U.S. DOJ Operation Legend Report, 2021).
These examples do not justify long term militarization. They show a consistent empirical pattern. A sudden increase in uniformed enforcement often suppresses violence temporarily. Research groups have noted the same effect. The R Street Institute has documented that visible enforcement increases perceived detection risk, which can deter opportunistic violent crime (R Street Institute, 2023). The reductions are temporary unless the city uses the window to rebuild local capacity, but the short term impact is real. Across multiple cities and multiple years, crime has declined concurrently with Guard or federal deployments.
* * *
**Final Point**
The core truth does not change.
America's violent crime problem is real.
Troops on the street are not a real answer.
But pretending our cities are "basically fine" is its own kind of lie.
We need local leaders who will admit the scale of the problem, use whatever breathing room they can get, and build lasting solutions that make neighborhoods safe in the same way rich neighborhoods are.
Crime is not partisan. Safety is not partisan.
If Congress, statehouses and city halls keep treating crime as a talking point instead of something in their job description, families in the same neighborhoods that have been ignored for generations will keep paying the ultimate price.
