Our cities are still far more violent than Berlin, Tokyo, or Toronto -- and pretending otherwise is killing people. | | | Dec 12 | | | | | | | | | | | | A couple months ago, President Trump deployed the National Guard into Washington, DC after an attempted carjacking and assault left a staffer from his administration injured near Capitol Hill. The White House claimed the goal was to curb crime and make the city safer. Trump supporters praised it. Trump critics denounced it. What almost no one wanted to talk about was the real problem underneath all of this. Crime. The everyday violence that has been baked into American life for decades and that Dems still refuse to confront honestly. | | ---|---|--- America Has a Crime Problem. Stop Pretending It Does Not. Cleveland has roughly 365,000 residents. In the early 2020s it recorded between about 100 and 180 homicides a year, which works out to roughly 30 to nearly 50 murders per 100,000 residents depending on the year. That is consistently among the highest homicide rates of any major city in the United States. Recent years have seen some improvement, but the city still sits in the high tier of violent places in this country. Berlin, a city of about 3.8 million people, generally records a few dozen homicides a year. In 2024, Berlin police counted just over 50 homicide offenses, which is roughly 1 to 2 murders per 100,000 residents. Tokyo, the largest metro area on the planet, has a national context where Japan's homicide rate is around a quarter of a murder per 100,000 people. Even as Japan has seen small increases in crime, it still remains one of the safest countries on Earth compared to the United States. Honolulu, with a city population roughly three times Cleveland's and about a million people on the island of Oahu, usually records homicides in the tens, not the hundreds, each year. Its per-capita homicide rate is far below Cleveland's and far below the worst American cities. So when we compare cities on a per-capita basis, which is the only honest way to do it, American cities are much more violent than cities in Western Europe or East Asia. Yes, homicide rose during the pandemic years. Yes, national violent crime has trended down again since 2022 and 2023. In 2023 the national homicide rate fell from its recent peak and has continued to move downward in 2024 and 2025. That is real. It is also real that the United States still sits far above its peer countries. Germany, Japan, the United Kingdom, Canada and other wealthy nations typically sit between about 0.3 and 1.5 homicides per 100,000 people. The United States has hovered somewhere between 5 and 7 for much of the last decade, with some cities blowing past that. Some American cities have homicide rates that live in the same neighborhood as some of the most violent cities in Latin America and South Africa. That is not "vibes." That is math. America has a violent crime problem. Full stop. You do not need a spreadsheet to understand the next part. Crime in poor neighborhoods almost never produces fast, serious political action. Crime in affluent neighborhoods almost always does. If violence stays boxed into neighborhoods without money, without heavy homeownership, without organized political power, it gets speeches and hashtags. When shootings, carjackings and robberies spill into high-income areas, suddenly everyone discovers that crime is bad. That has been true for decades. A lot of people in poor neighborhoods have been begging for help for years. No one listens until someone with a title or a donor list catches a bullet or loses a car. | | ---|---|--- The National Guard Deployment Troops on American streets should always make you nervous. | MAGA is getting smoked in states where it was once thought unimaginable. In yesterday's elections, Democrats broke the almost three decade Republican hold on Miami's mayorship and also took an unexpected ruby red State House seat in Georgia.
If deep red Republican strongholds like Miami and Georgia are in play for Democrats, that means swing states like Michigan and Arizona are on track to go deep blue. However, just like MAGA's plan to win the midterms by rigging them via redistricting, they've also got a plan to cheat their way out of losing states like Michigan, Georgia, and Arizona:
Stealing their state supreme courts via obscure judicial elections.
If these efforts are successful we could see something truly horrific happen on Election Night 2028.
Imagine, it's November 7th 2028 -- Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia, are all called for Democrats in landslide blue wave victories and a Democrat wins the Presidency.
However, in the following days state courts slowly but surely invalidate these Democratic victories citing a rehash of the 2020 election denial spiel (Soros, illegal immigrants voting, etc). Ultimately the Democratic presidential victory is nullified. Trump is declared the victor.
It sounds like a nightmare and too dark to be true but this is exactly why MAGA is working overtime to steal these courts. Defend our Courts just foiled one of these attempts in Pennsylvania. Now MAGA is attempting the same playbook in AZ, MI, and GA this 2026 and we must mobilize once again.
Obscure state supreme court races are not sexy, they are hard to fundraise for, but the stakes are life and death. name: Breaking:
subject: Court coup — MAGA seizes permanent control of Arkansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Overnight, Arkansas just enshrined one party rule. They have lost the last vestiges of their democracy. Full stop.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SmK6mLq2mMcMcm0P-MREnSHSsZHe1ez_JuS3NGZ_-f9dcJcs9bKyyN8vQl65bPD539qNccvKhYG3oblVbxy121rmnWZXgCu-2_u3GEMRB1T6KxQWcjCHaqAdTG79yWVgAyoedvJRtFGTiuL8_4GPP67YrwR0C9iva-Fnh40ZLztMNkW4GHGWOI9vpqqeP4WIpKVdvsgy4ys2vhq7y9Nx2XBUVDhj7DTjXfKG-CB65Xk=&c=L1_eGiL2VY6GrLf3cUkmvONEh8hkhdumc_V6e1iPsjXKvhnn8vn88Q==&ch=5zU5_JUsLWfMLYaEG4l4nu1oRLfbo0kGEhutIGHQul49QfN0NMwsYw==)
---
| Peter,
Much like the concerned scientist in the disaster movie whose dire warnings fall on deaf ears --
Defend our Courts has been working desperately for the last seven months to inform the voting public about MAGA's alarming plan to take over critical state courts across America.
Now we've just received a soulcrushing example of what happens when we lose one of these courts to the far-right:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SmK6mLq2mMcMcm0P-MREnSHSsZHe1ez_JuS3NGZ_-f9dcJcs9bKyyN8vQl65bPD539qNccvKhYG3oblVbxy121rmnWZXgCu-2_u3GEMRB1T6KxQWcjCHaqAdTG79yWVgAyoedvJRtFGTiuL8_4GPP67YrwR0C9iva-Fnh40ZLztMNkW4GHGWOI9vpqqeP4WIpKVdvsgy4ys2vhq7y9Nx2YoQFduQvQ9KpUfyNiw6mkg=&c=L1_eGiL2VY6GrLf3cUkmvONEh8hkhdumc_V6e1iPsjXKvhnn8vn88Q==&ch=5zU5_JUsLWfMLYaEG4l4nu1oRLfbo0kGEhutIGHQul49QfN0NMwsYw==)
---
The Arkansas State Supreme Court just gave the Republican state legislature a green light to kill any constitutional amendment passed by voters.
As the Arkansas Times eloquently puts it:
"Even when Arkansans manage the Herculean task of collecting tens of thousands of signatures and jumping through the myriad hoops Republicans have placed in the path of a constitutional amendment reaching the ballot, the Legislature can simply change or reverse that measure."
If voters were to pass an amendment to loosen Arkansas's near-total ban on abortions, state lawmakers could simply undo it after the fact. Every person in Arkansas could vote to save abortion and it wouldn't matter. Arkansas just lost its democracy. Full stop.
This is what is at stake if MAGA takes your local State Supreme Court. Overnight they can enshrine one party MAGA rule, implement redistricting, and rule that your votes no longer matter as Arkansas' Supreme Court just did.
While it's too late for Arkansas there is time to save courts in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia where MAGA is working overtime to seize their courts. [Everything is on the line but sadly state courts are a hard issue to get donors to care about. We need your support to protect them. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us defend these key swing state courts?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SmK6mLq2mMcMcm0P-MREnSHSsZHe1ez_JuS3NGZ_-f9dcJcs9bKyyN8vQl65bPD5Njg8HI7SyUG2kfeQ2PmuRfgK0WGim1ZkMcGqeLWGoAOKPcxvlnBz_LrsZNJV-_9dFcIXpFUtZVO98w1ZZzcyBUlmO7SXqUiEe8UhcnPkVkb52_iSes9zH0fdpKtywxu1O4CvGUAX3cTJzyHUVl3CtfILROsnEpX9Ea1jmGuNdcrDJo7mt2dZ_WlcG0QCDL8u&c=L1_eGiL2VY6GrLf3cUkmvONEh8hkhdumc_V6e1iPsjXKvhnn8vn88Q==&ch=5zU5_JUsLWfMLYaEG4l4nu1oRLfbo0kGEhutIGHQul49QfN0NMwsYw==)
---

clean_body: Overnight, Arkansas just enshrined one party rule. They have lost the last vestiges of their democracy. Full stop. | | | | | == | Peter, Much like the concerned scientist in the disaster movie whose dire warnings fall on deaf ears -- Defend our Courts has been working desperately for the last seven months to inform the voting public about MAGA's alarming plan to take over critical state courts across America. Now we've just received a soulcrushing example of what happens when we lose one of these courts to the far-right: | == The Arkansas State Supreme Court just gave the Republican state legislature a green light to kill any constitutional amendment passed by voters. As the Arkansas Times eloquently puts it: "Even when Arkansans manage the Herculean task of collecting tens of thousands of signatures and jumping through the myriad hoops Republicans have placed in the path of a constitutional amendment reaching the ballot, the Legislature can simply change or reverse that measure." If voters were to pass an amendment to loosen Arkansas's near-total ban on abortions, state lawmakers could simply undo it after the fact. Every person in Arkansas could vote to save abortion and it wouldn't matter. Arkansas just lost its democracy. Full stop. This is what is at stake if MAGA takes your local State Supreme Court. Overnight they can enshrine one party MAGA rule, implement redistricting, and rule that your votes no longer matter as Arkansas' Supreme Court just did. While it's too late for Arkansas there is time to save courts in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia where MAGA is working overtime to seize their courts. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | We cannot allow for more states to follow Arkansas' lead. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1922, naval aviator [Arthur Ray Hawkins](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OozAUxfGnMV2Qfe3wUbhIg7bJFttsaV3GF7iKwZHtQHj7UeYVRqc6za_4_7-7O3Lgbf6LK9nynqLb6MiBSqHkeNsx804rYTjH17zElCkvkRxIuF4UXBQ4jxxOZypvR-l7VZFVbXO9Gtn1TbVYNcnJNNBo7dtGjUb2PU0axw5M16P2FdsPpuAzqbSup5awxVEjaKO6DoWR5LnEVJeFCr0xT-GMO6X6K65VsEspzyz0TcAgYKCtPvjBT_KMdUyzgOHzBQy3VJZXcv_wdH_wePCWq2T98-AQODetMHJekcOPWn7XYrfwHQAA__-tHnQI) was born in Zavalla. He is credited with shooting down 14 Japanese aircraft during World War II, and he was awarded both the Navy Cross and the Distinguished Flying Cross. After the war, he flew for the Navy's Blue Angels aerial demonstration team. Going through Austin on I-35 can be a risky proposition. Check out [this video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DGchuA_YEDjYh-5tuiBrcDC0ZG9keGG6_mrnCVyUVlOpJ79_P9IPsOTz_4k62vNc4Bbqyp1IoTRxOzHzSTujv-fXcYsqUt0gTCOgbCY2EySH7e-pqZ2fhHrImK_XQ950wj6HerBxIOwM9KSHQkJGzXJWGRZrHshLpmu3nTMInQirVrppQ46wQVCeNwaoT5LjE1JaNCr0xr_6OJ6V2iXvt7VbKkSv1p4KxgvG6rna_MwYMJQaOn1EFo-eVcrk9VTBiKrx8G6u-wVcuHJoZXeMSn5RyAxJU14Nsj-2ok3XHxd5zHnTVieeO7L_k8jtfp4X_AQAA___fsIAO) if you aren't convinced. If you’ve ever wished you could get in on a Lucasfilm-level opportunity before the rest of the world caught on, today's sponsor, [Elf Labs](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnTAQhZ_GdCD_YlO4iLS63aZNaQ14AEs2INvA3reP2ER5gWi6841mjr5fn-4TQgzb8hMS2vo1727Du0SsFbML2wUlXJgQ4ns8l3XPBcu6o-OUq5bxlnHnIcS3k423I_UDa9Ay3SslqRn6ZrVMTXowXjI9j4wqhYzr2cuRTUpM0vgm2OcY489QJkQ3awQNowAuJDMGiKToQ91zV1es-AVlju_9wtxNe2qiXWs9ChE_CH8R_rrvu8M4RxjLw59QvM6aXNnPPCERH5ggRML7J0zow5mI-Dgg-PaAXDfMZQ3HXz5BOiAs2_fGP8gMbSXV7o-AcwsVnBhML3suFTdNtv64Q4yh9JpIujwPv8vW_1N8Wf47AAD__z6pkGM) may be the rare early-stage entertainment deal everyday investors actually get to access.

## Paxton Expands Lawsuits Against Dallas Docs
Attorney General Ken Paxton has [expanded lawsuits](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_upCAUhZ8GO4zgH5yCYhq72WaLLc1VLkKCMIGrzrz9xt1H-OWU5-TLyffnNb_ABx-3X7Cjpo9Nc8SrBCTCPPt4QvEn7gjhuxybS7lgcQln2cieC8mFnA348J27yuilMQ9RoRZq6PuuGR9D5bTExo4WrFH9OJpWKiPssjwE2G5QoFTl9Q0T8k4j2ra2CkHB0oJsOzGOwLoGjaeUa3JI-IFiwzedmOs17VXQjuhdWPtkcmJyuq6r3ku8OyYnjPwoTE4OIZBjckrkMDM5veFDKfLVExZuMxyG-8gpQyz8_5ivkJEHuMrhqXDYwMdC3EAIULhJK6V8oyHz51P8HlZ4VVmb9-VD8GVQrGu2HXz495J-5vbU8m8AAAD__yCjkRY) against two Dallas doctors accused of prescribing cross-sex hormones for minors in violation of state law, alleging they fraudulently billed Medicaid for the illegal treatments. Paxton [sued](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFvszAQhn-N2YjsM5hk8BApyvctqSp16IhsfIAlgyP7QmDpb6-COnarbnje4bnT6f28tTfjg5-HNzOhprWP7YzPHJAIU-vnxWS_4IQmbPYxjDFlzGPEFjjUpYBSQOuMD1tbFU5b7k6iQC0aVdcVP55UMeoarZIWGqcaYbiSnbKyRstBoOikcoXXr2MCXsOFlIe-QdMYKw3IShyPhlUcnaeYDjQi4WpyH7a4YDp0cSqCHonumckzgyuD6y8Og2s29EjObGXsKFpMpTiVwKHadyST5y8mz4QrMXl5NyvFmUEN_OOBeQ-X2O3sY9r5zy9-Hvb4P6Ypzj8exR03P8eUi6Td_elD8Fk1rOLDZHzYn6a_Vb1o-A4AAP__rzePxQ) Dr. May Lau and Dr. M. Brett Cooper last fall, alleging they administered "gender transition" drugs to dozens of children. Lau surrendered her license earlier this year and moved to Oregon. In recent filings, Paxton accuses the doctors of falsifying patient records and using [altered diagnosis codes](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULGShCAU-xrtcABRsaC4xm6vvdJ5ykOYQ9gBVt2_v3F_4SZNiiST5OcxP8B5F7Zv2FGVy8Q54Jk9loJpduGA7A7cEfx7eW02pozZRpw55R1hnDA-a3D-PYtaq4XqkdWo2NB3naBy7GurtFhWKejayY7qdlzZooU0mmtJKYxLXzt1hzF-g7K2bcyAMMDSAm8FkxIqQVG7ElNTLBa8IBv_jgemZo177ZUt5Zmr9qviU8Wn8zwbEy9xz7gFFZ9uWvHpYyU6riWmTDYMGhMBY1zaXdiIRfDFrpCQmAQvTTyc-eUK-cVAnnCVGOqk9PN03rvcD5Wg2w7Of1qU_313KP4XAAD__0bEhyo) to get reimbursed by Medicaid for the treatments. He is seeking three times the amount of the alleged fraud. "_What these radicals were doing was evil, and I will pursue every available legal tool to stop and punish this cruel child abuse_ ," [Paxton said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAMhk9jdwxs-ZGkULGNu9l2S4O2aIsALQUik0luv_BcYfC3_wvfv6_5C1k47X_xIG_vLc-JvlXIjMrM6YXKLzoI5bM895iLksZMs2vcAK2D1s0BWT5zXwe_NOHe1uTb6zgMfXO7j3X05NC169ZRCLjgOAzrEPpwd_2Cy21Yxpr9Wda6U03bdZftSnjFpUPX9e3thlXfUGDL5WKRjN6om3zyi8plzUctPpo9tOr-VG6q3BRQBJXej0Kqp6NykxoaVW76CQOa5ZLoAzslKiiwsZDCxkUNOEFC45wgEorFFQvBVvAZYEUlhXMYWIR2FFgjSwArmHSnFKhAKM8drBDaQcm0clNdfHh8swjreK36Zj-Q5ee6_Q74y7v_AQAA___FBZvu) in an announcement. "_Any fraudulent scheme to steal hardworking Texans' taxpayer dollars will be stopped and repaid in full_."
## Galveston County Sheriff Disciplined
Galveston County Sheriff Jimmy Fullen was [disciplined on Wednesday](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8GdyeC4584BUUad3ebLba0IBxiIgwRB9vXb7_KfYWraUYaaTTz_fuav0yIIT3_mJV0_fZ5TnRwpFqpzCHthsNOK5l42u255MLES6YZJfagEBTOzoR4zl3jtJXuphrS6jr0fSfH29As2t96S37wxsu-G3rVeWmpRXsbx0GiwiboT5nCj6Rq24u_krka2xpsOzWORnSSXKi5XOpClb4N-3jmncrlkdcm6qXWN4v2LnASOB3HcVk5fTKBEyXYWOD0OSVw-vFPE3fimhM88pbqCbxQCd7DK6zrCX6LkRIwxPCgxAS88ZuSIwd2q7AEhle2cOQEFSyB8Z4elZzAyRS439XfobzuTdHufYQYAw9X0cnnakL8GVx_h3nX-D8AAP__xB2UVA) by the Texas Commission on Law Enforcement after it determined Fullen did not include information about his criminal history and disciplinary complaints when he applied to obtain his peace officer license. Fullen was accused of assaulting a man with a baseball bat in 1982, fired from the Electra Police Department in 1989, and sued the Galveston ISD Police Department in 2007, alleging reverse discrimination. In June 2024, the commission’s executive director recommended revoking Fullen’s license, but no action was taken before the election, which Fullen [handily won](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOpTAQRL_GZB7hNuYREGxCNptuiBq7Db3yA2EPd_j71Z1fWFVYUtXR-fO5fiIHTvtvjDTXb5_XRK8SqFa6Vk43Fr4pEoZn-9qPfBUqR6YVWjBSgVSwOuTwrF3j5q11k2poVkNvTNeOU98cMxrwyox6GtRknBnJK2xBd2NvHBqyDc_vMQXvtErrDz8QDrhpBN2pcUTRteS45uujHlTpG4sPT77p-rA5NmE-aj2L0L8ELAIW3KzS70bAcuZSBSw7hptKzUna_JXqI8tBF3svs_dsGUN4pONi-QycyMmfD2lzjFwK5yQDviQlny9LkVKVKUuOJ9oq_-ZNBtoxyEoYZcGnCFjUCIOGfhKwNNfszheHwKUfRNfuETn8gNf_033P8C8AAP__naCXTw). Since 2023, sheriffs elected in Texas have been required to hold a peace officer license, but state law prohibits revoking the license of an elected official. In accordance with a [mediated agreement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAMx08TuoyICQNTUGxD97bdEhkwibUheSIeGG6_yl7hyZIlSz_5__Hna_pCDhzdb9xpkM-WpkhXDiRCx8TxxMwn7YThnt_OpyNT9okmqKHVBrSBaUUO92SrdZjr9WUqGkz3bFtb969n5QfzqsGaGW03W9ion5_z2r7Qdk279EBbxUN5ZqBMbZrmsXWEHc4NQmNN36OyNa0s6XiIJ6EP5i3c6aTjsaS9CoMX-c6q-aVgVDBe1_VYAi9_wad3lhQLpWAssRSMHE_Kwg6FylmkFYwGyjIKRoehACnqJb2j3Dp7OnjbNMU160AOg55RJJC-WLwOvFDMHJ1GR3G5FYzVMazfF4fA-dkpW7sdOfz3Kj9r-BzgXwAAAP__S8CR5A), the commission voted to issue a six-month suspension of Fullen's license but backdate it to last year, resulting in no impact to Fullen's job.
## New Invasive Pest Confirmed
A new invasive pest is threatening the Texas livestock industry. The pasture mealybug, or _Helicococcus summervillei_ , has been confirmed in [at least 21 counties](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMpDdNn-Bg03IZtMNUTNuBksGI7sHhtuvGOmd4KmzVqmqvvr3GB_og99ef3Ely585jhudORAzpdFvB2Z_0EoYrun9WmLKlJdII0ioSwWlgtGhD9doCmcn6XpVkFVtU9dGdn1TLJa6yWmtGtKz6p-STKtqA3U3m7npG0OFt7eZgvuk0rqaW8IWJ42gjeo6FEaS8xxTxQsxfTDP4YoHpeoZ1yLYhXnPQv8RMAgYzvOs1ivjhhvHzcdbJGAIfqbMVyABQ3yzizFlAQMm9s_vc8fM70TlD2t5wzvK5TexBAW6lQqqfdmLZN1--hB8blph5GtFH75l-HcTHhb-BwAA___8bYev), marking its first appearance in North America. The small, fuzzy white insect feeds on grasses commonly used as livestock feed. Its saliva is toxic, and its waste promotes fungal growth, hindering photosynthesis. There is [no known treatment](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDuOwyAUPI3dYcHD34JiG3fZdkvrOTxsJAwREJPs6VfOFVZTTDMfzfzclhtaZ_32jQep_DJh8VSSo5wpLtafmOxJB6F7r89tDzFR2gMtwKFjApiARaN176WttVq5nkRNSgx917V8nPp6VwKmEQytehqlxGHotYFO8GkFyZH3VFt1hQm4wIWUjRkIB1wlgmzFOGLVctI2h9jknTK9MBn3DifF5h6O2qk950eq5FcFcwVzKaUx4QX9Hp4pB3-JKpivVRXMHzsLxti7RZdYweiZp8LW58ZsYnmPhJm89RvbIv5e7NDrOir9KNY5m_qhavl2oHWf_vy_104FfwEAAP__VJWD8A) for the pest, which thrives in hot, humid environments and burrows in the soil during cold weather. The pasture mealybug was first [described in 1928](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMV2Qv8CkcHEbutx2SzSJxzCSwZE9kPD2q6y0T7A6_U86_6_bdANKtM3_YUXP75inDV81ITOWibYDKh24IqTzvs9LLhXrknHSUncXpS9KTwEonZNtgr_LcFUNeuX6rrNyuPbN4q26WgjGOYgPdCY6NwwGO-dQBt33fUP-gyn9mVTGtNEhOLgb0MaqYQBhJQbiXFpekPENNaYzH1jaR16b5BfmZxXmn9Cj0CPMhRJFxDfjVilvLcO6txh2occnVN4LXn4PCT02xYfni1Ki2jth5bwCpR-Z_9bj8Po7AAD__-NRdf8) in Australia, and it has "devastated millions of acres of grazing land there," according to an alert issued by Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller. "_This is a completely new pest to our continent, and Texas is once again on the front lines_ ," [Miller said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAQQL8GO25gRMWCYhu6t-2WZsDxSpYrBlDf_fuNN3lfsJluTnIyZ_58TV8YYtiev_FFpn4vadroKpFqpTyF7cQSTnoRxrc7nmvKhcqaaAIBHZfAJUwzhvieVDMbJ-ZRNmTk0HedEnrsm9V0KMlrqUmNfgEvnJuFXEANNA5d63QTzC2TcI-QbftYBsIBXYvQKqk1MiVoDjXlR12p0jeWJb7TSfnh06uJZq11L6z9xcAysNd1Pf6u6bghA4u5Bh-Jgb27GNiYPEYG9iNiYH8aednJByo8bPzD-I6lHpn4Tz3HZw7-iPeSgQXd8XEUevb9wiVpx5Vuez4OIDgu2KGg3mlUTTbzfoUYQ-kHpsTzhSF-Tq__9_DTwL8AAAD__6a1lSE). "_If the pasture mealybug spreads across Texas grazing lands like it has in eastern Australia, it could cost Texas agriculture dearly in lost productivity and reduced livestock capacity_."

Galveston County Sheriff Disciplined Galveston County Sheriff Jimmy Fullen was by the Texas Commission on Law Enforcement after it determined Fullen did not include information about his criminal history and disciplinary complaints when he applied to obtain his peace officer license. Fullen was accused of assaulting a man with a baseball bat in 1982, fired from the Electra Police Department in 1989, and sued the Galveston ISD Police Department in 2007, alleging reverse discrimination. In June 2024, the commission’s executive director recommended revoking Fullen’s license, but no action was taken before the election, which Fullen . Since 2023, sheriffs elected in Texas have been required to hold a peace officer license, but state law prohibits revoking the license of an elected official. In accordance with a , the commission voted to issue a six-month suspension of Fullen's license but backdate it to last year, resulting in no impact to Fullen's job. New Invasive Pest Confirmed A new invasive pest is threatening the Texas livestock industry. The pasture mealybug, or Helicococcus summervillei , has been confirmed in , marking its first appearance in North America. The small, fuzzy white insect feeds on grasses commonly used as livestock feed. Its saliva is toxic, and its waste promotes fungal growth, hindering photosynthesis. There is for the pest, which thrives in hot, humid environments and burrows in the soil during cold weather. The pasture mealybug was first in Australia, and it has "devastated millions of acres of grazing land there," according to an alert issued by Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller. "This is a completely new pest to our continent, and Texas is once again on the front lines ," . subject: Portland Launches Review of Inclusionary Zoning as Developers Say Rules Are Stalling New Housing Projects
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Portland Launches Review of Inclusionary Zoning as Developers Say Rules Are Stalling New Housing Projects (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=adf9c25939&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Dec 12, 2025 06:56 am
Portland city officials have hired a national consulting firm to review the city’s 10-year-old inclusionary zoning ordinance amid growing criticism from developers who contend the requirements are contributing to stalled housing projects. The Planning and Urban Development Department selected CZB LLC earlier this month to conduct a comprehensive analysis of the ordinance, which currently requires [...]

name: Breaking:
subject: Court coup — MAGA seizes permanent control of Arkansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Overnight, Arkansas just enshrined one party rule. They have lost the last vestiges of their democracy. Full stop.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O-GhZ6mggKfyACUj8kLUmjhx216bj4zB485xGYlWi9LkeYithw3W341kWxI6xfJm-KmiewkyC6RU3yGmzO_cAsnxJXqBtPjZO3s3ZKKMmjBCcxVYY7daCGwAsdaeF0M-PmHsiZiPmCWSK9Swm9jU2ipmPXOpj5hWwvEws57wRL-UjxRPJnWO-i8vDwqCINipSTQP0GoULu83-NnQ7ys82aJOk_t22Fo0cFJLKK1Ocnxrtv9-OvDHJw==&c=oGCTQ1IwZ6F1zeXLoylhqqIqKWTf_79hxWXpBD9puw0HUJTpM5Bs2g==&ch=1qqoxBIH8HBayrtAUvRbzc0Q4WieSHznO7lmDJgACBCd8dTXyELKpQ==)
---
| Peter,
Much like the concerned scientist in the disaster movie whose dire warnings fall on deaf ears --
Defend our Courts has been working desperately for the last seven months to inform the voting public about MAGA's alarming plan to take over critical state courts across America.
Now we've just received a soulcrushing example of what happens when we lose one of these courts to the far-right:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O-GhZ6mggKfyACUj8kLUmjhx216bj4zB485xGYlWi9LkeYithw3W341kWxI6xfJm-KmiewkyC6RU3yGmzO_cAsnxJXqBtPjZO3s3ZKKMmjBCcxVYY7daCGwAsdaeF0M-PmHsiZiPmCWSK9Swm9jU2ipmPXOpj5hWwvEws57wRL-UjxRPJnWO-i8vDwqCINipSTQP0GoULu83-NnQ7ys82aJOk_t22Fo0V0ip5GG42VZMsnEn5tMHsA==&c=oGCTQ1IwZ6F1zeXLoylhqqIqKWTf_79hxWXpBD9puw0HUJTpM5Bs2g==&ch=1qqoxBIH8HBayrtAUvRbzc0Q4WieSHznO7lmDJgACBCd8dTXyELKpQ==)
---
The Arkansas State Supreme Court just gave the Republican state legislature a green light to kill any constitutional amendment passed by voters.
As the Arkansas Times eloquently puts it:
"Even when Arkansans manage the Herculean task of collecting tens of thousands of signatures and jumping through the myriad hoops Republicans have placed in the path of a constitutional amendment reaching the ballot, the Legislature can simply change or reverse that measure."
If voters were to pass an amendment to loosen Arkansas's near-total ban on abortions, state lawmakers could simply undo it after the fact. Every person in Arkansas could vote to save abortion and it wouldn't matter. Arkansas just lost its democracy. Full stop.
This is what is at stake if MAGA takes your local State Supreme Court. Overnight they can enshrine one party MAGA rule, implement redistricting, and rule that your votes no longer matter as Arkansas' Supreme Court just did.
While it's too late for Arkansas there is time to save courts in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia where MAGA is working overtime to seize their courts. [Everything is on the line but sadly state courts are a hard issue to get donors to care about. We need your support to protect them. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us defend these key swing state courts?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O-GhZ6mggKfyACUj8kLUmjhx216bj4zB485xGYlWi9LkeYithw3W341kWxI6xfJmJ7_lgFP4E8sCZJyNe2yC57cnzB7In53UWSKNccCyTp3QHbkEmAT-kLKF-Yfz-mfHm9D0WV8nCstTvKCXieG_aeHjDWbGJuVh41CKnVcmG-IZ6Fn5QjNFupo1MKgLrdslq-0AZt_Urr5kgeMgnkNxiPlCd_vb_J5mgUcmxW8ZjJs_OBoEjlbvPbJ5nIZtUC5g&c=oGCTQ1IwZ6F1zeXLoylhqqIqKWTf_79hxWXpBD9puw0HUJTpM5Bs2g==&ch=1qqoxBIH8HBayrtAUvRbzc0Q4WieSHznO7lmDJgACBCd8dTXyELKpQ==)

clean_body: Overnight, Arkansas just enshrined one party rule. They have lost the last vestiges of their democracy. Full stop. | | | | | == | Peter, Much like the concerned scientist in the disaster movie whose dire warnings fall on deaf ears -- Defend our Courts has been working desperately for the last seven months to inform the voting public about MAGA's alarming plan to take over critical state courts across America. Now we've just received a soulcrushing example of what happens when we lose one of these courts to the far-right: | == The Arkansas State Supreme Court just gave the Republican state legislature a green light to kill any constitutional amendment passed by voters. As the Arkansas Times eloquently puts it: "Even when Arkansans manage the Herculean task of collecting tens of thousands of signatures and jumping through the myriad hoops Republicans have placed in the path of a constitutional amendment reaching the ballot, the Legislature can simply change or reverse that measure." If voters were to pass an amendment to loosen Arkansas's near-total ban on abortions, state lawmakers could simply undo it after the fact. Every person in Arkansas could vote to save abortion and it wouldn't matter. Arkansas just lost its democracy. Full stop. This is what is at stake if MAGA takes your local State Supreme Court. Overnight they can enshrine one party MAGA rule, implement redistricting, and rule that your votes no longer matter as Arkansas' Supreme Court just did. While it's too late for Arkansas there is time to save courts in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia where MAGA is working overtime to seize their courts. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | We cannot allow for more states to follow Arkansas' lead. This is the frontline of the fight for American democracy. -- Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Friends, here’s what I’ve already done for South Carolina and America:

** _That is why I have taken action and I’ve received an A+ Rating from NumbersUSA_** \- a TOP TEN member of Congress for fighting illegal immigration - because they know I’ll fight to the end to protect our communities.
If you want to come to America, do it legally. [It’s the right thing to do and it’s the law!](https://cgnb9.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsGQ0tR9YEcJBGQIcnCwel/5hNCdIykUZ75)

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: It’d mean a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
At the end of this month, Jon’s reelection campaign is facing our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year and the most important one of our entire campaign so far.
But before we ask you to make a contribution, we want to say a few words about what this means for our campaign.
**First of all, we are building a path to win.**
As you read this, we are in the process of organizing the most ambitious statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. We’re building, and we’ve got to keep building bigger and faster every day.
But our growing campaign is attracting the attention of Trump, MAGA, and the entire National Republican apparatus. They’re already spending millions of dollars attacking Jon and trying to slow our momentum.
To keep up, we need a lot of individual contributions between now and our FEC deadline at the end of the month. Not only because that is how we are funding this campaign, but because each one sends a powerful message about the strength of the movement we’re building here in Georgia.
[**Can you please contribute to Jon’s campaign today? It’d mean a lot to have your support, especially before our FEC deadline at the end of the month.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=1&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.UdqSSd&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=20&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.3llSsh&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=21&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.bGqFYH&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=22&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.IZ7DFn&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=23&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.pWvP31&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=24&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.PyZHDd&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=25&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**
---
****
Remember, we’re not just taking on whoever ends up winning the GOP primary. We’re also taking on Trump, MAGA, shady Super PACs, and the entire Washington Republican establishment.
We can beat them all — _just like we did in 2021_ — but Jon can’t do it alone.
That’s why we’re so glad to have you on our team.
Thank you again for your support.
Team Ossoff
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251212-1-f-b&t=26&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=27&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1252%2E5691347%2E7MIiz8) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: Your gift saves lives and shares the gospel
body:
For nearly two decades, PreBorn! has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykUU2L3DAM_TXKbYZYjp2dQw7DhpRCt-xpewxaR5Mx-AvbSem_LynZX1B0kfQeTx_v19v8RtbZsP4kz4PZ7ZzL_CduebWPWmjn4uzOhcJSnpRnbFFdBF4EHrwQU-bPmMMsmmUwi5bY8CB6rVSHuntpngMLki0qvPWkWvlAJNVLoWkRrTBCPBo7HJoCj5CtVNfuxmyY-s_-5aaYCLp2SwtVLlcTQ-G8U7U72xDikcVwNdE3bnjWmgrIO-AEOK125-u53UEAnM4KcKKUmFwBORUDcny9_xAtqm_vgJp8BTkqDajXAnIkBtRb9XOJWzYMckw5lsSm2rCekOfFbh7kyJ6sO5uGfCK7BpCjIcdhofyFxFA5HGM-cH6_X14_vl--ftDkYUm_rXO26B66dj0U_x1Y_8ecfcC_AQAA__8FoqG_)
---
Hi Advocate for Life, For nearly two decades, **PreBorn!** has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation. We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis **see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds** , and we offer **gospel-centered, compassionate care** at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can't do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child's heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith.

A tiny miracle begins the story of a mighty future.

Hope breaks through the darkness. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and shares the love of Christ with a woman in need. As our thank-you for your gift, you'll receive the [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures 2026 Calendar_**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykUU2L3DAM_TXKbYZYjp2dQw7DhpRCt-xpewxaR5Mx-AvbSem_LynZX1B0kfQeTx_v19v8RtbZsP4kz4PZ7ZzL_CduebWPWmjn4uzOhcJSnpRnbFFdBF4EHrwQU-bPmMMsmmUwi5bY8CB6rVSHuntpngMLki0qvPWkWvlAJNVLoWkRrTBCPBo7HJoCj5CtVNfuxmyY-s_-5aaYCLp2SwtVLlcTQ-G8U7U72xDikcVwNdE3bnjWmgrIO-AEOK125-u53UEAnM4KcKKUmFwBORUDcny9_xAtqm_vgJp8BTkqDajXAnIkBtRb9XOJWzYMckw5lsSm2rCekOfFbh7kyJ6sO5uGfCK7BpCjIcdhofyFxFA5HGM-cH6_X14_vl--ftDkYUm_rXO26B66dj0U_x1Y_8ecfcC_AQAA__8FoqG_) __ filled with **scripture and a monthly prayer guide** to help you lift up mothers, babies, and the ministry of PreBorn! all year long in prayer.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykUU2L3DAM_TXKbYZYjp2dQw7DhpRCt-xpewxaR5Mx-AvbSem_LynZX1B0kfQeTx_v19v8RtbZsP4kz4PZ7ZzL_CduebWPWmjn4uzOhcJSnpRnbFFdBF4EHrwQU-bPmMMsmmUwi5bY8CB6rVSHuntpngMLki0qvPWkWvlAJNVLoWkRrTBCPBo7HJoCj5CtVNfuxmyY-s_-5aaYCLp2SwtVLlcTQ-G8U7U72xDikcVwNdE3bnjWmgrIO-AEOK125-u53UEAnM4KcKKUmFwBORUDcny9_xAtqm_vgJp8BTkqDajXAnIkBtRb9XOJWzYMckw5lsSm2rCekOfFbh7kyJ6sO5uGfCK7BpCjIcdhofyFxFA5HGM-cH6_X14_vl--ftDkYUm_rXO26B66dj0U_x1Y_8ecfcC_AQAA__8FoqG_)
---
Calendars are limited during this busy year-end season, so give now to **save a baby, share the gospel, and celebrate the gift of life**.
---
[**Give $28 + Get Your Calendar**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykUU2L3DAM_TXKbYZYjp2dQw7DhpRCt-xpewxaR5Mx-AvbSem_LynZX1B0kfQeTx_v19v8RtbZsP4kz4PZ7ZzL_CduebWPWmjn4uzOhcJSnpRnbFFdBF4EHrwQU-bPmMMsmmUwi5bY8CB6rVSHuntpngMLki0qvPWkWvlAJNVLoWkRrTBCPBo7HJoCj5CtVNfuxmyY-s_-5aaYCLp2SwtVLlcTQ-G8U7U72xDikcVwNdE3bnjWmgrIO-AEOK125-u53UEAnM4KcKKUmFwBORUDcny9_xAtqm_vgJp8BTkqDajXAnIkBtRb9XOJWzYMckw5lsSm2rCekOfFbh7kyJ6sO5uGfCK7BpCjIcdhofyFxFA5HGM-cH6_X14_vl--ftDkYUm_rXO26B66dj0U_x1Y_8ecfcC_AQAA__8FoqG_)

We can't wait to hear from you! Gratefully, The PreBorn! Team

We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds , and we offer gospel-centered, compassionate care at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can't do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child's heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | NASA fought to bury Armstrong’s most chilling revelation. But one reckless slip shattered their defenses, unleashing the hidden recording across the internet. Armstrong’s own words, trapped for decades, now ignite global fear and suspicion—exposing secrets too shocking to silence. This warning audio sends tremors through science and power, forcing everyone to question what really happened on the moon. The hidden truth is out—urgent, electrifying, and impossible to ignore. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | NASA deployed | Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. clean_body: It’s official... I’m not going down without a FIGHT! | Dear Friend, No pardon. No lifeline. The Left thinks they finally got me. I’m being put on TRIAL by a vengeful, bloodthirsty Democrat Attorney General who wants to throw me in prison for 20 YEARS. And because it’s in state court, a federal pardon from the President is powerless! But it’s not in my blood to cower or surrender. I will always FIGHT! That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s ongoing legal warfare against me. Today, I am asking you to become an Honorary Founding Member and help me marshal the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team to win this battle and WALK FREE! When my trial ends and the jury reads those two powerful words of my verdict... “NOT GUILTY!” ...I will know exactly who to thank: the kind souls like YOU who stood by my side on Day One to fight this grave injustice. As the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... But that’s no longer the case! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses. Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! The situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Defense Trust as an Honorary Founding Member. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust | 3300 S Dixie Hwy West Palm Beach, FL 33405 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

MAGA knows they are going to lose the upcoming 2026 midterms so they are crossing every political rubicon to force through the new maps that will save the GOP house majority.
And soon the Supreme Court will rule on revoking a key provision of the Voting Rights Act which ensures that minorities get equal representation. If it is struck down, MAGA will get 19 new congressional seats.
This is the inflexion point of American democracy. The end times. Democrats have a matter of months to counter before MAGA redistricts every red state and establishes an invulnerable House majority. Blue states California and Virginia have passed new maps but will others follow?
Fair Fight Colorado is bringing CO into this fight with the introduction of a ballot measure that gives voters the chance to vote on a new map to level the playing field -- making Colorado bluer and erasing up to 3 GOP congressional districts.
Victory is by no means assured. The race to pass our initiative will be among the most contested in the country and MAGA is ready to launch an all out war to stop it. clean_body: Anonymous 911 calls to get SWAT teams sent to lawmakers homes. Threats to revoke all state funding. | | | | | == Peter, Pipe bomb threats. I know where you live pizza deliveries. Anonymous 911 calls to get SWAT teams sent to lawmakers homes. Threats to revoke all state funding. This is the all out assault that entrenched Indiana GOP lawmakers have faced as the Trump administration attempts to force them to budge on redistricting. | == MAGA knows they are going to lose the upcoming 2026 midterms so they are crossing every political rubicon to force through the new maps that will save the GOP house majority. And soon the Supreme Court will rule on revoking a key provision of the Voting Rights Act which ensures that minorities get equal representation. If it is struck down, MAGA will get 19 new congressional seats. This is the inflexion point of American democracy. The end times. Democrats have a matter of months to counter before MAGA redistricts every red state and establishes an invulnerable House majority. Blue states California and Virginia have passed new maps but will others follow? Fair Fight Colorado is bringing CO into this fight with the introduction of a ballot measure that gives voters the chance to vote on a new map to level the playing field -- making Colorado bluer and erasing up to 3 GOP congressional districts. Victory is by no means assured. The race to pass our initiative will be among the most contested in the country and MAGA is ready to launch an all out war to stop it. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == What will we tell our grandchildren we did at this turning point? Too many full-time workers are living in poverty and are forced to survive on wages that don’t cover necessities like food, rent, health care, or child care. Unfortunately, wages haven’t kept up with the cost of living in decades. Families are working harder than ever but falling further behind, while corporations and the wealthy continue to reap the rewards of that labor. **It’s time for Congress to act to raise the federal minimum wage above $7.25 an hour.** We need to raise the minimum wage that keeps up with today’s economy, honors the dignity of work, and ensures every worker can build a stable life for themselves and their families. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: JUST FILED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
It’s official... I’m not going down without a FIGHT!
It’s official... I’m not going down without a FIGHT!
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8101457/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvN0RSR0dHZ3NicA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTI/LbmNsTWxyU0cxSw/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRHFtdUJLeHZscw/gaTwlDQ/s8m842635b8)

| Dear Patriot,
---
_No pardon. No lifeline._ The Left thinks they finally got me.
---
_I’m being put on TRIAL by a vengeful, bloodthirsty Democrat Attorney General who wants to throw me in prison for 20 YEARS._
---
And because it’s in _state_ court, a _federal_ pardon from the President is _powerless_!
---
**But it’s not in my blood to cower or surrender. I will _always_ FIGHT!**
---
That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me **_more power_** to fight the Left’s ongoing legal warfare against me.
---
Today, I am asking you to become an Honorary Founding Member and help me marshal the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team to win this battle and WALK _FREE_!
---
When my trial ends and the jury reads those two powerful words of my verdict... **_“NOT GUILTY!”_** ...I will know _exactly_ who to thank: _the kind souls like _YOU_ who stood by my side on Day One to fight this grave injustice. _
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
[**Please make a contribution to my brand new “Rudy Defense Trust” – and accept your Honorary Founding Membership to ensure I can BEAT the Left’s lawfare and walk FREE.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[ACCEPT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

As the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_But that’s no longer the case!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses. _**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY.**
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Defense Trust as an __Honorary Founding Member__.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the “Rudy Defense Trust” and become an Honorary Founding Member to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Haley S.
subject: null, I wanted to personally reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This will only take a minute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)
| Hi, null! It's Haley.
---
I wanted to personally reach out because I noticed you haven't had the chance to fill out my priorities survey.
Would you do me a huge favor and take 60 seconds to fill it out now? The tech team did some wizardry and made you a personalized link: **[surveys.signforgood.com/Stevens-Priorities-Survey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10277?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)**
Listening to regular folks is one of the most important – and fun! – parts of this campaign, so I'd love to hear from you.
Thanks so much, null.
Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I want to hear from you
| | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10278?t=3&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10277?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my December Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10277?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10277?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 60 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10277?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10279?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10278?t=9&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=1613%2E49239%2E0nYjIj)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

Peter,

Yesterday, Secretary Kristi Noem, under oath, claimed she never deported any veterans. **Seth challenged her with the story of one veteran she deported, exposing her dishonesty and the need for accountability.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121130022/588457641/351729269?source=EM_NBI_SM_20251212_PT_KristiNoem_0_3MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmIzNDRiYy02OGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AelDsxGP_PZye3PNZhQ41W5_AnQ3OGTFHNBoQkSz62I=&emci=c3dc3dc7-67d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=1fb344bc-68d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=15384964) The Trump Administration claimed it would go after the “worst of the worst.” But instead, they are deporting veterans, kids with cancer, and U.S. citizens. **We need to tell these stories and hold Secretary Noem and the entire Administration accountable.**

This is why Seth introduced Noem to a combat veteran she deported to Korea, and why he continues to fight back against these injustices. Supporting him shows your commitment to justice and those who served.

Seth is working to expose this Administration’s lies, like the one Noem told the American people yesterday, and we need to have his back while he does it.
