name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: Only days left
body:
My name is Lauren Toncich — and for the past seven years, I’ve helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

| | |
---
| | Hi Friend,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zctp4gr6b7kggadho0v15o7tp3c6cbhk59vt0dl0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clhm1pr6c9h2bs)
---
_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsqn1ctgb8sl5o2k48qb4nlokng2m2nppbai89o_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clhm1pr6c9h2bs)
---
This year's AmFest?

_I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. _

**Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. **

**And we only have a few days left to get them in. **

Friend, these students aren't looking for entertainment...

They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to.

They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors.

Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse.

**They want to stand for America... _They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. _**

And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives.

Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbk8lcau3h17cd4ep84o5dm8j97fbavlpd0i9b2g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clhm1pr6c9h2bs)
---
They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly.

They're trained to fight -- and win.

Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into.

**Friend, that 's where you can make a difference. **

**Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. **

That means:

🔥 $50 sends TWO students
🔥 $100 sends FOUR
🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more.

**[You can be the reason a future leader walks into AmFest this December-- instead of staying home wondering if they're alone in this fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6e4t87o8msl8k5c3rtca4d86lke7r2trlupg420_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clhm1pr6c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7cpska918o8lvf3d5jvert38oq1h5j2rfukh3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clhm1pr6c9h2bs)
---
Every year, I see it firsthand:

Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight.

They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling.

I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office.

Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything.

_So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." _

**I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. **

[**A young patriot who could be the next leader, the next fighter, the next firebrand that helps save this country.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zca2hhrch6m84o6f4l82na3g62jjefhtm5n3i1u0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5clhm1pr6c9h2bs)

---
Friend, I know what Charlie would want right now.

He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire.

He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks.

Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves.

To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. .

Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December.

**Lauren Toncich **

clean_body: My name is Lauren Toncich — and for the past seven years, I’ve helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. | | | | | Hi Friend, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Friend, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Friend, that 's where you can make a difference. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: What’s going on in CO has real potential to turn violent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Calls for a military raid against a CO prison. Trump has thrown down the gauntlet and is setting off a full blown constitutional crisis.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z0CVOhM-A4PmYSYcNCS_yPvvbSnEl-XPF64i7Mvg1RwCqC4ht55iSLYuRxhDQBAsbO1xmvWV6oidW6y-oc9U7aNn1jMQcsKSF7_gS-VL3UaBn1ul4Rqd_lFpGiZzHHAt4oopdclsFwXZBUBSRlIPvoq8wX_rC7qo6pMjCoHUXt0hP-tRcIlxZtFsosM1XI2WqeLCqRUM7ikQUzvapNoZQAa45nFEktUR&c=_dxRURxojqHJ6bj6J_d6AQOdw87Q250mcpDw5kp-WHI5mmlrNSa_nw==&ch=nJiNwIemszrRlCmzJtRYojoteAx8UtvxILgJydNxJoMGubvbgL0P-w==)
---
|

Peter,
What's unfolding in Colorado right now has the real potential of turning violent.
Trump just pardoned Tina Peters, a former Mesa Colorado county clerk serving a nine year state sentence for letting unauthorized operatives access voting machines in an attempt to prop up Trump's 2020 election lie.
Presidents do not have the power to pardon state crimes. Trump did it anyway and has thrown down the gauntlet setting off a full blown Constitutional crisis.
Colorado is refusing to comply. And now Peter's lawyers are openly calling for Trump to order a military raid to break her out of state custody. And right at the center of this chaos? Lauren Boebert.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z0CVOhM-A4PmYSYcNCS_yPvvbSnEl-XPF64i7Mvg1RwCqC4ht55iSLYuRxhDQBAsbO1xmvWV6oidW6y-oc9U7aNn1jMQcsKSF7_gS-VL3UaBn1ul4Rqd_lFpGiZzHHAt4oopdclsFwXZBUBSRlIPvoq8wX_rC7qo6pMjCoHUXt0hP-tRcIlxZtFsosM1XI2WqeLCqRUM7ilDo0StYXVxdPz4JR-nHPCe&c=_dxRURxojqHJ6bj6J_d6AQOdw87Q250mcpDw5kp-WHI5mmlrNSa_nw==&ch=nJiNwIemszrRlCmzJtRYojoteAx8UtvxILgJydNxJoMGubvbgL0P-w==)
---
She is leading the charge to free Peters and is pouring gasoline on a situation that has the real potential to spiral into violence.
It gets worse.
MAGA extremist podcaster--Joe Oltmann, a key Boebert ally, resident of her district, and fundraiser for her --has publicly called for the execution of Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser for not releasing Peters.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z0CVOhM-A4PmYSYcNCS_yPvvbSnEl-XPF64i7Mvg1RwCqC4ht55iSLYuRxhDQBAsbO1xmvWV6oidW6y-oc9U7aNn1jMQcsKSF7_gS-VL3UaBn1ul4Rqd_lFpGiZzHHAt4oopdclsFwXZBUBSRlIPvoq8wX_rC7qo6pMjCoHUXt0hP-tRcIlxZtFsosM1XI2WqeLCqRUM7ilvwTkcmYAe6E5_qTkxLUms&c=_dxRURxojqHJ6bj6J_d6AQOdw87Q250mcpDw5kp-WHI5mmlrNSa_nw==&ch=nJiNwIemszrRlCmzJtRYojoteAx8UtvxILgJydNxJoMGubvbgL0P-w==)
---

This is headed somewhere very dark. When you excuse crimes, undermine elections, and glorify political violence, people get hurt. This is exactly how democracies crack, piece by piece, as extremists like Boebert test how far they can go.
Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert and in 2024, when our campaign went head to head with her, she had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in the district, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Trisha is running because Colorado, and this country, cannot survive leaders who cheer on chaos, defend criminals, and flirt with violence to stay in power. We must defeat Boebert and drive this brand of extremism out of office before someone gets killed.
[Will you rush a donation of $25, 10, or whatever you can spare to help us beat Boebert and shut the door on MAGA's violence and lawlessness?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z0CVOhM-A4PmYSYcNCS_yPvvbSnEl-XPF64i7Mvg1RwCqC4ht55iSLYuRxhDQBAs-uRKnRmoF-oAfECumLP_si1g8jiW3qM5oQj11V7fwat6Mo5fjLER5L0HurHWNxI0-B1PAtdb74QYEBPCHgejlvP3EMpXrLRSAq6kX-2PmrQxwdzrYVTETT9XmZflRNBTuk6OMDPtXVzu3lGXClEuhkoHUez5-JUx6HRNCufFIJk=&c=_dxRURxojqHJ6bj6J_d6AQOdw87Q250mcpDw5kp-WHI5mmlrNSa_nw==&ch=nJiNwIemszrRlCmzJtRYojoteAx8UtvxILgJydNxJoMGubvbgL0P-w==)

name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW LIMITED CIGAR RELEASE "The Garand"
body:
THE GARAND

Introducing The Garand — a limited-release salute to American grit and battlefield glory from Patriot Cigar Company.

Hand-rolled in a commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand stands tall like the legendary rifle it’s named after — a symbol of strength, precision, and American might. Expertly crafted with 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco and finished in a rich Habano wrapper, this cigar delivers a smooth, medium-strength profile that fires off bold flavor with every draw — steady, confident, and unmistakably patriotic.

AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=e16cc07219&e=fbf55fa623

This is a STRICTLY limited release.
When The Garand is gone — it’s gone. No restock. No second run.

Lock, load, and light up history.

About The Garand

The Garand from Patriot Cigar Company is more than a premium hand-rolled cigar — it is a cigar built in tribute to the rifle that helped secure victory for freedom across the world: the M1 Garand, the rifle General George S. Patton famously called “the greatest battle implement ever devised.”

A commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand is rolled with precision and reverence, echoing the engineering excellence of its namesake. Packed with 7-year aged Nicaraguan filler and binder, and clad in a beautifully finished Habano wrapper, this cigar offers a confidently smooth medium-strength profile — a slow-burning, dignified smoke with depth, refinement, and authority. It is rich without being overpowering, balanced yet bold, a cigar built for those who honor legacy as much as flavor.
------------------------------------------------------------

** A Tribute to a Legend
------------------------------------------------------------

Adopted by the U.S. military in 1936 and carried proudly through World War II and the Korean War, the M1 Garand was the first standard-issue semi-automatic battle rifle in the world — a game-changer in combat. Where other nations’ soldiers still chambered rounds by hand, American troops were able to fire shot after shot with speed and reliability. It was rugged. It was accurate. It was trusted in the mud, the snow, the jungles, and the beaches of Normandy. It represented innovation, confidence, and overwhelming American firepower.

The M1 Garand wasn’t just a rifle — it was a handheld symbol of American dominance and ingenuity, a lifeline to soldiers whose courage reshaped history.
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Cigar Worthy of the Name
------------------------------------------------------------

The spirit of that legendary rifle lives in this limited-edition release:
* 7.5 x 48 Churchill — a proud, commanding presence
* 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco — matured for depth and character
* Habano wrapper — warm, rich, and worthy of a namesake of warfighters
* Medium strength — a long, thoughtful smoke that marches forward with confidence

This cigar is meant to be enjoyed the way history is remembered — deliberately, with pride, and without rush.
------------------------------------------------------------

** A One-Time Tribute
------------------------------------------------------------

Like the heroes who carried the M1 across the world, The Garand will not be mass-produced or remade. This is a strictly limited release — when this cigar is gone, it’s gone. No second run. No encore.

Light one in honor of the warriors who stood between tyranny and liberty — and for the enduring American spirit that still refuses to yield.

The Garand
A rifle that won wars.
A cigar that honors the warrior.

AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY
USE PROMO CODE
FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
eagle
Shop Now 20% OFF CIGARS (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=013e97c6a0&e=fbf55fa623)

** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=f4765de10b&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

clean_body: THE GARAND Introducing The Garand — a limited-release salute to American grit and battlefield glory from Patriot Cigar Company. Hand-rolled in a commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand stands tall like the legendary rifle it’s named after — a symbol of strength, precision, and American might. Expertly crafted with 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco and finished in a rich Habano wrapper, this cigar delivers a smooth, medium-strength profile that fires off bold flavor with every draw — steady, confident, and unmistakably patriotic. AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY! This is a STRICTLY limited release. When The Garand is gone — it’s gone. No restock. No second run. Lock, load, and light up history. About The Garand The Garand from Patriot Cigar Company is more than a premium hand-rolled cigar — it is a cigar built in tribute to the rifle that helped secure victory for freedom across the world: the M1 Garand, the rifle General George S. Patton famously called “the greatest battle implement ever devised.” A commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand is rolled with precision and reverence, echoing the engineering excellence of its namesake. Packed with 7-year aged Nicaraguan filler and binder, and clad in a beautifully finished Habano wrapper, this cigar offers a confidently smooth medium-strength profile — a slow-burning, dignified smoke with depth, refinement, and authority. It is rich without being overpowering, balanced yet bold, a cigar built for those who honor legacy as much as flavor. A Tribute to a Legend Adopted by the U.S. military in 1936 and carried proudly through World War II and the Korean War, the M1 Garand was the first standard-issue semi-automatic battle rifle in the world — a game-changer in combat. Where other nations’ soldiers still chambered rounds by hand, American troops were able to fire shot after shot with speed and reliability. It was rugged. It was accurate. It was trusted in the mud, the snow, the jungles, and the beaches of Normandy. It represented innovation, confidence, and overwhelming American firepower. The M1 Garand wasn’t just a rifle — it was a handheld symbol of American dominance and ingenuity, a lifeline to soldiers whose courage reshaped history. The Cigar Worthy of the Name The spirit of that legendary rifle lives in this limited-edition release: 7.5 x 48 Churchill — a proud, commanding presence 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco — matured for depth and character Habano wrapper — warm, rich, and worthy of a namesake of warfighters Medium strength — a long, thoughtful smoke that marches forward with confidence This cigar is meant to be enjoyed the way history is remembered — deliberately, with pride, and without rush. A One-Time Tribute Like the heroes who carried the M1 across the world, The Garand will not be mass-produced or remade. This is a strictly limited release — when this cigar is gone, it’s gone. No second run. No encore. Light one in honor of the warriors who stood between tyranny and liberty — and for the enduring American spirit that still refuses to yield. The Garand A rifle that won wars. A cigar that honors the warrior. name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: From the Front with Patrick J. Murphy: Leadership, Service, and a Nation in Transition
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/PJM_Logo.png]
From the Front with Patrick J. Murphy: Leadership, Service, and a Nation in Transition
Hi Friends,
It has been a meaningful week of work centered on moral leadership, accountability, and strengthening the communities we serve. As we close out the year, the conversations happening across the country remind us that progress requires both courage and cooperation.
We kicked off Army Navy Week with our annual ‘Veterans Shark Tank’ Monday night where five incredible veteran entrepreneurs competed for a $50K prize. Army Ranger Ty Aloe from Backyard Bangers, a new startup with $1.4 million in revenue, won (hopefully an omen that Army will win tomorrow’s football game).
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRU-Mn3iVbE/?igsh=MW42NDF5ODV0dzQ3eA== [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRU-Mn3iVbE/?igsh=MW42NDF5ODV0dzQ3eA==]
In the Media: The Changing Face of American Politics
This week, I joined Fox News’ Harris Faulkner on The Faulkner Focus for a power panel with David Avella to discuss the latest developments in the Texas U.S. Senate race and what they mean for both parties heading into 2026 and beyond.
On Monday, Democratic congresswoman Jasmine Crockett announced her run for the U.S. Senate, joining a field that includes seminarian and state representative James Talarico.
As we discussed on air, this race is about more than one candidate or one state. It reflects a broader moment in American politics, in which voters are seeking authenticity and results. Leadership today requires empathy, trust, and a clear vision that unites instead of divides.
In the Media: How Economic Headwinds are Hurting Working Americans
On Wednesday, I joined Fox News’ America Reports to discuss rising grocery and utility costs, ongoing layoffs, and how economic uncertainty is affecting families across the country. We emphasized that Americans deserve leaders who can come together, strengthen our economy, and provide relief at home.
Today I’m back in NY to speak at the Fordham Business School and at 3pm I return to Fox News for a panel discussion on the global challenges shaping America’s security landscape. We’ll talk about what this moment demands responsible leaders and our need to navigate economic and geopolitical pressures while protecting our national interests and supporting our allies.
Across both conversations, our message remains focused on unity, strength, accountability and keeping America competitive and secure.
On Substack: The Economic Signals Everyone Should Pay Attention to in 2026
This week on Substack, I break down the economic signals that shaped 2025, and the ones that will matter most in 2026. From the AI gold rush and the strain on America’s electrical grid to slowing consumer spending, rising debt, and unprecedented job cuts, the column looks beyond headlines to explain what these shifts mean for families, workers, and small businesses. t
Whether it’s Nvidia’s dominance, the race for data-center power, robotaxis reshaping labor, or dollar stores suddenly packed with six-figure earners, these trends reveal a country adjusting to rapid technological change and uneven economic pressure.
Read the full piece here: The Economic Signals Everyone Should Be Watching [https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/the-economic-signals-everyone-should] .
On Warrior Money: Army Navy Week - Why America misunderstands veteran disabilities
On this week’s episode of Warrior Money, we tackle one of the most persistent and damaging misconceptions about America’s veterans: the “broken veteran” narrative - which is constraint to the page try of tomorrow’s Army Navy Game. With millions of veterans using the VA healthcare system, we address why disability benefits 99% of the time aren’t fraud or weakness—they’re part of the contract the nation makes with those it sends into harm’s way.
Watch the full episode here: Warrior Money [https://youtu.be/O5xIu6RR56o?si=3V6us7WtrkLU6Cxg] .
On the Road: The Army-Navy Conference In Baltimore
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/12.5%203.png]
The day is finally here! Today from 10-3, we’ll be hosting our fourth annual Warrior Class Army–Navy Conference at Johns Hopkins Carey Business School. This event unites veterans & business leaders who bring their lessons of service into boardrooms, statehouses, startups, and the agencies that keep our nation strong. It will be a gathering of veteran excellence. Can’t wait to share some highlights with you next week.
Speakers this year include Governor Wes Moore, Representative Chris Deluzio, Under Armor CEO Kevin Plank, IS.me [http://is.me] CEO Blake Hall, Moonshots Capital Founder Kelly Perdew, Carlyle Group’s Frank Finelli, and Hilco Global Vice Chairman David Kurtz.
This annual gathering is not just about football weekend. It is a chance for the veteran community to connect, exchange ideas, and explore how the principles of discipline and integrity can strengthen business and public life.
Looking Back: Gratitude and Service
As we reflect on the past few weeks, I am proud of how our community continues to lead with purpose. Veterans, families, and civic leaders are stepping up every day to make this country stronger.
Service does not end when we hang up the uniform. It continues in classrooms, boardrooms, and neighborhoods where people come together to lift one another up.
Thank you for being part of this mission.
Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
P.S. Follow @patrickmurphypa on social media and subscribe to the weekly Substack [https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa] for more updates on leadership, service, and innovation.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/JcTKjLm2l0SduvIvv8SeUg2?unsubscribedata=uMXzhz3y6YjSF9XdFH%2FvdI5PEynpY1PXWa%2FLdyqrHu%2BqCh1aGOTZR%2FUQK5uVvPt0Ew0kDteRF4297Dr86izjrt7Y3Uqd5zshKLzQ0j3VVyyFllXzPTSs9vC2cQPkmk0dh6hU%2BrXJgbG9AMFH9jvlBWWJ7%2BYPEw4j6AKPnJR6oYEg6JYgykDPg1vSXK5A%2B7dM23vx7uec4bb%2Fg1Jg45BZrRni%2BjBhutG4v8UCJK9PPP%2FmgWNnYAs6Hk8WGZhjcwvQdmOB0YEnFukYKH8ozxWLwPkvVqZvD9f15ygWY%2BJquk%2BGvHjLvNz2MyiRZ7jBQlrfLUh69LPBcj6262GNCltAfano6N23UoeKG%2BhUtFo%2FZ3mEHT98C3QwcJFASfW%2FgwcwnPokUPF9zPiCGIhRarcJ0JIhX9TjUWXB1L5P929fMLrDUDAzEQQ8BphhNB0ql9mA .

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I want to bring this to your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
URGENT: Confirm your voter profile before the day ends
Peter,

| | As we look toward 2026, I walk to talk about what it's going to take to win the fights ahead. We're up against Trump's Republican Party, which has shown us time and again that they aren't interested in lowering costs for families, protecting our democracy, or strengthening our institutions. They create chaos, attack our freedoms, and put politics ahead of people every single time. But I deeply believe that a strong, energized grassroots movement can beat that. It's how we've overcome dark money, misinformation, and extremism before. It's how we'll protect health care, defend our democracy, and keep pushing for a government that actually works for people. That's the work I'm focused on every day in the Senate. And to keep building this people-powered movement all the way into 2026, I need you with me. name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter & Annual Report -- December 12
body:
|

---
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Happy holidays!

Before we recess until the new year, I wanted to reach out and say thank you. Thank you for your advocacy. Thank you for your care and love of our great state and thank you for allowing me to represent you in the United States Senate.

It has certainly been a challenging time for our state and for our nation. We have seen rights infringed on or rolled back, attacks on our health care and civil liberties, attacks on our neighbors and those we love, and costs rise dramatically. But we've also seen a resilience. We've seen our community come together to support one another. You have raised your collective voices to let this Administration know that the will of the people is foundational to our nation, and it's what makes us American.

And while I have spent a good bit of my first year in office fighting back against attacks on our freedoms, safety, and livelihoods, I have also worked hard to get things done. Be clear - I was sent to Capitol Hill to represent the will of Marylanders, but Marylanders told me in no uncertain terms that you expect results.

I am so proud of the work that I've been able to deliver since January. Alongside Team Maryland, I have pushed back on this Administration, while at the same time fostered bipartisan relationships to get legislation through. In just a few short months, I was able to get two bills that I co-led signed into law. Both of those bills aim to create economic opportunities for Maryland families.

You can read more about the work that I've done - the work that we've done together - in my [**2025 Annual Report**](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fannualreport2025%2f&redir_log=433303210443350). This is just an overview of what we have accomplished, but I hope it gives you an idea of the progress I'm fighting for. I am excited for the work ahead. It won't be easy, but I just want you to know that it is my life's work to ensure that every single person in this state has the true opportunity to realize the American Dream. To view an interactive version of the report on our website click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fannualreport2025%2f&redir_log=433303210443350), or to download a PDF click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2025%2f12%2f451081-Alsobrooks-Annual-Report-Digital.pdf&redir_log=459376055432698). I pray God's blessings over each of you as we enter the holidays. May you enjoy your family and friends this season, and have a safe and prosperous New Year.

And before everyone heads out on holiday, I wanted to update you on our most recent work:

** ** **Fighting Back Against RFK 's Disastrous Administration **

RFK Jr. continues to harm the American people. On September 4, 2025, Ranking Member Ron Wyden and I [released a report](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.finance.senate.gov%2franking-members-news%2fwyden-and-alsobrooks-detail-higher-costs-chaos-and-corruption-under-rfk-jr&redir_log=521597703772885) chronicling the daily actions that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has taken to undermine the health and safety of the American people since becoming Secretary of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). Over the last month, Kennedy's actions continued to endanger the American people's health, culminating in the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices' (ACIP) vote to limit availability of the Hepatitis B vaccine late last week. Read more from our continually updated report [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2falsobrooks-wyden-continue-to-build-the-case-against-rfk-jr-5%2f&redir_log=052448020734796).

**In The Community **

I was proud to host another successful and informative Internet and Utilities Services Fair. We brought together utility and internet service providers to assist Marylanders in Montgomery County.

During these challenging times, my team and I are committed to making sure Marylanders get the support they need.

I was honored to head to Baltimore and celebrate 10 amazing years of Black Girls Vote!

Every Black girl has a story. Thank you to Black Girls Vote for telling those stories and inspiring future generations.

Ahead of Thanksgiving, I was grateful to spend time with Food & Friends volunteers, helping to deliver meals to families with life-challenging illnesses. In this season of gratitude, we must all practice giving back to our neighbors. When we lift each other up, our entire community will benefit.

I also had the opportunity to distribute Thanksgiving fixings, and spend time at Second Baptist Church Southwest alongside Hustle Mommies, Kevin Ford Jr., and Viola's House in giving back to our community.

I was honored to attend the inauguration ceremony for Annapolis Mayor Jared Littmann and the incoming Annapolis City Council. This inauguration marks a new chapter for the great city of Annapolis, and I am looking forward to working closely with Mayor Littmann.

It was a pleasure to attend the Jewish Community Relations Council 2025 Legislative Breakfast. I'm proud to be a partner to the Jewish community and I remain forever grateful for our friendship. Together, we will keep striving for justice, safety, democracy, and peace.

I loved joining the Committee for Montgomery's 37th Annual Legislative Breakfast. Sen. Van Hollen, Rep. McClain Delaney, and I had a fruitful discussion about the vision for Montgomery County's future and how we can work to respond to local needs.

I joined the Baltimore Regional Housing Partnership for a discussion about housing in our state. No matter where I go - everyone is concerned about affordable housing. That's why I'm working to make home ownership a reality for more Marylanders and to lower the cost of rent.

I enjoyed stopping by Mix + Mingle Coffee Lounge to join Raymond Butler and the District 5 Coffee Club in Clinton for a conversation about our future. When we work together as neighbors - anything is possible. We will keep working to serve our community.
I'll end our last newsletter of 2025 with one last moment of gratitude for each and every one of you. The work is never easy, but it's always worth it.

May you all have a blessed holiday.
**Stay in the Fight ** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office or connect with us at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov%2f&redir_log=346519414955204). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=15704.14990328.5798881.7190525)

**Editor’s Note:** We occasionally share interesting items from fellow publishers. Today’s note is from none other than Porter Stansberry, the man responsible for the famous _End of America_ documentary – and the founder of the largest publishing company in the world exclusively for individual investors. No one is more qualified to comment on what’s happening to the US dollar and where all the growing chaos is leading. He’s joined forces with Garrett Goggin, one of the world leading gold and silver analysts, to bring you a groundbreaking story.

Here’s Porter...
* * *

I bought my first gold coins back in 2000.

And I’ve _never_ sold a single ounce... Why?

Because I’ve known for decades that gold would one day play a role as one of the most important assets in your portfolio. And now, I believe that day is here.

I first explained this in my famous _End of America_ documentary.

At the time, many in the financial establishment scoffed at my prediction... they saw gold as a worthless rock, a relic of the past, a _drag_ on investment returns.

Who’s laughing now?

Almost _every_ single thing I warned of in _The End of America_ has come true.

I explained the link between inflation and the collapse of civil society... and showed how inflation creates massive disincentives for hard work and savings.

I detailed how it makes it vastly more difficult to cooperate effectively.

And, as more and more people see their standard of living collapse in ways they can’t understand, societies fall apart.

I predicted we would see soaring amounts of prostitution (Only Fans), gambling (online sports betting), and drug addiction (fentanyl).

I also explained that, at some point soon, the “hidden” costs of inflation would explode.

And on that day, everything you take for granted and love about America would end.

I predicted we’d lose our AAA-credit rating – and we did.

I predicted that our trading partners would soon abandon the dollar... central banks now hold more gold than U.S. Treasuries.

I predicted that as the dollar lost its world-reserve currency status, our standard of living would collapse, and America would spiral into radical politics, and soaring violence.

And now, I’m predicting the U.S and the world could be entering the _most dangerous phase_ of the ongoing monetary reset.

That’s why, now more than ever before, if you want to protect your way of life, your investment portfolio, and your wealth... I believe you must have an allocation to gold.

And after 30 years in the financial world, I believe there is no one better to explain _exactly_ how to do that than my friend, Garrett Goggin.

That’s why Garrett and I have teamed up to show you how to capitalize on gold’s ongoing revaluation.

That’s not all, though. My team and I have also discovered a little-known company _outside of the gold market_ that’s positioned to play a critical role in the coming monetary shift.

[We lay all the details out for you here](https://links.perfect.indexfundinsiders.com/u/click?_t=24937c32f32d4a1aa12f33aab8cd74b4&_m=e0897a118b984afda775de25da21817f&_e=mrjs-f8_365FKSFyeGnuFK4aX4SxFlLBYsr9-Ons-GFxdAnHhMh-fPt1tCta5f5XEOl_jXaX6vcN_fNYonE6wYmJXJi8OVIwzUSHfXvs3rBD1hTaz7HizoaK4IeQBJju7ozed_490b2e_ZotDszvJBGhK6aN6DTbgpPpPiGJo6swXGsdmo7FcpnXeZ4NWwVwjJPxEMMBr6nQ-UG9JuiyUd6bfAaZgDdsiisSzPVVduszXVWBMyeNKcK0EV38RxrmXq1OZ5D9zs-NSKiFrBQBSzsnKQRQqR0gWXjYFaZqPtb0FN1Jt5bEZ5lLIUukqPDoMSX9XOXRWA1fMdm0ywbOG9-Gr8A_on-6vH6tT1Tl08I92__gQq-UmqwmRYEiDESwxccDMncXgXxVLEGF4LzQwYooCNrlctbZWcq2RO4HvGvlxDxzbR_-5W5H5AAAMo7S4_rZS0xU6sTBAzIT0v7gPbUX-fCANylLnkbtC_ieCAjdrojaacu2EX0iMlutihUlnnrNLUdeseD9oGHpj7TM3L_Gm_JZdmRFw_ykVVD-NtkCBR3ffeOikxiqkl3f5yae4U5fJN0kYTRBXx6ivaNS9A%3D%3D).

Porter Stansberry

clean_body: Garrett is THE most knοwledgeable gοld investor in the world| | | | | | Editor’s Note: We occasionally share interesting items from fellow publishers. Today’s note is from none other than Porter Stansberry, the man responsible for the famous End of America documentary – and the founder of the largest publishing company in the world exclusively for individual investors. No one is more qualified to comment on what’s happening to the US dollar and where all the growing chaos is leading. He’s joined forces with Garrett Goggin, one of the world leading gold and silver analysts, to bring you a groundbreaking story. Here’s Porter... I bought my first gold coins back in 2000. And I’ve never sold a single ounce... Why? Because I’ve known for decades that gold would one day play a role as one of the most important assets in your portfolio. And now, I believe that day is here. I first explained this in my famous End of America documentary. At the time, many in the financial establishment scoffed at my prediction... they saw gold as a worthless rock, a relic of the past, a drag on investment returns. Who’s laughing now? Almost every single thing I warned of in The End of America has come true. I explained the link between inflation and the collapse of civil society... and showed how inflation creates massive disincentives for hard work and savings. I detailed how it makes it vastly more difficult to cooperate effectively. And, as more and more people see their standard of living collapse in ways they can’t understand, societies fall apart. I predicted we would see soaring amounts of prostitution (Only Fans), gambling (online sports betting), and drug addiction (fentanyl). I also explained that, at some point soon, the “hidden” costs of inflation would explode. And on that day, everything you take for granted and love about America would end. I predicted we’d lose our AAA-credit rating – and we did. I predicted that our trading partners would soon abandon the dollar... central banks now hold more gold than U.S. Treasuries. I predicted that as the dollar lost its world-reserve currency status, our standard of living would collapse, and America would spiral into radical politics, and soaring violence. And now, I’m predicting the U.S and the world could be entering the most dangerous phase of the ongoing monetary reset. That’s why, now more than ever before, if you want to protect your way of life, your investment portfolio, and your wealth... I believe you must have an allocation to gold. And after 30 years in the financial world, I believe there is no one better to explain exactly how to do that than my friend, Garrett Goggin. That’s why Garrett and I have teamed up to show you how to capitalize on gold’s ongoing revaluation. That’s not all, though. My team and I have also discovered a little-known company outside of the gold market that’s positioned to play a critical role in the coming monetary shift. . Good investing, Porter Stansberry P.S. According to Garrett, the recent passage of the GENIUS Act could play havoc with the U.S banking system. body:
Calls for a military raid against a CO prison. Trump has thrown down the gauntlet and is setting off a full blown constitutional crisis.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YyKrz7MQvDDlPRadVJXpy8yLEXrNes3N0X7KEdTJCoRaeRe6yV3D4Cr7ZG99V0-aX_clv_MsoPN-w9wSOkkcNcx5Gb0Gv5jkefZx-gPepuCdNCEorIQWwNvNGfnCc5OnXZ9xq7BGUW7ab1U5FPZ4gQD7fpm-c7Y4Ot7bot4UU4BD4jdvhOOxdjtFjUxaLUmwaZ-QBlyJYufe9J54tJUgFnh9yGzdrTKc&c=M_gydwTDlfbMQAsVe6baOaQZ0rEFXx0PtwYJJPmRpbuBLdyC3dzUHQ==&ch=8OfItAd4kgZCJ4AQCiSKii80UsL7ySFDVbfWG63m2fja5a6qE5ilQQ==)

Peter,
What's unfolding in Colorado right now has the real potential of turning violent.
Trump just pardoned Tina Peters, a former Mesa Colorado county clerk serving a nine year state sentence for letting unauthorized operatives access voting machines in an attempt to prop up Trump's 2020 election lie.
Presidents do not have the power to pardon state crimes. Trump did it anyway and has thrown down the gauntlet setting off a full blown Constitutional crisis.
Colorado is refusing to comply. And now Peter's lawyers are openly calling for Trump to order a military raid to break her out of state custody. And right at the center of this chaos? Lauren Boebert.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YyKrz7MQvDDlPRadVJXpy8yLEXrNes3N0X7KEdTJCoRaeRe6yV3D4Cr7ZG99V0-aX_clv_MsoPN-w9wSOkkcNcx5Gb0Gv5jkefZx-gPepuCdNCEorIQWwNvNGfnCc5OnXZ9xq7BGUW7ab1U5FPZ4gQD7fpm-c7Y4Ot7bot4UU4BD4jdvhOOxdjtFjUxaLUmwaZ-QBlyJYud8w4Y9-7R_QVpNQ_6WHeR4&c=M_gydwTDlfbMQAsVe6baOaQZ0rEFXx0PtwYJJPmRpbuBLdyC3dzUHQ==&ch=8OfItAd4kgZCJ4AQCiSKii80UsL7ySFDVbfWG63m2fja5a6qE5ilQQ==)

She is leading the charge to free Peters and is pouring gasoline on a situation that has the real potential to spiral into violence.
It gets worse.
MAGA extremist podcaster--Joe Oltmann, a key Boebert ally, resident of her district, and fundraiser for her --has publicly called for the execution of Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser for not releasing Peters.
---

This is headed somewhere very dark. When you excuse crimes, undermine elections, and glorify political violence, people get hurt. This is exactly how democracies crack, piece by piece, as extremists like Boebert test how far they can go.
Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert and in 2024, when our campaign went head to head with her, she had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in the district, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Trisha is running because Colorado, and this country, cannot survive leaders who cheer on chaos, defend criminals, and flirt with violence to stay in power. We must defeat Boebert and drive this brand of extremism out of office before someone gets killed.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump has the Supreme Court, we have all of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, The Supreme Court’s decision to greenlight Texas’ racially gerrymandered map is yet another shameful partisan capitulation to Donald Trump, and puts yet another judicial thumb on the scale for the 2026 election. After kicking 15 million Americans off their health insurance to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, _the GOP knows they can’t win a free and fair election._ **And the Supreme Court is enabling their efforts to rig the election.** Our Supreme Court should serve as a neutral, non-partisan, independent interpreter of the Constitution. Yet they’ve used their conservative majority to bend to Trump’s will — allowing him to decimate our checks and balances and override our country’s democracy. That includes trying to erode our free and fair elections to maintain a Republican majority in Congress and keep Trump’s rubber stamp in place. clean_body: | Peter, The Supreme Court’s decision to greenlight Texas’ racially gerrymandered map is yet another shameful partisan capitulation to Donald Trump, and puts yet another judicial thumb on the scale for the 2026 election. After kicking 15 million Americans off their health insurance to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, the GOP knows they can’t win a free and fair election. And the Supreme Court is enabling their efforts to rig the election. Our Supreme Court should serve as a neutral, non-partisan, independent interpreter of the Constitution. Yet they’ve used their conservative majority to bend to Trump’s will — allowing him to decimate our checks and balances and override our country’s democracy. That includes trying to erode our free and fair elections to maintain a Republican majority in Congress and keep Trump’s rubber stamp in place. It is more vital than ever that we turn out voters nationwide to combat the impacts of voter suppression and win back the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Ro Khanna
subject: I’m endorsing Mayra Rivera-Vázquez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Dear Peter,
I’m reaching out today with an important announcement. I am proud to endorse Mayra Rivera-Vázquez for Congress in South Carolina’s 1st Congressional District, one of the most competitive districts in the country and one that Democrats can win in 2026.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in to Mayra’s campaign as a Founding Donor, but first, let me explain why I’m supporting her in this race.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-mayra-rivera-vazquez-split?refcode=20251212]
This district is currently represented by Nancy Mace, a MAGA Republican who has chosen chaos over solutions, division over unity, and special interests over working people.
Mayra is a fighter for economic fairness, democracy, and opportunity for all. A proud Puerto Rican American and public servant, she understands the hopes and struggles of working families because she has lived them. She’s an Army wife, the mother of a disabled son, and has worked to help victims of domestic violence find their footing.
Her policy platform is centered around protecting Social Security and Medicare from cuts, creating high-paying jobs, investing in clean energy infrastructure, and establishing strong, commonsense pathways to legal immigration.
And with no incumbent in the race, this seat is truly in play. National Republicans will pour millions into keeping it red, but the demographics and momentum are shifting – and Mayra Rivera-Vázquez is the Democrat who can flip this district and help take back the House.
This race is not just about flipping one seat. It’s about flipping the direction of our country – toward justice, opportunity, and common sense. Please contribute today to help elect Mayra Rivera-Vázquez and bring real leadership back to South Carolina’s Lowcountry. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-mayra-rivera-vazquez-split?refcode=20251212]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-mayra-rivera-vazquez-split?refcode=20251212]
Thank you for joining me in this fight,
Ro Khanna

name: Shinji Oh
subject: 🧀No Cheeses For Us Meeces🐁
body:
The Muppets said it best: “No crust of bread for those in need/ no cheeses for us meeces.”
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| The Muppets said it best: "No crust of bread for those in need/ no cheeses for us meeces." Every day, it seems like someone is talking about something vital being underfunded; whether it's public education, affordable housing, childcare, or infrastructure, it seems like there's not enough to go around.
In Virginia, anyone making $17,000 a year is in the highest-earning tax bracket, meaning that teachers pay the same tax rate as billionaires. This holiday season, we're taking a page out of Charles Dickens' beloved classic and saying "Bah, Humbug!" to the ultra-wealthy and corporations not paying their fair share when it comes to funding the things that matter most. It's time we had a fair tax system in Virginia.
Shinji Oh Digital Manager
---
---
| | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US
---

In Virginia, anyone making $17,000 a year is in the highest-earning tax bracket, meaning that teachers pay the same tax rate as billionaires. This holiday season, we're taking a page out of Charles Dickens' beloved classic and saying "Bah, Humbug!" to the ultra-wealthy and corporations not paying their fair share when it comes to funding the things that matter most. It's time we had a fair tax system in Virginia. Shinji Oh Digital Manager | | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |

| | It’s Josh Hawley. Some of you may know me as Missouri’s Senator. Others may remember me for standing with President Trump when it mattered most. But before politics, I’m a husband, a father of three, and an unapologetic Christian. My wife, Erin, is a constitutional lawyer who defends our freedoms every single day. And together, we’re raising our kids—Elijah, Blaise, and Abigail—to know that their value comes not from Washington or woke ideology, but from God. Right now, I’m fighting the greatest threat to our families and our future: Big Tech.
---
| | I love my kids too much to let the tech oligarchs impose their agenda on my family. And I know you feel the same about yours. Silicon Valley has run roughshod over modern civilization—and they’re just getting started. Smartphones addict our children. Social media tracks their every click, pause, and purchase. Every so-called “innovation” has been nothing more than a power grab—taking power from us, straight into their hands. And now, the tech elite has turned with rabid enthusiasm to artificial intelligence. Make no mistake: this isn’t about helping Americans—it’s about replacing them.
* AI-powered robots threaten to automate entire industries.
* Over 3.5 million trucking jobs wiped out with self-driving vehicles.
* Delivery drivers, taxi workers, and customer service reps—eliminated in the name of “efficiency.”
* Millions of entry-level jobs—gone overnight.

This isn’t progress. It’s the destruction of the working class. I’m Josh Hawley, and I’m leading the fight to stop Big Tech from stealing our children’s attention, personal data and their very future! But I refuse to stand by while powerful billionaires replace American workers and rob our kids of opportunity. Will you stand with me?
---

name: Andie Levien (via Democrats.org)
subject: A legal update from the DNC
body:
---
Derek, It’s Andie Levien, General Counsel for the DNC. It’s my job to oversee all legal issues related to the Party’s work, **which includes taking Trump to court.** Here’s what’s happening right now: Republicans are so worried that they can’t compete with our grassroots donor base that they’re asking the Supreme Court to change campaign finance rules to give their billionaire donors even more influence. JD Vance himself is leading the charge. So Democrats stepped in –– fighting with everything we’ve got to keep those limits in place. This week, we argued against Trump and Vance before the Supreme Court to protect our democracy from billionaire interference. But here’s the thing: These aren’t easy cases to win. That’s why the DNC needs a surge of grassroots support to help us hand the billionaire-backed president a crucial defeat. [**So, Derek, if you’re ready to join us in our fight to beat Donald Trump and Republicans in court to ensure that the integrity of our democracy and our elections remain intact, and to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026, we’re asking you to chip in $7 or whatever makes sense for you today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251212_5512_fr&refcode2=5512_22930333_-jRtKE&akid=5512%2E22930333%2E-jRtKE) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251212_5512_fr&refcode2=5512_22930333_-jRtKE&akid=5512%2E22930333%2E-jRtKE)**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: ICYMI: Why I’m calling to impeach RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Leaders must protect public health - no matter what

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.nv4FLRHclxdxCFAwpGePe4f5reGr3eHBFIC4UiNle5o?) for more
---
# [ICYMI: Why I'm calling to impeach RFK Jr.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=181386929&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzg2OTI5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NTM3MDIsImV4cCI6MTc2ODE0NTcwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.q_wN5Y4ZeXnHzBQBr4wAsEGetxujRTWYUiLikABDHCs)
### Leaders must protect public health - no matter what
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Dec 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..BkBFMStBZYqfrcVPyG3IwkEwgtaItvfHGcxDfmnEJ2o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/icymi-why-im-calling-to-impeach-rfk?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This week, I introduced articles of impeachment against Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
If you're just catching up, let me explain why.
For months, I've been fighting back against RFK Jr.'s dangerous agenda. I demanded accountability and action, including leading a push to reinstate lifesaving research into pediatric cancer, HIV, and mRNA technology. I met with doctors and scientists across Michigan. I wrote legislation to restore critical cancer research programs that his department gutted, and I called on him to resign.
Impeachment is a serious step. _And this wasn 't a decision I came to lightly._ But the consequences of allowing RFK Jr. to remain in office would mean continued harm to families across Michigan and across the country.
Let me say this clearly: **Secretary Kennedy is carrying out a pseudoscientific coup of America 's public health system**. And that's why doctors, scientists, and ten Nobel Prize winners have endorsed my articles of impeachment.
He's fired trusted medical professionals. He's dismantled lifesaving research. He's created confusion, fear, and dysfunction at the very top of our public health infrastructure. And he's done it all while peddling conspiracy theories, undermining scientific consensus, and misleading Congress.
**This isn 't about politics.** _This isn 't about partisanship._ It's about doing what's right for the American people.
**This moment demands bold leadership.** RFK Jr.'s chaos must be stopped.
I've heard from doctors across the country -- including Republican physicians -- who are alarmed by what's happening inside the agency they rely on to care for patients and protect public health.
This is not normal. This is not acceptable. And it cannot be ignored.
When a cabinet official misleads Congress, undermines science, and spreads dangerous misinformation - that's disqualifying.
When that same official stands beside the President of the United States as he tells pregnant women _not to take Tylenol_ based on a conspiracy theory - that's not just false, it's dangerous.
And when he purges scientists and shuts down research into cancer, HIV, mRNA treatments, and addiction recovery - that's devastating for families who are counting on medical progress to survive.
So no, I'm not going to stay quiet. I'm not going to back down. And I'm not going to wait for someone else to act - because the longer we wait, the more people will suffer.
**I introduced these articles of impeachment because that 's what this moment demands.**
This is a fight for public health. For science. For truth. And for the people I represent.
I'm proud to lead it.
With grit,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/29b4c648-ea3b-453e-b7b5-9ebda067a96e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..BkBFMStBZYqfrcVPyG3IwkEwgtaItvfHGcxDfmnEJ2o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2025 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..8_fy7L0qTY6GooByItYYHTeqVVRdWviGrRtI3GohHLw?)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f5073648-769e-4d9a-b4ab-423c3c7cbdc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..8xj_j3Xlw1x58hVlhv7gWoL3XV5hb12XfTcu8eZzRDc?)

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party Team
subject: It’s Time to Send Our Elders Home from Prison
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Hi Peter, Next week, the PA State House will vote on HB 150 — a bill that would allow very sick incarcerated people to petition the courts for medical release. This is a real chance to move Pennsylvania closer to sending our elders home with dignity. **HB 150 is being championed by WFP State Rep. Rick Krajewski,** alongside partner organizations like Straight Ahead, Free the Ballot, Amistad Movement Power and SEIU Healthcare and SEIU State Council. This vote is a big deal, and your voice can help push it over the finish line. **[Can you take a moment today to tell your legislator you support HB 150?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBR5ygS42xihRSGVRxrBVJ4VNKYnFVpamruHpCXWppnPX0UfrgD6Wqhyza5zdwnXe957XjfFjpCbiPpjIHTO2sPBDpSiYS-dInKuf6pzNniGxRgHfKEGsEBEio4y8cuARImrcH11mCUrIFUqGVc92NNqjUus7rhSXrkgwvsyM0upAsptxXsixETeAlLxTp8AyPwwGbyaALmHAQIf-6sioSPpw08sY-qcIi8vZxLpzzwlgwMnkgohwgFcDXZ8-waiPhNFm1osYf6-0ctVLVsm1boXipL7Rz7PD8lrpsZxma1XKs/4md/sDPn2wihToqT3rKbl5YqXQ/h0/h001.L2diryQO-oCU0b8QQJxmit9YQ9OccAUM1EECX3a6J2U)** **[Tell Your Legislator: Support HB 150](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBR5ygS42xihRSGVRxrBVJ4VNKYnFVpamruHpCXWppnPX0UfrgD6Wqhyza5zdwnXe957XjfFjpCbiPpjIHTO2sPBLdW_e41ea9xRNooEcVjCWCHTiJWfree9PorPNmC9FVRmcrJRyzYu4lJvhjSW8U8WCaNSNMWWOOMJ88q9g9q7bLG98VPld2xrThYSoTlWwNSiXbEJpB2layWKOemEW_GV4UQI39cLsPyRjienqH0zcpxs6OFRKN50n4rRyKJ4UPXjlOp-Y91bCeCw0WMinuapXQ86ow0tUphlRCVSZi-MlA/4md/sDPn2wihToqT3rKbl5YqXQ/h1/h001.1jZVgD6wcz1PlGjzlb4aGd8itsZiGFdnGrn-SpDv-2g)** Right now, thousands of people in Pennsylvania are sentenced to grow old and die behind prison walls. Every one of them is someone’s parent, grandparent, sibling, or loved one. When they become seriously ill in prison, their families are barred from caring for them or being by their side. HB 150 is the humane thing to do — and it’s the fiscally responsible thing to do. Pennsylvania’s Department of Corrections budget tops $3 billion a year (roughly 6 percent of the entire state budget), and the growing population of elderly, medically fragile people behind bars continues to drive those costs up. We know that money could be spent in countless ways that actually strengthen our communities (from education to violence-prevention programs). **[Tell your representative today: vote YES on HB 150 to reunite families, save taxpayer dollars, and bring compassion into our justice system.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBR5ygS42xihRSGVRxrBVJ4VNKYnFVpamruHpCXWppnPX0UfrgD6Wqhyza5zdwnXe957XjfFjpCbiPpjIHTO2sPBOGGJWhfq1cgcPfbXAEdcoJC6cll0E97qlsW2nd1NY38ZXo1VH070pfNn9NCBTaLk7t73GqPtbIasm9ePKH8nj8R-1hiOeulJaIV2QnwG4IU5flHF12Y0p1SlFmqI6nIqTy5oNAcNEDXPrmC3-E2aFruSMHZD9c7F7CruUIM3-b8mkxO79UiCWDCMUU1Dri7kqfNn1OhXUMIbOOQbqEN2GY/4md/sDPn2wihToqT3rKbl5YqXQ/h2/h001.VAqB7uRKc1FU8C5IvTaTzEW-aLyFmckWlje6jnslgqI)** **[Tell Your Legislator: Support HB clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Next week, the PA State House will vote on HB 150 — a bill that would allow very sick incarcerated people to petition the courts for medical release. This is a real chance to move Pennsylvania closer to sending our elders home with dignity. HB 150 is being championed by WFP State Rep. Rick Krajewski, alongside partner organizations like Straight Ahead, Free the Ballot, Amistad Movement Power and SEIU Healthcare and SEIU State Council. This vote is a big deal, and your voice can help push it over the finish line. Right now, thousands of people in Pennsylvania are sentenced to grow old and die behind prison walls. Every one of them is someone’s parent, grandparent, sibling, or loved one. When they become seriously ill in prison, their families are barred from caring for them or being by their side. HB 150 is the humane thing to do — and it’s the fiscally responsible thing to do. Pennsylvania’s Department of Corrections budget tops $3 billion a year (roughly 6 percent of the entire state budget), and the growing population of elderly, medically fragile people behind bars continues to drive those costs up. We know that money could be spent in countless ways that actually strengthen our communities (from education to violence-prevention programs). In solidarity, The PA Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member! Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party | | Sent via . name: Roy Cooper
subject: Donald Trump attacked me personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Here’s what he said:
Peter, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day.
_And this week, he directed one at me._
Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is _terrified_ that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people.
Peter, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too.
**[I need your help to face what’s ahead. I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots in whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98493?refcode=em20251212-9818&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9818%2E614464%2EYZdf51)**
So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me.
He called me a _“radical left lunatic.”_
**If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it.**
You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Peter. I need to know if you’re with me.
**[I’m not asking because I want to, but because I have to. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. Split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots if you can, and help me take on Trump and the national GOP.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98493?refcode=em20251212-9818&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9818%2E614464%2EYZdf51)**

name: Kamala Harris
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac
body:
Some people are describing what’s been happening in recent months as absolute chaos. And of course, I understand why.

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-em?refcode=em251212&refcode2=830_2563979_kdp89H&akid=830%2E2563979%2Ekdp89H)
Good morning, Peter.
I have tried not to send a million fundraising emails and texts since the last election, but I wanted to take a few minutes to tell you about how I have decided to approach this moment in time — and why I hope you’re still with me in this fight.
Here's the truth:
Some people are describing what’s been happening in recent months as absolute chaos. And of course, I understand why.
But Peter, please let us not be duped into thinking everything is chaos. What we are witnessing is a swift implementation of an agenda that has been decades in the making.
It’s an agenda — a narrow, self-serving vision of America — where they punish truth tellers, favor loyalists, profit from their power, and leave everyone else to fend for themselves.
I know a lot of folks are wondering what’s going to guide us through this moment. How are we all going to chart the course?
For my part, I have decided to start a PAC — Fight for the People PAC. I am going to travel, speak out, and help elect Democrats everywhere and I cannot do this alone.
Donations are going to be critical. Especially early ones to get us started. Plus, we have our first FEC report coming up fast where we're legally required to report what we've raised. And I can assure you, everyone will be looking to see what we report.
[**If you are still with me, I am asking you to make a contribution of $5 or any amount you can afford to get us started. Do it before our FEC deadline. It would mean a lot to me personally.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-em?refcode=em251212&refcode2=830_2563979_kdp89H&akid=830%2E2563979%2Ekdp89H)

I know we can pass down an Oregon that our kids are proud of

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121137653/588481093/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU2OTA3ODctNzFkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HyH4SL-2H8Ro2ISXCvD6pllyFnjmyPQsLTB7QQnGDKs=) Team, As a mom of four, I first ran for Congress because I believe in a promising future for Oregon, and I know we can pass down an Oregon that our kids are proud of. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121137654/588481097/1565084121?refcode=email_121225_future&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU2OTA3ODctNzFkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HyH4SL-2H8Ro2ISXCvD6pllyFnjmyPQsLTB7QQnGDKs=) In the House, I’ve been laser-focused on delivering meaningful change for our families and fighting to make the future brighter for my kids and every child across Oregon. I’ve led the call to prioritize lowering prices and fought to make life more affordable by introducing the Protecting Families from Inflation Act. I’ve worked to ensure that all our kids have access to the quality education they deserve by introducing the IDEA Full Funding Act to deliver for our students with disabilities. I’ve pushed to speed up the homebuilding process and lower costs for home-buyers by introducing the Accelerating Homebuilding Act, so we can stop pricing the next generation out of homeownership. And I’ve fought to protect the programs that help our kids succeed by standing up to the Trump administration’s reckless cuts to education, healthcare, and food assistance. **I’ve spent every single day in Congress fighting to build a stronger, brighter future for the next generation. But I’ll be honest, I can’t keep up this work on my own.** **[Republicans are determined to flip OR-05 red and continue pushing their disastrous agenda. clean_body: I know we can pass down an Oregon that our kids are proud of = Team, As a mom of four, I first ran for Congress because I believe in a promising future for Oregon, and I know we can pass down an Oregon that our kids are proud of. = In the House, I’ve been laser-focused on delivering meaningful change for our families and fighting to make the future brighter for my kids and every child across Oregon. I’ve led the call to prioritize lowering prices and fought to make life more affordable by introducing the Protecting Families from Inflation Act. I’ve worked to ensure that all our kids have access to the quality education they deserve by introducing the IDEA Full Funding Act to deliver for our students with disabilities. I’ve pushed to speed up the homebuilding process and lower costs for home-buyers by introducing the Accelerating Homebuilding Act, so we can stop pricing the next generation out of homeownership. And I’ve fought to protect the programs that help our kids succeed by standing up to the Trump administration’s reckless cuts to education, healthcare, and food assistance. I’ve spent every single day in Congress fighting to build a stronger, brighter future for the next generation. But I’ll be honest, I can’t keep up this work on my own. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks so much, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Ready to step into your new role with clarity, confidence, and a plan? MassGOP is offering two December training sessions built specifically for local elected officials who want practical skills, clear guidance on "what's next?", and proven strategies to lead effectively.
