name: Jeff Allen, Campaign Manager @ Team Cooper
subject: Can you help us raise a million dollars this month?
body:
Let me explain why I’m reaching out.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=154%2E124072%2ETnJkgQ)
_I have an update from the team here at Cooper HQ, Peter —_ Our finance team just set our highest, most critical online fundraising goal of the campaign so far. This month marks another end-of-quarter filing deadline — our report will be due once we close out 2025. And we need to raise **one million dollars** online before then. **[Can you donate today to help us get started on meeting this goal? We’re all counting on you.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2606?t=7&akid=154%2E124072%2ETnJkgQ)** **Our team decided to share this target now because we’re approaching the midway mark of the month, but so far, our fundraising isn’t keeping up the pace we need.** It’s important to Roy and to all of us to be clear about where things stand and what this campaign needs. That’s why I want you to know that our fundraising goals are going to keep increasing over the coming months: This is our highest target so far, but we’ll need to raise more and more the closer we get to Election Day. Since we have a public report due after the year ends, our opponent, pundits, and pollsters will be able to see how much we raise this end-of-quarter month and whether we’re meeting our own financial benchmarks. Falling short now is not an option. That’s the kind of miscalculation that could swing momentum in our opponent’s favor — and in a race this close, that could spell defeat. **[A donation of any size right now will help Roy start the midterm election year with the momentum to win. If it fits in your budget, please give before the 15th so we can keep our fundraising numbers on track for the last quarterly filing deadline of 2025.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2606?t=8&akid=154%2E124072%2ETnJkgQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2607?t=9&akid=154%2E124072%2ETnJkgQ)

---

---
Appreciate it,
Jeff Allen
Campaign Manager
Roy Cooper for U.S. Senate
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=154%2E124072%2ETnJkgQ)**

[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=154%2E124072%2ETnJkgQ)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey Derek, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
**_[I’m asking you to split a donation between Senator John Fetterman and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52404?t=1&akid=10476%2E434096%2EJwXnZo)_**
| | | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52404?t=2&akid=10476%2E434096%2EJwXnZo)
---
Thank you.
Mark
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk400-bu-fl-footer&t=3&refcode2=10476_434096_JwXnZo&akid=10476%2E434096%2EJwXnZo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: | | | Hey Derek, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. | | | Thank you. Mark | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Here's what this win tells us:
* Voters in so-called "deep red" areas are tired of being taken for granted.
* When Democrats actually show up and give people something to vote for, they respond.
* The map is changing -- and our imagination needs to change with it.

I'm in this race because I believe Georgia deserves more than chaos, conspiracy theories, and cruelty. We deserve representatives who care about lowering costs, protecting our freedoms, and actually solving problems -- not chasing cable news hits. This week's result isn't just a feel-good headline. It's a blueprint. **_We can organize in places Republicans have written off. We can build real coalitions in communities MTG has ignored. And yes -- we can flip her seat._** [**But that only happens if we invest early and build strong. So if you 're as energized by this news as I am, I'm asking you to step up: Please rush a donation of any amount to my campaign right now.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/KnGVKzGxhUYHwB7j3G4YQw~~/AAPPABA~/QuFbI1kT0A48gBEsPy8VqsHMCSJlv7epNg_KDWeE1DVhb4cdIBCXoatiB0bZMeoOOaLsQM44Sh8k6nuTPXSDn6Zfm1t3KQir_l8xzCMjTtFx489GleDS0F0WwwycZt8kKut6zGftMKkzFxPGb9PZ4q0TnXu-jfh4WeBrT6e2iegPpJSP5rMbRFMHsYikKDqpL9zReAe1f_DjC-7YV3RGoDBu_oqUQrkcUm350nM-YehMITAi0f6_lcy9tR8zhebrTXtwjmbcCZ3lCF4bJz2sgBJg0pJxvku2Y9WIjvUq919IxSWVmwEqkQjkrM-MwX2F) Thank you, Shawn Harris

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Republicans voted against health care. Everything you need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
At the end of this year, the Affordable Care Act tax credits that many people who get health care through the ACA marketplace receive to offset the costs of their plans will expire.
Without those subsidies, health care costs will skyrocket for millions of Americans, including 400,000 Virginians. I’ve heard from countless constituents about the hardship this would create for their families — who are already struggling with high prices on everything else, from their groceries to their mortgages to their heating bills.
Protecting affordable health care is a top priority for Senate Democrats, so we proposed a three-year extension of the ACA tax credits. A clean bill — no agenda other than helping Americans afford their health insurance. 78% of the American public supports this!
But Republicans voted it down.
Failing to extend these credits is a betrayal of the American people, and we will remember next November.
With the GOP refusing to work across the aisle on issues like health care — issues that the American people absolutely deserve meaningful progress on — it’s become crystal clear that the only way to deliver real relief for our constituents is to win big in the midterms next year and retake Democratic control of Congress .
I’m ready to do everything I can to support my colleagues running for re-election, like Mark Warner, and to elect strong Democrats across the country who can defeat Republican senators and flip critical seats.
If you’re with me, now’s the moment to step up and help us lay the foundation for a blue wave next year. Chip in any amount, and let’s take back the Senate in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Thank you for stepping up. I know not everyone can contribute, and I understand — I’m grateful that you’re a part of this team, that you read these updates, and that you stay engaged.
—Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

**From the Desk of Donald J. Trump**
DECEMBER 12TH, 2025

Dear My Fellow American,

Have you ever gotten a letter directly from the President? I doubt it - this never happens!

I've got a mandatory report to submit in just _**72 HOURS,**_ and since this deadline is so mission critical, I wanted to take the time and reach out to you about it personally.

I hate asking my supporters for help, but today is one of those days where I just don't have another option: WE CAN'T HIT OUR PRESIDENTIAL GOAL WITHOUT YOU!

You've always supported me through EVERYTHING, and I'm so grateful. So if you act right now, you will receive an entry ticket for a chance to win a SIGNED MAGA HAT!

Please step up when I need you the most and let's keep delivering BIG WINS for the great American people!

Sincerely,

Donald J. Trump

45th and 47th President of the United States of America

Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you 're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. * Audit of appointees demanded after CCP agent scandal
* Trump's immigration "Gold Card" launches
* Mickey Mouse comes to ChatGPT with a billion dollar Disney deal
* Oracle credit default swaps soar after earnings disaster
* Cracker Barrel is in the crosshairs again, this time over its food

# GOP Fury: Halt NY cash to CCP election meddlers
House leaders **[Elise Stefanik and Jim Jordan blasted](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab46e59-8b06-4410-a84d-58a0c2bfeb92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** New York Gov. Kathy Hochul on Friday, demanding she slash state funding to China-linked nonprofits accused of fueling Beijing's covert election meddling, from TikTok-fueled mayoral wins to violent threats against pro-Taiwan candidates.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab46e59-8b06-4410-a84d-58a0c2bfeb92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **GOP Lawmakers Issue Ultimatum** : Stefanik and Jordan's letter mandates a full audit of Hochul appointees for CCP conflicts and demands records on grant awards to expose foreign influence in state decisions.
* **Hochul Aide 's Treacherous Role**: Hochul's **[now indicted deputy chief of staff](https://substack.com/redirect/95cfcb83-5391-47cb-a093-56200aaff908?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/95cfcb83-5391-47cb-a093-56200aaff908?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Linda Sun allegedly funneled millions of dollars in contracts to family-linked firms, censored Taiwan mentions in official docs, and blocked Taiwanese diplomats from getting meetings all while failing to register as a foreign agent.
* **TikTok 's Partisan Manipulation**: ByteDance-owned platform boosted socialist Zohran Mamdani to NYC mayor-elect victory in 2025 while suppressing rival Andrew Cuomo's content, per explosive media probes.
* **Beijing 's Ruthless Tactics Exposed**: Chinese agents plotted violence against a Tiananmen Square-linked congressional hopeful reportedly telling a private investigator that "violence would be fine" and "Beat him until he cannot run for election." A pro-Taiwan senator was also ousted after attending a "pro-Taiwan reception", cementing New York as CCP's U.S. interference hub.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/016543fa-e6ef-4636-8bc7-467ed5774252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/016543fa-e6ef-4636-8bc7-467ed5774252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/016543fa-e6ef-4636-8bc7-467ed5774252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/016543fa-e6ef-4636-8bc7-467ed5774252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# **Trump 's Gold Card for immigration launches **
In a bold immigration pivot, President Donald Trump's new **[Gold Card visa program](https://substack.com/redirect/fb3b00ac-22e9-4fcf-b27b-5eacddb4fb59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/fb3b00ac-22e9-4fcf-b27b-5eacddb4fb59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)launched Thursday. With a $1 million price tag, elite applicants (after $15,000 vetting fees) will secure swift U.S. citizenship and economic perks, aiming to lure global tycoons over average seekers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb3b00ac-22e9-4fcf-b27b-5eacddb4fb59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Elite Vetting Ensures Quality** : Applicants face unprecedented scrutiny post-$15,000 fee, contrasting with EB-5's lower-income focus that admits earners one-third below U.S. average.
* **Corporate Sponsorship Boosts Hiring** : Companies can nominate staff via Trump Corporate Gold Card, paying $15,000 per employee plus $2 million for expedited approvals.
* **Ongoing Fees Sustain Program** : Annual 1% maintenance and 5% transfer charges apply, with all funds funneling directly to U.S. government coffers for economic infusion as a "gift."
* **Launch Draws Instant Interest** : Dozens of formal applications flooded Trumpcard.gov on debut day, signaling Trump's vision to attract trillions in investment and top-tier innovation.

* * *
* * *
# **Disney drops $1B into OPENAI as Mickey and co come to Sora**
Disney is pouring **[$1 billion into OpenAI](https://substack.com/redirect/9bcc7337-c6ed-43b7-b910-f51b41675de5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and inking a three-year licensing deal to unleash over 200 iconic characters--like Mickey Mouse and Iron Man--into the company's Sora video generator and ChatGPT images, sparking a bold pivot from IP lawsuits to AI-powered storytelling starting next year.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9bcc7337-c6ed-43b7-b910-f51b41675de5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Equity Stake Secured** : Disney's $1 billion investment grants warrants for more OpenAI shares, positioning it as a top customer while deploying ChatGPT tools company-wide for enhanced employee productivity.
* **Iconic Characters Unleashed** : Users will prompt-generate videos and images of Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars figures like Ariel and Darth Vader via Sora--launched amid copyright backlash--but excluding talent likenesses or voices.
* **Robust Safeguards Promised** : OpenAI commits to "granular controls" against harmful or infringing content, addressing Motion Picture Association concerns and Disney's prior lawsuits against AI rivals like Midjourney and Google.
* **Storytelling Revolution Ignited** : CEOs Bob Iger and Sam Altman hail the pact for responsibly expanding fan creations on Disney+, potentially reshaping Hollywood's AI embrace while protecting creators' rights.

* * *
* * *
# Oracle's debt doomsday, AI spend spikes risk, Credit Default Swaps surge
In a **[stark warning for Big Tech's AI frenzy](https://substack.com/redirect/a63cefd7-35ac-4548-b17c-595171410e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, Oracle's credit default swap spread surged to 1.41 percentage points Wednesday--the highest since 2009--after blockbuster earnings revealed voracious data center spending that's torching cash and swelling $100 billion in debt, spooking investors.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a63cefd7-35ac-4548-b17c-595171410e2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Earnings Ignite Credit Alarm** : Post-earnings, Oracle's five-year CDS gauge jumped 0.17 points to 1.41%, signaling eroded investor faith in its debt amid AI-fueled capex surge.
* **Bond Spreads Widen Sharply** : The 2055 6% bond's spread ballooned 20 basis points to 196 bps, reflecting heightened default fears tied to escalating equipment outlays.
* **Hedging Frenzy Grips Markets** : CDS trading volume exploded to $9.2 billion in recent weeks, up from $410 million last year, as banks and funds scramble to shield against Oracle's leverage risks.
* **AI Boom 's Hidden Peril**: Analysts warn Oracle's cash burn and potential high-yield downgrade underscore broader threats to tech giants' ratings in the unrelenting data center arms race.

* * *
* * *
# **Cracker Barrel gets slammed again this time by a WSJ investigation in to its food**
Longtime Cracker Barrel patrons are erupting in fury over chilled biscuits, reheated sides and diluted syrup that betray the chain's rustic charm **[a Wall Street Journal investigation has discovered.](https://substack.com/redirect/ddeafc72-5171-4dbb-b0ed-877b715988b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** This caps a disastrous 2025 for the company that tanked sales by nearly 6% in the latest quarter.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ddeafc72-5171-4dbb-b0ed-877b715988b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Biscuits Gone Cold** : Customers decry shift from fresh-rolled dough to pre-chilled batches baked in bulk, stripping away the signature fluffy texture diners crave.
* **Sides Lose Soul** : Traditional stovetop green beans now reheated in ovens sparked complaints of bland, factory-like meals that **[erode the home-cooked illusion.](https://substack.com/redirect/0f9f7215-e158-436b-84c7-5326b335bbb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Branding Blunder Backlash** : The August 2025 logo overhaul axed the fan favorite Uncle Herschel icon which was later reversed amid uproar, but lingering distrust fueled $14 million in extra marketing costs.
* **CEO Admits Struggle** : Julie Masino vows quality fixes and menu revivals like Campfire Meals, yet warns recovery from trust erosion "will take time" amid slumping earnings.

"The message is clear: If you cross Beijing's red lines, your political career in New York ends" | | | Dec 12 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Gov Hochul under fire as CCP election interference exposed Millions steered to family owned firms of CCP Agent/Deputy Chief of Staff Audit of appointees demanded after CCP agent scandal Trump's immigration "Gold Card" launches Mickey Mouse comes to ChatGPT with a billion dollar Disney deal Oracle credit default swaps soar after earnings disaster Cracker Barrel is in the crosshairs again, this time over its food Today 's markets + assets: 🔴 DOW: 48555.27 (⬇️ 0.31%) 🔴 S&P: 6837.32 (⬇️ 0.92%) 🔴 NASDAQ: 23254.39 (⬇️ 1.44%) ⚠ ️✅CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 16.23 (⬆️ 9.29%) ✅ Gold: $4328.60 (⬆️ 0.35%) 🔴 Silver: $61.96 (⬇️ 4.03%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $90,180 (⬇️ 2.43%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism GOP Fury: Halt NY cash to CCP election meddlers House leaders New York Gov. Kathy Hochul on Friday, demanding she slash state funding to China-linked nonprofits accused of fueling Beijing's covert election meddling, from TikTok-fueled mayoral wins to violent threats against pro-Taiwan candidates. | | ---|---|--- GOP Lawmakers Issue Ultimatum : Stefanik and Jordan's letter mandates a full audit of Hochul appointees for CCP conflicts and demands records on grant awards to expose foreign influence in state decisions. Hochul Aide 's Treacherous Role: Hochul's Sun allegedly funneled millions of dollars in contracts to family-linked firms, censored Taiwan mentions in official docs, and blocked Taiwanese diplomats from getting meetings all while failing to register as a foreign agent. TikTok 's Partisan Manipulation: ByteDance-owned platform boosted socialist Zohran Mamdani to NYC mayor-elect victory in 2025 while suppressing rival Andrew Cuomo's content, per explosive media probes. Beijing 's Ruthless Tactics Exposed: Chinese agents plotted violence against a Tiananmen Square-linked congressional hopeful reportedly telling a private investigator that "violence would be fine" and "Beat him until he cannot run for election." A pro-Taiwan senator was also ousted after attending a "pro-Taiwan reception", cementing New York as CCP's U.S. interference hub. Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle Led by a managing partner who has been Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation. Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits. We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide. | | ---|---|--- Trump 's Gold Card for immigration launches In a bold immigration pivot, President Donald Trump's new Thursday. With a $1 million price tag, elite applicants (after $15,000 vetting fees) will secure swift U.S. citizenship and economic perks, aiming to lure global tycoons over average seekers. | | ---|---|--- Elite Vetting Ensures Quality : Applicants face unprecedented scrutiny post-$15,000 fee, contrasting with EB-5's lower-income focus that admits earners one-third below U.S. average. Corporate Sponsorship Boosts Hiring : Companies can nominate staff via Trump Corporate Gold Card, paying $15,000 per employee plus $2 million for expedited approvals. Ongoing Fees Sustain Program : Annual 1% maintenance and 5% transfer charges apply, with all funds funneling directly to U.S. government coffers for economic infusion as a "gift." Launch Draws Instant Interest : Dozens of formal applications flooded Trumpcard.gov on debut day, signaling Trump's vision to attract trillions in investment and top-tier innovation. Disney drops $1B into OPENAI as Mickey and co come to Sora Disney is pouring and inking a three-year licensing deal to unleash over 200 iconic characters--like Mickey Mouse and Iron Man--into the company's Sora video generator and ChatGPT images, sparking a bold pivot from IP lawsuits to AI-powered storytelling starting next year. | | ---|---|--- Massive Equity Stake Secured : Disney's $1 billion investment grants warrants for more OpenAI shares, positioning it as a top customer while deploying ChatGPT tools company-wide for enhanced employee productivity. Iconic Characters Unleashed : Users will prompt-generate videos and images of Disney, Marvel, Pixar, and Star Wars figures like Ariel and Darth Vader via Sora--launched amid copyright backlash--but excluding talent likenesses or voices. Robust Safeguards Promised : OpenAI commits to "granular controls" against harmful or infringing content, addressing Motion Picture Association concerns and Disney's prior lawsuits against AI rivals like Midjourney and Google. Storytelling Revolution Ignited : CEOs Bob Iger and Sam Altman hail the pact for responsibly expanding fan creations on Disney+, potentially reshaping Hollywood's AI embrace while protecting creators' rights. Oracle's debt doomsday, AI spend spikes risk, Credit Default Swaps surge In a , Oracle's credit default swap spread surged to 1.41 percentage points Wednesday--the highest since 2009--after blockbuster earnings revealed voracious data center spending that's torching cash and swelling $100 billion in debt, spooking investors. | | ---|---|--- Earnings Ignite Credit Alarm : Post-earnings, Oracle's five-year CDS gauge jumped 0.17 points to 1.41%, signaling eroded investor faith in its debt amid AI-fueled capex surge. Bond Spreads Widen Sharply : The 2055 6% bond's spread ballooned 20 basis points to 196 bps, reflecting heightened default fears tied to escalating equipment outlays. Hedging Frenzy Grips Markets : CDS trading volume exploded to $9.2 billion in recent weeks, up from $410 million last year, as banks and funds scramble to shield against Oracle's leverage risks. AI Boom 's Hidden Peril: Analysts warn Oracle's cash burn and potential high-yield downgrade underscore broader threats to tech giants' ratings in the unrelenting data center arms race. Cracker Barrel gets slammed again this time by a WSJ investigation in to its food Longtime Cracker Barrel patrons are erupting in fury over chilled biscuits, reheated sides and diluted syrup that betray the chain's rustic charm This caps a disastrous 2025 for the company that tanked sales by nearly 6% in the latest quarter. | | ---|---|--- Biscuits Gone Cold : Customers decry shift from fresh-rolled dough to pre-chilled batches baked in bulk, stripping away the signature fluffy texture diners crave. Sides Lose Soul : Traditional stovetop green beans now reheated in ovens sparked complaints of bland, factory-like meals that Branding Blunder Backlash : The August 2025 logo overhaul axed the fan favorite Uncle Herschel icon which was later reversed amid uproar, but lingering distrust fueled $14 million in extra marketing costs. CEO Admits Struggle : Julie Masino vows quality fixes and menu revivals like Campfire Meals, yet warns recovery from trust erosion "will take time" amid slumping earnings. Peter,

Right now, $9.7 million worth of contraceptives—including IUDs, implants, pills, and condoms originally intended for women in low-income countries—are slated for destruction on the Trump administration's orders. At the Center, we've:
* Supported a Congressional staff briefing to raise awareness on the issue
* Joined 75 advocacy groups in a letter to Secretary Rubio opposing the destruction
* Filed a FOIA request to uncover the State Department's internal communications

clean_body: A preventable humanitarian crisis | | | | ---|--- | Peter, Right now, $9.7 million worth of contraceptives—including IUDs, implants, pills, and condoms originally intended for women in low-income countries—are slated for destruction on the Trump administration's orders. | Across the world, women and girls rely on access to contraception to plan their futures, protect their health, and save their lives. The Center for Reproductive Rights is fighting to stop the destruction and demand accountability... At the Center, we've: Supported a Congressional staff briefing to raise awareness on the issue Joined 75 advocacy groups in a letter to Secretary Rubio opposing the destruction Filed a FOIA request to uncover the State Department's internal communications Endorsed the Saving Lives and Taxpayer Dollars Act (S.2252) that would ensure foreign assistance commodities reach their intended beneficiaries Thank you for raising your voice to defend global reproductive health and freedom. In solidarity, Mariakarla Nodarse Venancio Global Advocacy Adviser | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Phil Weiser
subject: Trump is not above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
No matter what he says.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121152618/588530298/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_RR_PetersTrump_121225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEwNzhhNC04NWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z43nstwYoIdIbk04CjwZhaKnSSzHnEmIHOin8eceC_w=&emci=b74561b3-7ed7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9c1078a4-85d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520) No one is above the law. Not private citizens. _Not even the president._ So when Trump goes online and suggests he can grant Tina Peters a pardon, you need to know one thing: Trump has **no constitutional power to issue this pardon.** Tina Peters is in Colorado state prison because she broke the law and was convicted by a jury of her peers. One of the U.S. Constitution’s basic principles is that the President’s pardon power is for federal crimes only, not state crimes. **Trump is not above the law.** He thinks he can pressure and bully people to his will. That will not work here. We have sued him 45 times (and counting!), and are winning again and again. I will always stand up for you, fight for what is right, and protect Colorado. **[I’m not afraid of Donald Trump or his political pressure. I stand with the rule of law. And I will _always_ fight for what’s right. So folks, can I count on you to chip in $10 to my campaign for governor today? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121152619/588530299/-198793374?amount=10&refcode=em_WEI_FR_RR_PetersTrump_121225&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEwNzhhNC04NWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z43nstwYoIdIbk04CjwZhaKnSSzHnEmIHOin8eceC_w=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121152620/588530300/-198793374?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_WEI_FR_RR_PetersTrump_121225&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEwNzhhNC04NWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z43nstwYoIdIbk04CjwZhaKnSSzHnEmIHOin8eceC_w=)

clean_body: No matter what he says. No one is above the law. Not private citizens. Not even the president. So when Trump goes online and suggests he can grant Tina Peters a pardon, you need to know one thing: Trump has no constitutional power to issue this pardon. Tina Peters is in Colorado state prison because she broke the law and was convicted by a jury of her peers. One of the U.S. Constitution’s basic principles is that the President’s pardon power is for federal crimes only, not state crimes. Trump is not above the law. He thinks he can pressure and bully people to his will. That will not work here. We have sued him 45 times (and counting!), and are winning again and again. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

_Here's an example:_

You're a 62-year-old who has put money away all your life.

You've done so to secure a comfortable retirement, on your own terms.

But you also want to pass your retirement savings balance to your loved ones.

This includes your 401(k)s... traditional IRAs... even your Roth IRAs.

Of course you want your hard-earned (and growing) money to last as long as it can, and — just as importantly — to get taxed as little as possible.

Better brace yourself.

The rules we've grown accustomed to are getting completely turned upside down by Congress.

[Here what to do](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=07d8579c42ba45dd92d0588c563507bd&_e=aLQA_UR7VniB_IQGnY-ps0M4nXHW4y7LfXg1DbHOqoCnq-PU241SCVU8r2eocfTHEE-7pdzDE2JhxL8jeyIJg5SE22eLvoGyJcnlEabLZGH1yBTHDq5f-0Nmg8PLElniWYUSF02FDutim-uH-50ao7IYKOGINln9BEImAgus254KfucK2T3esjTAMXs10jhbVhShyXOWBbWvdMuyqxr2VH93STyXqozLzAgqDyOW60w5i0EqCX83cHlKbnHV5IKmt5Lv9Ohm7IatMqZsdiuHx1FuJIor8ILPfAf___0PWDWerpgFlz_uVkWOcEuHqcea18wWGFB3RoXgOM9wllIMN_27aZNVnKbVz9M5WTTKBhyZIcaxbIGU_LX7YDg69UMQEt3FKB6nZNOEvdInYycNZDg8v8HrIrlLBUAlPBRFb9xt9xSg_1zmS2YPlScTTsy54Zi_0rh20Oj8ezntu_BHGsKefAD297SPtv-cgl6I4A8PcUTa4LLK2CreT4p_FycYXckh4KPT9l1lKoILyhlbxM6a5pmz52Ie_U74F-xbizainXc2Y6NFoREEwtb0c0wmwaCAP3W_BAM8egQ7yVGHKJa-zwKvdNWE5kYQRKEPxYObdtyfHYlFZ7bsdAw8mMyl)

Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | paints an ugly picture for American retirement accounts. | Here's an example: You're a 62-year-old who has put money away all your life. You've done so to secure a comfortable retirement, on your own terms. But you also want to pass your retirement savings balance to your loved ones. This includes your 401(k)s... traditional IRAs... even your Roth IRAs. Of course you want your hard-earned (and growing) money to last as long as it can, and — just as importantly — to get taxed as little as possible. Better brace yourself. The rules we've grown accustomed to are getting completely turned upside down by Congress. This email has been sent to you by a third party on behalf of Eagle Financial Publications. ---
What just happened in Indiana is not random. It’s the latest chapter in Donald Trump’s plan to rig our democracy and steal congressional seats ahead of the 2026 midterms. | **FIRST**
Trump pressured Republican leaders in Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina to rewrite their maps to cement GOP control. **THEN**
The Supreme Court rewarded Texas with a green light for its gerrymander — a map that could hand Republicans _five more seats in 2026._ **NOW**
Trump and MAGA Mike Johnson are trying to export that playbook to any state where they think they can get away with it, including Indiana.
---
**But after weeks of Trump’s intimidation campaign and public threats against Republican lawmakers, something remarkable happened last night: Indiana’s Senate _rejected_ the map.**
Look, Trump and his MAGA buddies know they can’t win on ideas, on vision, or on the strength of their agenda. So they’re trying to win by manipulating the system, silencing voters, and _cheating their way into keeping power in 2026._
At the heart of our democracy is a simple belief: Elections decide leaders. Every vote is sacred. Voters — not politicians, not courts, not Trump — choose who holds power in this country.
But Trump has already signaled he plans to take this fight to as many Republican-controlled states as possible, and he’ll keep pushing until he drowns out the voices of voters and rigs the 2026 midterms before a single vote is cast.
**That’s why we’re not resting on our laurels. Yes, we had an incredible election cycle — and Prop 50 in California gives Democrats a tool to fight back. But we know this moment demands more from all of us.**
**[We’re gearing up for major fights in states like Texas and beyond next year, and we need the resources to meet this moment. Will you chip in any amount to help us fight back against Trump’s attacks on our democracy and build the power we need heading into 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121152950/588531185/2105508926?refcode=ea.29c39c9d-85d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.29c39c9d-85d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5YzM5YzlkLTg1ZDctZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sVSxWkooC3_cmzHOb5Bum_YOoDwvelR0W9oWQmwS3KU=)**

clean_body: Trump will try again. We have to be ready. | What just happened in Indiana is not random. It’s the latest chapter in Donald Trump’s plan to rig our democracy and steal congressional seats ahead of the 2026 midterms. | FIRST Trump pressured Republican leaders in Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina to rewrite their maps to cement GOP control. THEN The Supreme Court rewarded Texas with a green light for its gerrymander — a map that could hand Republicans five more seats in 2026. NOW Trump and MAGA Mike Johnson are trying to export that playbook to any state where they think they can get away with it, including Indiana. But after weeks of Trump’s intimidation campaign and public threats against Republican lawmakers, something remarkable happened last night: Indiana’s Senate rejected the map. Look, Trump and his MAGA buddies know they can’t win on ideas, on vision, or on the strength of their agenda. So they’re trying to win by manipulating the system, silencing voters, and cheating their way into keeping power in 2026. At the heart of our democracy is a simple belief: Elections decide leaders. Every vote is sacred. Voters — not politicians, not courts, not Trump — choose who holds power in this country. But Trump has already signaled he plans to take this fight to as many Republican-controlled states as possible, and he’ll keep pushing until he drowns out the voices of voters and rigs the 2026 midterms before a single vote is cast. That’s why we’re not resting on our laurels. Yes, we had an incredible election cycle — and Prop 50 in California gives Democrats a tool to fight back. name: State Democrats HQ
subject: the four major toss up Senate races to watch in 2026 »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#

**Cook Political Report has FOUR U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026:** _Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina._
---

**Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff** — _the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections._ The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. **[DEFEND GEORGIA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98552?refcode=em20251212-9827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9827%2E614464%2EvrFRl1)**
---

**Maine’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Susan Collins** — _the most vulnerable Republican in the 2026 midterm elections._ Cook Political Report recently UPGRADED this race from Leans Republican to TOSS UP, signaling that Democrats have a major opportunity to flip this seat. Now, we need to make sure we carry the momentum we've seen for Democrats in Maine + across the country all the way to next November. **[FLIP MAINE: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98552?refcode=em20251212-9827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9827%2E614464%2EvrFRl1)**
---

**Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters,** who announced earlier this year that he will retire in 2026. _The good news is that Democrats currently hold every statewide seat in Michigan._ But defending this critical Democrat-held Senate seat won't be easy. _Last year, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race was one of the closest in the country._ So now, we can absolutely expect the GOP to go all-in to win this open seat. **[DEFEND MICHIGAN: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98552?refcode=em20251212-9827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9827%2E614464%2EvrFRl1)**
---

**North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026.** We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. _But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race_ — a year away from the actual election! If this is any indication, the GOP will spend BIG to stop Democrats from flipping this Senate seat next year. **[FLIP NORTH CAROLINA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98552?refcode=em20251212-9827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9827%2E614464%2EvrFRl1)**

clean_body: Cook Political Report has FOUR U.S. Senate races currently rated as TOSS UPS for 2026: Georgia. Maine. Michigan. North Carolina. Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Jon Ossoff — the most vulnerable Democrat in the 2026 midterm elections. The GOP will undoubtedly do everything they can to win this seat back for a Republican. They’ll spend millions upon millions of dollars. They’ll come up with all sorts of outlandish attacks. Anything to solidify their majority in the Senate next year. Maine’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Susan Collins — the most vulnerable Republican in the 2026 midterm elections. Cook Political Report recently UPGRADED this race from Leans Republican to TOSS UP, signaling that Democrats have a major opportunity to flip this seat. Now, we need to make sure we carry the momentum we've seen for Democrats in Maine + across the country all the way to next November. Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters, who announced earlier this year that he will retire in 2026. The good news is that Democrats currently hold every statewide seat in Michigan. But defending this critical Democrat-held Senate seat won't be easy. Last year, Michigan’s U.S. Senate race was one of the closest in the country. So now, we can absolutely expect the GOP to go all-in to win this open seat. North Carolina’s GOP-held U.S. Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities for 2026. We have a strong Democratic candidate in former governor Roy Cooper, who has a record of winning + delivering for the people of North Carolina. But outside groups are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this Senate race — a year away from the actual election! If this is any indication, the GOP will spend BIG to stop Democrats from flipping this Senate seat next year. Today, we’re asking for your help to defend the Democratic candidates running in all of these battleground elections and more, Peter. name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: SURVEY: Do you agree with me? (1 question)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
We are conducting a flash poll of our top supporters regarding the heated debate over School Choice and Vouchers. Please take ten seconds to officially go on the record with the campaign. [ ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/N9HR9tJ6otRcq0xdjncfN22VQGRMrd36GZh1h7CKo86HlXsORxTfdtIbNsd6NARnQ9lkklE2xCtPHU0bEAGYSu_1axm-LLA2AST42w3m0kvg63TY1c14PyWSXDC7qINkWkaYGpBma5PzrJH9MGWy3mvCswpBAHCq9lFtSJ-X8U0d-KC-5tI1kuiEYOhvtU79jbwuwRGKWUoeMr3UFrSUvCOMgdFrsfPGwZ9BcmPN4pfnlZ5GvIeeW2POzgE4QWRgoSNhL14AtQ_GLIljf1CHkJQX5KQMM7x0Kyvhe8WVB0C85geOBHHm7pVfYH5uJrrZj15AoPgBDwiaHZynRK_9_lKz6PIZkqOGQkehDee8KW7kz6jZgZrmStFwNPeBu66XFBi3YgI79-HC0o00eDtTyj4oes2bAQLq2bgPkGuMU2uRrKNJ7-X8JAfcrU0kQuyv_tb1_MrteIzwoykWAp3PXBnK65KxXwsmEpnFYIzAMUIn9vKEIQHX364IgO0P3Vhv-KjFIZ6-uaWBLoHsU5hER8LkPNhaOh4PH0ifw1aAxN2m/kJ4k8ZXHgJe-qryahY6KGTq0CTDyXWRl/15)
---
Peter,

A few days ago, I walked alone into the California School Boards Association conference in Sacramento, encircled by career politicians and union allies like Antonio Villaraigosa, Betty Yee, and Tony Thurmond.

By the way, their combined poll numbers aren’t close to ours.

I looked out at a room filled with members of the "education establishment" and, instead of seeking their approval, I told them the truth:

California needs school vouchers.

You could hear a pin drop.

While every other candidate on that stage scrambled to support teachers' unions and the status quo, I stood for **School Choice and Parents’ Rights.**

As an American, a Californian, and a taxpayer, your zip code should not determine where you educate your children.

Here’s exactly what that means: send your kids to the school that’s best for them. Make schools compete for every student. **Competition will save California’s failing public schools.**

That’s what I believe. But what do you think? Should California have school choice? Answer below and let me know:
[ YES, PUBLIC SCHOOLS MUST COMPETE ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/F6rKGNk1w2E1YH0VOwwOycr887U7rEZNHZiHkkQXTzhmcHLhAAuUFSj7M8UlHrz14iwYqBLyrJ9lmEViH6c15uNdedEaCXLlGZUgznSy308wqt7R-TH5V0Jf6le2_PMMAl3jLIg6S1cbpARJL2ji9CG7u9y8B0NSlhgHhyi-3bI0km_SBC61fEpvwNlJlaxTngTE5z9vQPTLjKjFX81I6YQP5bPwJxvlR_U2Z-JWUXe7Leb_3nzUlJY3fNuFbkroYsLTw7HOaQB8xKYd25OYSylYIPX3VroM6RPNPK5ZhmcOArbT-FzkBQnfsiRWm2I8vmyR7eF3i8L1cbiw7pMPzNQcAra7I0MYel8Aj3YT2eFN2mFfgSCbKpxwxcKB8sngT2ec04DXt5WHJp8u8bpLWlA59dd1m2UaE9D2xrhHecvl0xwzgT4dMWKL5c2Eei_9mJsh_GqYRjmv4wTTIc8FbFiE72rxXewQ07oziSSWKBJbEud7jZtYr8GtYnn_k65vuvhAh-616ArtoA-xVL4os8OwUytn09KlaRTCHNs_t1t3/pldRjVGYVBMmOUdcuh7wTffxN0RNxLPg/15)
OR
[ NO, KEEP THE STATUS QUO ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/Wu2yhsQbVoilTnUL_UXpsacOIS_UeQRj5XpsKJBwKtE4-nAszaGdoa5MbKqHniWGd-e_W0MWkzlu8k_iQ7WJjw-k-_-AP2Xj0AP7lRAfPcoMTx8MXEfgyboxe1BSFOjmM3UHi6tZe09Fe89yxCkqOB5Tlu0Z-Yo1-setGXsvkR57dafQkVJxf65t4YiDhQT1wk1X_LhK1_lvtOVMlxp_nkv1XWNYhDC0cy7fuJZ7j-pN-BApuHPArdgRGOHB1f_nxLDPcDuI-z4zH5DVLKjDbjiWYtpRrbV0Erh0TfC8qihzNybZCa_wNiZkqqaJiYmmP6bfvK39LvWmRqqleFn_CK1qAM7pzl7gFj5eoz5zo8gtUljvGV6Zd93BvBxpvuP3__SjgwzsxvMVbnGF9nsZmcdXhc4I4RM88NPoNPH7IU3gpJFufemJR1ua5WcmosJeLrvg9tje6piFSzN26rf2hiaZMRACS0NTVBkrz1JYyWjks_oXCoE1CTXludNHMstCG_FGkrR1JE-l-sCofQp0kaR3tNQlyKC_HIEQpPpeZw58/BUjxCp3CN5a6OXvUJ9QHtYQ1d1qscybn/15)

Help me defend our kids.

Thank you,

**Sheriff Chad Bianco**
Republican Candidate for California Governor

| PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095

---

3649 Mission Inn Ave., 2nd Floor Rotunda, Riverside, CA 92501

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: A story from my first weeks in Detroit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1425%2E251025%2E9svoap ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1425%2E251025%2E9svoap ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

I want to tell you a story from my time rebuilding Detroit’s Health
Department.

When I first walked into the department, it was a shell of what it used to
be. After bankruptcy, the city had handed its public-health
responsibilities to an underfunded nonprofit.

By the time I took the job, Detroit Animal Control was operating out of a
crumbling 1927 building, understaffed, exhausted, and overwhelmed.

I’ll be honest, taking on animal control wasn’t something I expected when
I agreed to rebuild a health department. But public health is about people
and animals, and this was a public-safety crisis.

Hundreds of dogs were being abandoned. Families were afraid to let their
kids walk to school. Nearly 80% animals brought into the facility were
being euthanized — a heartbreaking reality of an under-resourced
department that simply couldn’t keep up.

This situation made one thing painfully clear: When our government fails
to meet its responsibilities, we all suffer. So, we got to work.

* We raised salaries so we could fully staff the team.
* We moved into a new facility.
* We rewrote outdated protocols.
* We partnered with community advocates instead of ignoring them.

By the end of my tenure, we had flipped the numbers, and nearly 80% of the
animals we took in were finding loving families.

That experience taught me something fundamental: Good government isn’t
abstract, and it only works when the people running it put human beings
first.

Just like we turned around a broken animal care system in Detroit, we can
turn around a broken political system in Washington, but it only happens
when people power the work.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251212-1-ak.Sk7Yx-&amount=10&refcode=em20251212-1422&t=1004&akid=1425%2E251025%2E9svoap ]Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us do
it?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251212-1-ak.Sk7Yx-&amount=10&refcode=em20251212-1422&t=1023&akid=1425%2E251025%2E9svoap ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1425%2E251025%2E9svoap
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71009?t=10&akid=23727%2E4449941%2ETu8R1c)
* * *
Donald Trump is acting like a [**DICTATOR**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71009?t=11&akid=23727%2E4449941%2ETu8R1c) and Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and Neil Gorsuch are empowering him every step of the way.

Over and over again he pushes the boundaries of the law and then [**DEFIES**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71009?t=12&akid=23727%2E4449941%2ETu8R1c) the rulings of judges simply because he doesn't agree with them. # [MAGA Isn't A Movement Anymore -- It's A Right-Wing Bloodlust Ritual](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181352697&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzUyNjk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NjY0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2ODE1ODQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gpJAI92Brj8l_XI54KLCleUbSmnD0S_CfkvHN---V9M)
### Cliff, Lawrence and Carlyn Beccia on tyrants, denial, and the cost of looking away
| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge), [Lawrence Winnerman](https://substack.com/@lwinner), [Carlyn Beccia](https://substack.com/@carlynbeccia), and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Dec 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)| | [](https://substack.com/@lwinner)| | [](https://substack.com/@carlynbeccia)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---|---|---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181352697&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzUyNjk3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTU2NjQ5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzY4MTU4NDk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ADOS1wMmc7MZlb7DNiGDU-DHapZ9s6lvLOYRTwphqmI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181352697&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzUyNjk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NjY0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2ODE1ODQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gpJAI92Brj8l_XI54KLCleUbSmnD0S_CfkvHN---V9M&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181352697&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzUyNjk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NjY0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2ODE1ODQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gpJAI92Brj8l_XI54KLCleUbSmnD0S_CfkvHN---V9M)
---
| | [](https://substack..pT3idswlCzcSiIZhK07JU3qVOnWok5NldypImALR1HQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/maga-isnt-a-movement-anymore-its?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49563dab-e6ca-4116-9bf2-bb7b4acbba20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
Folks, this was one of those shows that reminds me exactly why we built Blue Amp Media in the first place.
[David Shuster](https://open.substack.com/users/16891317-david-shuster?utm_source=mentions) had the day off -- and trust me, the man earned it -- so I was lucky enough to be joined by our COO and _**The Daily Whatever Show**_ host, [Lawrence Winnerman](https://open.substack.com/users/314034871-lawrence-winnerman?utm_source=mentions), stepping in as co-host. And let me say this plainly: the operation you see here every day doesn't run without Lawrence. Period. The guy keeps the trains running, the lights on, and somehow still finds time to be sharp, funny, and relentlessly curious on air.
And then there was our guest: [Carlyn Beccia](https://open.substack.com/users/6921402-carlyn-beccia?utm_source=mentions).
If you don't already know her work, fix that immediately.
Carlyn is one of those rare writers who manages to be _deeply_ informed without ever being dull, fierce without being shrill, and genuinely funny while talking about some of the darkest chapters of human history. She's a historian, an author of more than a dozen books, an illustrator, and the mind behind _[The Grim Historian](https://substack.com/redirect/c22685b3-5309-4119-a293-272287145f6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and _[Conversations with Carlyn](https://substack.com/redirect/415a9081-b8d7-4272-be7e-63a4b5b5355c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ on Substack -- and she brings all of that firepower to every conversation.
* * *
Subscribe to Blue Amp Media for free!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ByhMpiN-zpjDcbfLktd2Y07uykcEcJQpziJQzC0bP1c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=181352697)
* * *
We started, as one does these days, with the breaking and frankly alarming news around Venezuela, authoritarian escalation, and what it looks like when regimes start to panic. Carlyn's recent writing on "thirsty tyrants" -- leaders in decline who thrash violently as power slips through their fingers -- became a central anchor for the discussion. She laid out the historical parallels with clarity and precision, walking us through how authoritarians never go quietly, how cruelty escalates, and how the danger often peaks _after_ the cracks start to show.
What makes Carlyn exceptional is that she doesn't just cite history -- she _interprets_ it. From Roman emperors to modern strongmen, she connected the dots between psychological collapse, political paranoia, and the weaponization of fear. Lawrence jumped in with a citation from Carlyn's sharp observation about Emperor Domitian -- a comparison that landed uncomfortably close to home -- and the three of us unpacked how "competitive authoritarianism" slides into something much darker if people stop paying attention.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49563dab-e6ca-4116-9bf2-bb7b4acbba20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But the show wasn't just heavy -- it was human.
Carlyn talked about the concept of the "dual state," where everyday life appears normal for most people while targeted groups are slowly stripped of rights. It's one of those ideas that, once you hear it, you can't unsee it. And she said something that stuck with me: authoritarianism thrives on people deciding they "don't do politics." Indifference isn't neutral -- it's fuel.
Then, because Carlyn is Carlyn, the conversation took a turn that somehow made perfect sense: goats, monkeys, history's strangest medical cures, and why some animals are easier to love than others. We talked about her books -- brilliant, weird, deeply smart books -- like _They Lost Their Heads_ and _Monsters_ , which teach history and science through curiosity, humor, and just the right amount of "wait, what?!"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37d165c2-10b1-40a8-b765-108a774b9a40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
She writes the books she wished she'd had as a kid. Books that respect young readers' intelligence. Books that don't sanitize history or talk down to anyone. And maybe most importantly, books that offer boys -- especially boys -- better role models than the garbage being fed to them by algorithmic outrage machines.
By the end of the show, we'd covered authoritarianism, empathy, media consolidation, history's missing body parts, sex education, and why kindness still matters -- which, honestly, feels about right for an episode of _Amped Up_.
Carlyn Beccia is a force. Smart, fearless, funny as hell, and deeply humane. This won't be her last time on the show -- not if I have anything to say about it. And I do! It's my show; it's right there in the title.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49563dab-e6ca-4116-9bf2-bb7b4acbba20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
| A guest post by| [Carlyn Beccia](https://substack.com/@carlynbeccia?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Carlyn Beccia is an award-winning author, illustrator, and columnist. Latest books -- 10 AT 10, MONSTROUS: THE LORE, GORE, & SCIENCE, and THEY LOST THEIR HEADS. Contact: CarlynBeccia.com[Subscribe to Carlyn](https://substack.com/redirect/f157215a-8f4b-43d1-90a5-b26e01621e7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---
| | | [Like](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181352697&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzUyNjk3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTU2NjQ5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzY4MTU4NDk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ADOS1wMmc7MZlb7DNiGDU-DHapZ9s6lvLOYRTwphqmI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181352697&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzUyNjk3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU1NjY0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2ODE1ODQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gpJAI92Brj8l_XI54KLCleUbSmnD0S_CfkvHN---V9M&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

subject: is there anything we can say?

[Rachel Maddow regrets not pressing Kamala Harris more during interview about '107 Days' memoir](https://substack.com/redirect/48a4753b-9c75-47a4-91e5-733a0b030705?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Fox News
[Top parental rights group targets key policy that could quickly score Trump administration a victory](https://substack.com/redirect/08e6270c-a0c6-4cfb-b0d2-9901816e6ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Fox News
[Disobeying Military Orders Is Full of Risk](https://substack.com/redirect/bf5317e3-1bfa-4a49-9baf-3bd0d8ed9d4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Wall Street Journal
[Kamala Harris Isn't Ready To Be Written Off](https://substack.com/redirect/dbf880ec-7685-45be-ab18-b95abe8c35b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The New York Times
[Trump admin set to scrutinize foreign visitors' social media history](https://substack.com/redirect/aca1f947-f911-4426-abdc-9994406feafd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Post

## Next week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up next week, Tuesday I'm joined by House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan. Then Thursday we've got a great panel to break down the latest, featuring Caroline Downey, Lyndsay Keith, and Adam Guillette. Finally, Friday tune in for my conversation with Penny Nance. Turn on notification so you don't miss it!
## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/3e76ee28-8d05-4525-bba8-837d31171b58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
## Audio podcast help
If you watch the show on YouTube, Rumble or X, please do me a HUGE favor -- can you click the link [here](https://substack.com/redirect/98504cde-c384-45b8-9353-93121e3fe6f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), hit subscribe and give us a 5-star review on Apple. It's super helpful. Thank you!
[Subscribe and review HERE!](https://substack.com/redirect/98504cde-c384-45b8-9353-93121e3fe6f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Sponsor links...
Head over to my new page, where you can find all the show discounts and codes!
[Sponsors and more...](https://substack.com/redirect/a8b98b9c-3266-48b7-859e-11bfd7551aaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Call Bishop Gold!
Gold is over $4000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included.
[Learn more here](https://substack.com/redirect/0eb382c3-0880-4b58-8100-4f653d5a9636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/79b8e5a9-5280-4675-82dc-cac56f4678d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Why the Venezuela strikes matter
Americans are tired of drugs flowing across the border with no consequences.
That's why Trump is actually doing something about it.
Over the last couple months, the administration initiated a [series of strikes against drug vessels in the Caribbean](https://substack.com/redirect/2fbb4bf2-70b3-4a4f-b526-92962a5da7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Of course, the usual culprits were up in arms.
Democrats and the mainstream media were outraged that Trump would take such decisive action.
They're painting the targets as innocent victims in fishing boats.
But what's the real story?
These strikes were precision operations that targeted strategic drug cartel operations.
Translation: they're helping to make us safer--and polling shows that Americans are on board.
Let's break it down...

**Here’s how we started:** Jocelyn is in the lead in several recent polls. Momentum is on her side — so the GOP is starting to play dirty.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1103%2E181023%2E6LPtk-)

name: Matthew Frohlich, Executive Director
subject: Initiative Drop-off Locations - Let's Get All Three Initiatives Across the Finish Line (12.12.2025)
body:
Initiative Drop-off Locations - Let's Get All Three Initiatives Across the Finish Line (12.12.2025)

| | | | | [|
---](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b615560d77&e=6a281f566d)
| | | | | |

Greetings All—

We are getting close to the finish line on all three statewide initiatives, and I want to provide a clear update as we enter the final stretch.

**Voter ID, IL26-126
** Signature gathering is nearing completion, and teams across the state are closing the remaining gap.

**Protecting Girls Sports, IL26-638
** Momentum remains strong, and several regions are completing their final collections.

**Restoring Parental Rights, IL26-001
** Engagement has been high, and coordinators are confirming the final sheets.

The Washington State Republican Party (WAGOP) is partnering with [Let’s Go Washington](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b07cdcf535&e=6a281f566d) to ensure your completed petitions are collected and delivered correctly. They have an updated list of drop-off locations on their [website](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0c29107085&e=6a281f566d).[
](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4b81c5d907&e=6a281f566d)This page will continue to be updated until collections end, so please rely on that site for the most accurate and current drop-off information. Their team will handle transport of all packets to the correct destination on time.

If you have petitions at your county party headquarters and you are not listed as a drop-off location, please reach out to me. I will get our field directors in contact with you so we can move those packets and get every signature across the finish line.

Please turn everything in as soon as possible. With flooding creating travel challenges in some regions, early drop offs are especially important.
I hope everyone is having a great Christmas season. Let’s push all three of these initiatives over the finish line together—what better way to start off the new year.

Thank you for everything you do.

Matt Brown
WAGOP Political Director
Text: 509.255.7116
E-mail: Matt.Brown@Wagop.org

---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=64d8d3f6c2&e=6a281f566d)
---
[](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=057209732a&e=6a281f566d)
