name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate.
body:
Y’all, it’s Jasmine.
I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.
Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back.
But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap.
That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Real Texas? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jasmine Crockett and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1&amount=25]
Let me be clear: When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink. I don’t back down.
Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.
If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jasmine?refcode=120825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jasmine Crockett and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:

Thank you,
Jasmine

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=MNpaV5aRamrFNnhvSTyLZxCwAeE95iTkcGAYw0uFgT9OINDqq5J0w4lA0puZOHcElJyCuKpP5HqRvustUaRy8zpncwgYyvkmRBIK%2F6knSfh%2BRt8VVRBQTtH1rrpUDqS3doUUKcrRQSM2ptCA4WuX9HG6Ta7D1laLneIVnZYS1b6H1MfPu%2BOGxXclZiafVtOkUrJEYlyLSR4%2BD5avUPaTkl7fcKU1q5uOAEpwMZCbkpY7RKuiG20giWgh%2BgOO%2FfQGTQ%2F7zJBWiQLybuiTwH5TQ6bG6ZtIi024ALrpWhWplt%2BXmPYIY5%2FfGrKiWakDAMB89%2F7WZITrdMxvqqoVgcDSdcEwUnXRRXMGlMsv3NqmkmaYUoTPaH%2FXE889l9UV%2F5nGRpi87HYPb7gnfrrtjtzMU%2B1nJzujqPhJcFQvZ%2FeVrRg%3D .
clean_body: Y’all, it’s Jasmine. I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas. Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back. But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap. That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Real Texas? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jasmine Crockett and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Let me be clear: When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink. I don’t back down. Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I’m a lifelong fighter for justice. So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people. If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Real Texas ? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jasmine Crockett and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Thank you, Jasmine [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: Office of the First Lady
subject: Happy Holidays from First Lady Dawn Moore
body:
| | | | |
* * *
---
[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FUvyoOSt5dNY/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/A8Ls5NDr4f2KsnnYcWxtklLRyG8osMEX_8aX5STYgBo=435)
Greetings Fellow Marylanders,
What fills me with hope this holiday season is the way Marylanders show up for one another. Time and again, we’ve proven that when we stand together, there is no challenge we cannot meet.
These remain difficult days for many, yet the strength of our communities continues to guide us forward. This is the season to recommit ourselves to connection, to finding common ground, and building a future our children and grandchildren can be proud of.
As First Lady, I am honored to focus on creating bigger tables and inviting Marylanders from every corner of the state to claim their seat around them. And in this season of generosity and togetherness, I am especially grateful for the chance to gather with you.
In keeping with our holiday tradition, Wes and I are delighted to open the doors and welcome each of you to Government House or as we call it ”The People’s House," for our Holiday Open House on Saturday, December 13, from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m.
All you need to do is arrive with your holiday spirit. We’ll be ready to welcome you with festive decorations, homemade cookies, and the joy of the season. We can’t wait to see you!
Take Care,
**First Lady Dawn Moore**
* * *
---
## **KEEPING UP WITH**
# **THE FIRST LADY**
###
### [Be Our Guest! ](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=ucsrAJ-QOD4/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/pzHlA2lzlq3t6QKfBy2tlEAKrtw16OmVo3CQVQaYxFg=435)
### [**Join Maryland’s First Family at “The People’s House”**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=ucsrAJ-QOD4/2/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/rGcz7Q50a02GixFGiG4uCC_7hZPnVowGK2QFRGRjgG0=435)
Join the Governor and First Lady for the Holiday Open House at Government House on Saturday, December 13, from 9 a.m. - 12 p.m.
This is a chance to meet the First Family, tour the “People’s House,” meet your Maryland neighbors, and enjoy homemade cookies! All Marylanders are welcome to attend!
No registration is required. Please bring your ID.
* * *
---
### [**First Lady Moore Inducted into**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fleadership%2Ffirstlady%2Fnews%2Fpages%2Ficymi-first-lady-moore-inducted-university-maryland-alumni-hall-fame.aspx/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/KhA7Khl4jOYnqNof89DqaCkE24sR5WAN5MawGF14W4I=435)
### [**the University of Maryland Alumni Hall of Fame**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fleadership%2Ffirstlady%2Fnews%2Fpages%2Ficymi-first-lady-moore-inducted-university-maryland-alumni-hall-fame.aspx/2/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/U3MTngwvqO8MHoBGotNUAgJPPR5jFqykYXyxqtF5s_4=435)
First Lady Moore is officially a member of the University of Maryland Alumni Hall of Fame. Inducted for her decades of experience and commitment to public service, she became the 69th distinguished alumni to receive the honor.
Each of the Hall of Fame members has given back to society by educating, entertaining, serving, or defending their communities. Notable members include U.S. Congressman Steny Hoyer, Olympic gold medal gymnast Dominique Dawes, and director and animator Jim Henson.
* * *
---
| **[Maryland Garden Clubs Deck the Halls with Holiday Tree Displays at Maryland State House](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.flickr.com%2Fphotos%2Fmdgovpics%2Falbums%2F72177720330582729%2F/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/kWu5xW-LvUTtUdLte791Kk7_FzwjWe41BPK2zg6z5RY=435)** This year, First Lady Moore continued one of region's beloved holiday traditions by joining the [Federated Garden Clubs of Maryland](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/http:%2F%2Ffgcofmd.org%2Fabout%2Fhistory%2F/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/U3FnyKqTSu28PRsBhGynPabSoz-Rpfajv6BeBZBxeQw=435) for their annual State House decorating event. For nearly a decade, volunteers from across Maryland have transformed the first floor of the State House into a celebration of Maryland’s 23 jurisdictions. The decorations will remain on display through the start of the new year for all visitors. The State House is open year-round, seven days a week, from 8:30 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
---
**[First Lady Moore Launches Mental Health Awareness Campaign Across Maryland Radio Stations during Holiday Season](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fleadership%2Ffirstlady%2Fnews%2Fpages%2Ffirst-lady-moore-launches-mental-health-awareness-campaign-across-maryland-radio-stations-holiday-season.aspx/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/UR-7M68omX-SdO-lrOAf6weak9D3mfqZ_kMwGu_05Vc=435)** First Lady Moore, in partnership with the Maryland Department of Health, has launched a campaign to raise awareness for the [988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fhealth.maryland.gov%2Fbha%2FPages%2F988md.aspx/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/0QhoactzCvE8zdlFt23Ols6h0B691__LysD-M9uzpxU=435). The campaign emphasizes the importance of helping those who struggle during the holidays. Marylanders can call, text, or chat 988 the Suicide & Crisis Lifeline to connect with support 24 hours a day, seven days a week, connect with trained crisis counselors, and learn about resources for longer-term care. If needed, mobile crisis responders are available for in-person support.
---
| | | [**More From Maryland's First Lady**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fleadership%2Ffirstlady%2Fnews%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/At_7FM0qVuWh_Xv_A0r7sq1iDChkJG81nj8oor1PlSo=435)
---
* * *
---
|
# **MUSIC FOR THE MOMENT**
[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fopen.spotify.com%2Fplaylist%2F0ynJaqas8ODSIAGDHjr3Fr%3Fsi=TaBgagdCTHealjncyzuDjQ%26nd=1%26dlsi=03f3b7c39f694bac/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/RLUalq8E0jjHTMNwaSzttUUYYxAMp5SV_L8U33cbXXs=435) The First Lady has always believed that music is a powerful form of storytelling, and she’s excited to share a glimpse into the songs that have shaped her life. There’s no better way to kick off this new feature than with a holiday playlist filled with timeless classics, fresh favorites, and a few unexpected tracks that might surprise you–and might just become part of your own seasonal traditions. We hope you enjoy the music as much as she does. Check it out on the [Governor's Spotify account](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fopen.spotify.com%2Fplaylist%2F0ynJaqas8ODSIAGDHjr3Fr%3Fsi=TaBgagdCTHealjncyzuDjQ%26nd=1%26dlsi=03f3b7c39f694bac%3F/1/0100019b13e618b9-e2c73b36-ba9e-4f14-98a5-ce0754b8d2a7-000000/lN44siQn2Qc7JIU9mayE6KkxDO8_jV0v17g4eyOZAeI=435). Happy Holidays! |
* * *
---
|

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, with
Hanukkah beginning on Sunday evening, I wanted to share a favorite
throwback photo that gets circulated every time the holiday season comes
around.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]Adam at 13 years old before his Bar Mitzvah

I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow
tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity
to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the
Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the
last few years, a lot has been broken, and there's a lot to fix. It's been
my cause.

Derek, I want to
take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was
in the “schmata” (or clothing) business. He started as a traveling
salesman and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s slacks
company.

We moved from Massachusetts, where I was born, lived a few years in
Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there that my dad got out of
the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the
summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing
materials, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate
school.

This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in
Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the
Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I
even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of
that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly
lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.

In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but
to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.

These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to
pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key
priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is
applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and
stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our
democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.

That’s why I put everything I have into my work and for the cause of our
democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the
morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3987?c0=q42025_abs_em.ld7cHd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to
continue that work by chipping in $18 or another meaningful amount today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3358?c0=q42025_abs_em.-qvZMR&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]EXPRESS DONATE $18

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q42025_abs_em.jmTwmA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q42025_abs_em.fmwQtt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q42025_abs_em.z9ptV2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q42025_abs_em.oB7ZBD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more
insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause.

Thank you for reading more about me,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=9290%2E5257348%2EJh6q2q ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

Hi Peter, it’s Jon. If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd_dpg_em_ossoff_q425](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121155482/588539895/-1748950076?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121225_B1_OSSOFFSPLIT_Tier1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2I4Y2EwYi04ZGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QwU5ETmoSBemERHPFW5JW7eUkNdKIPD80_AqQSgVRg=) Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. _But I have you, Peter._ Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.** Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. _Let’s do it again._ So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today. subject: Congratulations...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **CONGRATULATIONS Friend,**

There is no greater honor in the world to me than serving as President of the United States. Every day, I work tirelessly to **[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
I would not have been able to do any of this without you, and I want to share a very special honor with you!
**This is why I have decided to present you with the****Trump Patriot Medal:**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
This is one of the greatest honors in the Trump World. JD Vance, Marco Rubio, and Karoline Leavitt have this award.
**_[To claim this honor, simply contribute before my critical mid-month fundraising deadline.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[CLAIM TRUMP PATRIOT MEDAL](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I cannot thank you enough for your unwavering support. Together, we will continue to usher in a new era of **AMERICAN GREATNESS!**
[MAGA!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you for everything, and congratulations!
President Trump

name: Rep. Susie Lee
subject: What happens in Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
The GOP are already pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attack ads on me. | | | |
---
Friend,
My colleagues elected me as House Battleground Chair because what happens in Nevada is an indicator for how the rest of the country goes.
**Next year’s elections will be a real test and opportunity to curb the Republican power grab. Democrats need to take back Congress and we can’t do it without Nevada.**
The NRCC has Nevada in its sights — they put Nevada’s three Democratic House seats on their top targets list for 2026 and _they’re already pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attack ads on me._ All because I won’t back down and I continue to focus on delivering results for Nevada families.
Republicans are playing politics with people’s livelihoods and spreading lies. We have to hold them accountable. We can’t do it without you.
**[Please, I have to ask. Can you rush a donation to NV Dems ahead of Monday's midmonth deadline? clean_body: The GOP are already pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attack ads on me. | | | | Friend, My colleagues elected me as House Battleground Chair because what happens in Nevada is an indicator for how the rest of the country goes. Next year’s elections will be a real test and opportunity to curb the Republican power grab. Democrats need to take back Congress and we can’t do it without Nevada. The NRCC has Nevada in its sights — they put Nevada’s three Democratic House seats on their top targets list for 2026 and they’re already pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attack ads on me. All because I won’t back down and I continue to focus on delivering results for Nevada families. Republicans are playing politics with people’s livelihoods and spreading lies. We have to hold them accountable. We can’t do it without you. name: Team Bell
subject: Can you help shape Wesley's 2026 game plan?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
[SURVEY] Peter, democracy is on the line in 2026, and the work ahead is going to take everyone pulling in the same direction.

From the GOP's government shutdown, disastrous legislation, endless infighting, and their willingness to follow Donald Trump no matter the cost, it's clear we need a _strong, focused game plan to fight back and keep delivering real results for Missouri._

Wesley has always believed democracy works best when everyday people have a voice. So before we kick off this critical election year, he wants to hear directly from you: **[What issues would you like to see Wesley prioritize in Congress next year? Fill out our end-of-year priorities survey to let him know.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121156179/588541770/-229208229?ms=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&refcode=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&source=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=9IqAJSY/gkiS8lVKrb8h4AS5jvreOntEPASCVHJnqPUv0JPPLHXJ+fq1rTObgivrDa43pVgwu9JQD//nswNsu0Z4YyYC7vNoJaAPVC1hajMGgCVvbS8gwvCzoRmoCQ+ci1nSI/rJ556u3MBTnROMG9r6J9tS9uGPUdW3aLx2Kto=&refcode2=16197a2c-8ed7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYxOTdhMmMtOGVkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uHE6hWijECUuT4V-VPO4aWX868wjUv82ML83-k0I74Q=&emci=e8b99e2e-77d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=16197a2c-8ed7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1020964)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121156181/588541773/-229208229?ms=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&refcode=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&source=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251212_eoysvy_esrv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=9IqAJSY/gkiS8lVKrb8h4AS5jvreOntEPASCVHJnqPUv0JPPLHXJ+fq1rTObgivrDa43pVgwu9JQD//nswNsu0Z4YyYC7vNoJaAPVC1hajMGgCVvbS8gwvCzoRmoCQ+ci1nSI/rJ556u3MBTnROMG9r6J9tS9uGPUdW3aLx2Kto=&refcode2=16197a2c-8ed7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYxOTdhMmMtOGVkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uHE6hWijECUuT4V-VPO4aWX868wjUv82ML83-k0I74Q=&emci=e8b99e2e-77d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=16197a2c-8ed7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1020964)

From rejecting Republicans' outrageous budget proposal to being a check on Trump's abusive power grabs in the House, Wesley has proven he's willing to take on tough fights and deliver real results for our community both inside and outside of Congress.

Now, as we look toward 2026, your input will help shape where we go next. Your voice will guide Wesley's priorities and how we fight to stop the erosion of democracy happening in real time.

Fellow Patriot,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d54a25ae0864fe2b9ca6e966dd35ecb&_e=IU2mPcFBbA8RjgI9HgGy4g5rXQ9ZL9Gqf3Fu3slNq-EcbhTN2SFjWHua3kPSyszLkrEkJ1nbX-vwokRLo-dvt4BvJJjeQRcZRdnj6ooAo5t0ElmnugMnBS6YSmqH5WAkrG96OYV_2-rqWaSsnl_iuOeskdR6TL3s0WO1cSwuX2xtExQfsivXmpijiX0bGYDaAejCjUmcFYednXyQBbHTdXLUaMfsKTzVWIDJzenO29we5ej-FwkqcmYdmYCHt97jWAX9uyrYDZ__TCP3HSL8Al2zp341sa0mPtLEsdX_ZX_YVWCAk9W8R8mv2MFnsC_WbS_ZZszIG1rJMyWIzli-qaiVRtwEWNZ0dJctc8aHgXmVShhsD0uU88sn6j9_cXdFmi_UUrQTgfG1X0vRWmePF2YA_aZp7kYrE-mCbGTFKAO0SleFOV-0QHp3FqmPQ4xDP649-wA3rQ8mGSiBr62VqB6ZmnaRcGQCm1kQ1g9la0HH7PrBVUqmqJ-8h_nyglY7lRayEAESlUSQq5kFieegm2cZW0Ggz55DpZkOdeYWPg4OyPjRO6mDYjVev5ooLMy6dSkIfRgnf-h5E6dD7uh9ukBLY-lWZ6A4jVJ-i-0sIh7eT0LYCF9FvQszfNMA5LPWwZ5HywAWHI9Osaqo9Q-xtHwmkGfBcAZlhZY7IDIai_I%3D)**

clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Fellow Patriot, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: TRUMP ALERT via Team Griswold
subject: Trump’s attempts to free Tina Peters continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251212-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251212-email]
Peter –
Last night, Trump announced that he was pardoning Tina Peters, who was convicted by a jury of her peers, for state crimes, in state court, and is currently serving her sentence of 9 years of incarceration.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251212-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251212-email]
The big problem: a president does not have the authority to issue pardons for state crimes and convictions. Trump’s pardon proclamation comes after his recent unsuccessful request to transfer Peters from state prison to federal custody.
Jena said, “Trump has no constitutional authority to pardon Peters. His assault is not just on our democracy, but on states’ rights and the American Constitution.”
We must do all we can to elect defenders of our democracy and the rule of law. Please stand with Jena as she runs for Colorado Attorney General. Rush in a donation right now to show you’re with us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251212-email]

name: James Carville
subject: This is so damn important
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Believe me when I tell you
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=1&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)
---
Friends, it’s James Carville.
I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you:
**Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now.**
[**Please chip in every dollar you can spare between Sherrod Brown’s campaign and GIFFORDS PAC before their mid-month deadline. Sherrod just got back in the fight, and he needs folks like you by his side ASAP.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=2&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=3&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**
We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on.
We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd!
_We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio._
Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people.
**But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.**
[**Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. But he can’t do it alone – nobody can: Will you chip in $5 or even $25 right now, split between Sherrod Brown and GIFFORDS PAC to power his campaign forward and send him to the Senate?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.XG4v41&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=4&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.2aRT2u&amount=3&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=23&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.dnONMu&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=24&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.B8Zbxc&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=25&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.smQfhz&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=26&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.Xj8vgw&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=27&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-brown-2025.2aRT2u&refcode=em251212-1-b&t=28&akid=11102%2E3935704%2EfZooAG)**

Thanks,
James Carville

subject: Lindsey Graham just attacked me AND you

body:
Lindsey Graham attacked me and you on Twitter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121157113/588544648/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.12_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjY0NzhlMS05MGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5L0nNrvOcA7anDTVi0SzlvLRLh0HwEO2JcMImjvu1M=) Let’s get one thing straight: Lindsey Graham isn’t “doing something right.” _He’s doing everything wrong._

He’s boasting about ramming through Trump’s Supreme Court picks — even when it meant ripping away reproductive freedom from millions of women.

He’s bragging about siding with Trump’s chaos, corruption, and cruelty instead of with South Carolina families.

**And he’s mocking everyday people chipping in a few dollars at a time to fight back.**

Lindsey is bankrolled by billionaire donors and corporate special interests. He sneers at us because he’s never had to depend on people like you.

Meanwhile, I’m a pediatrician and a mom who knows what’s at stake for our kids. And I’m running for Senate because I believe South Carolina deserves a leader who actually listens, not one who degrades his constituents and bows to Trump.

So if Lindsey Graham wants to make fun of us for asking grassroots supporters to pitch in, let’s prove him wrong in the biggest way possible.

[**_Can you split $10, $25, or whatever you can between my campaign and Maggie Hassan so we can make his ignorant tweet BACKFIRE and show him the power of grassroots supporters coming together? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121157114/588544649/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.12_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjY0NzhlMS05MGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5L0nNrvOcA7anDTVi0SzlvLRLh0HwEO2JcMImjvu1M=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121157115/588544650/899181852?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.12_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjY0NzhlMS05MGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5L0nNrvOcA7anDTVi0SzlvLRLh0HwEO2JcMImjvu1M=)

name: Senator Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I need 10,000 signatures on my health care petition by midnight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Yesterday, I voted to extend life-saving health care subsidies by three years for millions of families. Before I go any further, I need 10,000 signatures before midnight to show Republicans their cruelty won't go unanswered. **[Before midnight, will you add your name to my emergency petition condemning Republicans for voting to strip away health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121157360/588545469/-2009337113?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.12_Health-Care_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTRkM2JhNS05MWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wguMaErj1O5oWwM1lbxDFZm0qb9-hjZOhTc5CMb37v8=&emci=3d10db91-6bd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=ea4d3ba5-91d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121157361/588545474/-2009337113?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.12_Health-Care_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTRkM2JhNS05MWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wguMaErj1O5oWwM1lbxDFZm0qb9-hjZOhTc5CMb37v8=&emci=3d10db91-6bd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=ea4d3ba5-91d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)
---
Families are already fighting to afford the care they need and put food on the table because of the rising costs fueled by Trump's negligent policies. Yesterday could have been a moment of relief.
_Instead, Republicans chose to rip away the health care people rely on to survive._
Trump's MAGA allies stood on the Senate floor and tried to take health care away from millions. They voted to reward billionaires at everyone else's expense. I refuse to let that vote pass quietly. We need to build a public record tonight that makes our disgust unmistakable.
We have to show the GOP that the public is paying attention and won't accept another attack on health care. **So I'm asking again, because the deadline is hours away:**
**[Will you join 9,999 other Democratic supporters and add your name right now to show you're against ripping away health care subsidies from the folks who need them most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121157362/588545475/-2009337113?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.12_Health-Care_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTRkM2JhNS05MWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wguMaErj1O5oWwM1lbxDFZm0qb9-hjZOhTc5CMb37v8=&emci=3d10db91-6bd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=ea4d3ba5-91d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)**

clean_body: Yesterday, I voted to extend life-saving health care subsidies by three years for millions of families. Before I go any further, I need 10,000 signatures before midnight to show Republicans their cruelty won't go unanswered. | | Families are already fighting to afford the care they need and put food on the table because of the rising costs fueled by Trump's negligent policies. Yesterday could have been a moment of relief. Instead, Republicans chose to rip away the health care people rely on to survive. Trump's MAGA allies stood on the Senate floor and tried to take health care away from millions. They voted to reward billionaires at everyone else's expense. I refuse to let that vote pass quietly. We need to build a public record tonight that makes our disgust unmistakable. We have to show the GOP that the public is paying attention and won't accept another attack on health care. So I'm asking again, because the deadline is hours away: | This fight isn't over, team — but I need thousands of people standing with me right now. In solidarity, Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

subject: Fundraising is slipping
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE ]Chris Pappas for Senate

This is not a drill. 🚨
Democratic fundraising is slipping. 🚨

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251212_1_dip.bov5Me&refcode=em20251212-1&t=1003&akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE ]Rush a donation right now to help us turn things around before it’s too
late.

Here’s what you need to know:

Since September donations to Democrats have been on a downward trend. In
years past, fundraising dips in October and picks back up heading into the
end of the year.

We’re not seeing that trend right now — just look at this chart:

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251212_1_dip.bov5Me&refcode=em20251212-1&t=1004&akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE ][IMG]

National Republicans and their dark money allies are gearing up to spend
millions to buy the New Hampshire Senate seat for John Sununu. And with
Democratic fundraising continuing to decline, we’re getting worried.

This is going to be a tough, high-stakes race. We have to protect this
seat to have any chance of flipping the Senate, which means we need more
grassroots donors to step up right now.

We’re relying on folks like you to win this race. [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251212_1_dip.bov5Me&refcode=em20251212-1&t=1005&akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE ]Will you step up now
and chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us overcome this
fundraising slump, elect Chris, and secure a huge win for Democrats?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251212_1_dip.bov5Me&amount=5&refcode=em20251212-1&t=1024&akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE ]Donate $5 »

Thank you for your continued support.

— Team Pappas

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3983%2E582294%2EgWYOgE

name: Team Crow
subject: Pete Hegseth is a danger to our national security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
There’s no way around it, team: Pete Hegseth is unqualified for the job and making America less safe.

An independent watchdog just found that the Secretary of Defense recklessly shared classified information on unsecured systems that put the lives of American service members in jeopardy.

In recent months, the Trump administration has deployed troops to American cities, used military force without congressional approval, and attacked veterans like Jason instead of keeping our country safe.

Pete Hegseth himself said in 2016 that troops “won’t follow unlawful orders.” Yet now he’s trying to criticize and go after veterans like Jason all to stroke the ego of one man — Donald Trump.

Jason believes Pete Hegseth is an unserious and unqualified person. Jason hasn’t minced words — calling on the Defense Secretary to resign or be fired. We need real leaders who prioritize American security over the whims of an authoritarian president. Add your name right now if you agree: it’s time for Hegseth to go. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2511-hegseth]

SIGN ON [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2511-hegseth]

Thank you for standing with us,

Team Crow

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Cracked Eggs in Karachi, Big Dreams
body:
Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fdIy2FVAl-PeL3YvzImY1Qy1Rw98mdT-TrIzfx_1BPxklK3QfLtI1esLAPIGPnm3bamn0HP8Bi6RlhC1c12UW_TrpBzgR3ulJ29m6TydFuTnh1FfUkfx_1VR5ZPkxTM8GnvD6EkTR9JDlSd52VVYaRWb9wvHTSequd7Dw7n7rxotaPI-gkntfYkeXpbCrV3p3wgEuNCSyp89EUQwbpqWowDRFZbap1jp&c=j7guip-00vslyJfl3jpdrBmfw1axwCG7EtllVHoi-HgMhiv47WznWw==&ch=IDbOX-Ql5ozFbAXPuCp05N3xLqRZBz_jh4jNQQHaNtGTjZOIhzoBsQ==)
---
|
Peter,
My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury.
He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fdIy2FVAl-PeL3YvzImY1Qy1Rw98mdT-TrIzfx_1BPxklK3QfLtI1esLAPIGPnm3bamn0HP8Bi6RlhC1c12UW_TrpBzgR3ulJ29m6TydFuTnh1FfUkfx_1VR5ZPkxTM8GnvD6EkTR9JDlSd52VVYaRWb9wvHTSequd7Dw7n7rxotaPI-gkntfYkeXpbCrV3p3wgEuNCSyp_E7MrWTV0mqcUdEynjsBhI&c=j7guip-00vslyJfl3jpdrBmfw1axwCG7EtllVHoi-HgMhiv47WznWw==&ch=IDbOX-Ql5ozFbAXPuCp05N3xLqRZBz_jh4jNQQHaNtGTjZOIhzoBsQ==)
---
After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream.
When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fdIy2FVAl-PeL3YvzImY1Qy1Rw98mdT-TrIzfx_1BPxklK3QfLtI1esLAPIGPnm3bamn0HP8Bi6RlhC1c12UW_TrpBzgR3ulJ29m6TydFuTnh1FfUkfx_1VR5ZPkxTM8GnvD6EkTR9JDlSd52VVYaRWb9wvHTSequd7Dw7n7rxotaPI-gkntfYkeXpbCrV3p3wgEuNCSyp_gMdIj0rZoQjphfdRn7j_1&c=j7guip-00vslyJfl3jpdrBmfw1axwCG7EtllVHoi-HgMhiv47WznWw==&ch=IDbOX-Ql5ozFbAXPuCp05N3xLqRZBz_jh4jNQQHaNtGTjZOIhzoBsQ==)
---
| From him, I learned three important lessons:

* Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance.

* Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.)

* The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it.

That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday.
With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever.
[Will you make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help me keep fighting for opportunity, education, and the belief that every family deserves a fair shot?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fdIy2FVAl-PeL3YvzImY1Qy1Rw98mdT-TrIzfx_1BPxklK3QfLtI1esLAPIGPnm3iNN789RJHeLP5jR4aJcux-pm-5AcuVKAos-znWScwToR_8aYrbklcuyGY805u3_-vPWpeqINWwD6FHEctGnKueR5iiDXf01AcmJyky9-2WHE86zSVvMcnJ9334OejTfVZe8JEhJ3vmyaKtHEpd0yWRmZgyT_-UYtbrzdXkmaAME=&c=j7guip-00vslyJfl3jpdrBmfw1axwCG7EtllVHoi-HgMhiv47WznWw==&ch=IDbOX-Ql5ozFbAXPuCp05N3xLqRZBz_jh4jNQQHaNtGTjZOIhzoBsQ==)
---
| If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Cracked Eggs in Karachi, Big Dreams
body:
Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucJu5eUXY58_w-TqKbvtdFF8LgkDE-zPamD0NsheaUzcJ8i3BhUpssCWFnGdKFbC2fYzwkhiaDbl-EUVK0nQGY0VjvtiL44X1mXBmOSFoO94eSkheOVBIhWnRjzAuBZ9ebm4AEpLFtMSH4zns9NFDLPjjFw_M4eRVoOQ8dnwW66KRP15fictjZsdS_OWvK4FQ-NAaTJbJ2MMa-ZrQOUfNA==&c=gQjoq4vN2rK43v0U4RWGwciRC3p0iQgnNKSQKfQdTzfxs_zLwBIGcg==&ch=8bGomHOc6GzGsDccANHe5fEBrJem-OfmMZZhV0K8_xxtGWOSMXFTrQ==)
---
|
Peter,
My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury.
He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucJu5eUXY58_w-TqKbvtdFF8LgkDE-zPamD0NsheaUzcJ8i3BhUpssCWFnGdKFbC2fYzwkhiaDbl-EUVK0nQGY0VjvtiL44X1mXBmOSFoO94eSkheOVBIhWnRjzAuBZ9ebm4AEpLFtMSH4zns9NFDLPjjFw_M4eRVoOQ8dnwW66KRP15fictjZsdS_OWvK4FQ-NAaTJbJ2Py2UC4NAOZzQ==&c=gQjoq4vN2rK43v0U4RWGwciRC3p0iQgnNKSQKfQdTzfxs_zLwBIGcg==&ch=8bGomHOc6GzGsDccANHe5fEBrJem-OfmMZZhV0K8_xxtGWOSMXFTrQ==)
---
After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream.
When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucJu5eUXY58_w-TqKbvtdFF8LgkDE-zPamD0NsheaUzcJ8i3BhUpssCWFnGdKFbC2fYzwkhiaDbl-EUVK0nQGY0VjvtiL44X1mXBmOSFoO94eSkheOVBIhWnRjzAuBZ9ebm4AEpLFtMSH4zns9NFDLPjjFw_M4eRVoOQ8dnwW66KRP15fictjZsdS_OWvK4FQ-NAaTJbJ2NTvtE7uB7-Iw==&c=gQjoq4vN2rK43v0U4RWGwciRC3p0iQgnNKSQKfQdTzfxs_zLwBIGcg==&ch=8bGomHOc6GzGsDccANHe5fEBrJem-OfmMZZhV0K8_xxtGWOSMXFTrQ==)
---
| From him, I learned three important lessons:

* Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance.

* Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.)

* The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it.

That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday.
With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever.
[Will you make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help me keep fighting for opportunity, education, and the belief that every family deserves a fair shot?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucJu5eUXY58_w-TqKbvtdFF8LgkDE-zPamD0NsheaUzcJ8i3BhUpssCWFnGdKFbC2fYzwkhiaDbl-EUVK0nQGY0VjvtiL44X1mXBmOSFoO94eSkheOVBIhWnRjzAuBZ9ebm4AEpLFtMSH4zns9NFDLPjjFw_M4eRVoOQ8dnwW66KRP15fictjZsdS_OWvK4FQ-NAaTJbJ2PREcsnRSLPOw==&c=gQjoq4vN2rK43v0U4RWGwciRC3p0iQgnNKSQKfQdTzfxs_zLwBIGcg==&ch=8bGomHOc6GzGsDccANHe5fEBrJem-OfmMZZhV0K8_xxtGWOSMXFTrQ==)

clean_body: Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test. | | | | | == | Peter, My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury. He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English. | == After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream. When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into. | | == | From him, I learned three important lessons: Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance. Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.) * The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it. That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday. With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Gratefully, Bushra Amiwala | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Wes Moore
subject: None of this happens if I made a different choice
body:
When I ran for governor, I made a choice.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)
Here’s why you get emails from me, Peter.
When I ran for governor, I made a choice. I could've spent my time courting big donors and corporate PACs – people who'd expect something in return. Instead, I built a grassroots campaign powered by people like you **[donating just $10 or $25 at a time.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-1.J-V_2_&refcode=em-20251212-1&t=2&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)**
That choice changed _everything._
Because of our grassroots support, I walked into office owing nothing to special interests. No one pulling strings. No favors to repay. **Just a mandate from everyday Marylanders to get things done.**
That's why we were able to move fast. Historic drops in violent crime. The lowest number of homicides in Baltimore in 50 years. Record investments in our public schools. Uplifting and investing in our small businesses.
None of that happens if I'm spending my time chasing big checks instead of delivering results.
**[So yes – I'm asking you to chip in $5, $10, $25, whatever you can today. Because every grassroots donation means I can stay focused on the work instead of the fundraising.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-1.J-V_2_&refcode=em-20251212-1&t=3&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-1.J-V_2_&amount=5&refcode=em-20251212-1&t=22&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)**
It means I answer to you, not anyone else. So thank you, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251212-1.J-V_2_&refcode=em-20251212-1&t=23&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251212-1&t=24&refcode2=1051_1086043_bTnU_W&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1051%2E1086043%2EbTnU_W)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

"This week we got some GREAT news for Alabama. Thanks to the leadership of President Trump and Federal Housing Director Bill Pulte, Fannie Mae is IMMEDIATELY leaving woke California for sweet home Alabama. I've been working with President Trump and Director Pulte on this for months, and it's been a hard secret to keep quiet. Fannie Mae is one of the biggest mortgage financers in the world. Relocating Fannie Mae from woke San Francisco to Birmingham will not only save taxpayers money, but it will bring jobs and opportunities to our great state. As your current Senator and future Governor, I'm going to keep working every single day to GROW our great state."
-Senator Tuberville

name: Team Pou
subject: Republicans just voted to raise your healthcare costs
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, Because of the MAGA Republican stalemate in the Senate, health care premiums are going to rise. And rather than coming up with a real alternative, they threw something together last minute just to tell the American people they "tried." Nellie has spent her entire career fighting to make health care more affordable. She knows that rising premiums, obscene prescription costs, and unexpected out-of-pocket expenses cause huge strains on working families. She’s pushed to lower drug prices, expand coverage, and strengthen the Medicare and Medicaid programs that millions of Americans rely on. And when we had a Democratic House, we passed measures to lower premiums and expand eligibility so more families could afford quality care. We strengthened Medicare and Medicaid for the long term. The stakes are too high, and the contrast couldn’t be clearer this election: Democrats are fighting to lower health care costs. MAGA is fighting to take that progress away. [**We’re in the middle of our mid-month fundraising push, and this moment matters. name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Monthly call Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We're inviting some friends

|
###
### Join us Monday December 15 at 8pm for a special Year End call. This will be a combined call with some of our neighboring states including Maryland and New Jersey to share the progress everyone is making.
## [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQURXQj7vXiSR9wiwr1VtBvhx5qQ6FWllk4LAtP7BaOzA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_december_call_invite&n=1)
What could be more appropriate for the holidays than get together with some friends from other states you don't see often enough? Please join in to catch up, share, and have a great time.
* * *
## Branching Out
There are 67 counties in PA. We're launching a new effort to have dedicated Volunteer Leads in each. This role can be what you make of it. Would you like to contact Forwardists in your area? Talk to new sign ups they come in? Talk to people in your area about running for office with Forward? Host occasional meetups or virtual calls? This could be the role for you. clean_body: We're inviting some friends | Join us Monday December 15 at 8pm for a special Year End call. This will be a combined call with some of our neighboring states including Maryland and New Jersey to share the progress everyone is making. What could be more appropriate for the holidays than get together with some friends from other states you don't see often enough? Please join in to catch up, share, and have a great time. * Branching Out There are 67 counties in PA. We're launching a new effort to have dedicated Volunteer Leads in each. This role can be what you make of it. Would you like to contact Forwardists in your area? Talk to new sign ups they come in? Talk to people in your area about running for office with Forward? Host occasional meetups or virtual calls? This could be the role for you. \-- \-- Join our South West get together 12/29 at 6pm! And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Curious how they’re doing it? Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). name: Jay Jones
subject: skittles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025]
Friend, do you know the kid in this picture?
He had big dreams, a full heart, and loved Skittles. Yep, it’s me!
I want to share what this photo means to me, but before I go on, can I ask you to donate any amount so I can continue fighting for Virginians and their families as Attorney General-elect? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?]
To know me is to know my family's legacy, folks, and this starts a few generations back.
When my grandfather wanted to become an attorney, he had to borrow bar exam practice books from other students because law libraries wouldn’t loan them to Black students. He faced so many obstacles, but he never gave up, and he became a pioneering civil rights lawyer.
He passed on that determination to my dad, who had to take a special test for Black students to attend his public elementary school. He had slurs and rocks thrown at him – all because he wanted an equal education. But he fought like hell. It’s because of his grit that he graduated from law school and served Virginia in all three branches of our state government.
Today, I carry that same determination and grit that they passed on to me.
And when I look at this childhood photo, I understand why they never gave up: they weren’t just fighting for themselves. They were fighting so that I wouldn’t have to face the same discrimination they did.
And now, as Attorney General-elect, I’m dedicated to standing up against any threat to our rights so Virginia’s next generation, including my sons, can have the best possible life.
Folks, can you chip in $10 or more right now so I can continue my family's legacy of fighting for a more equal and just Virginia for all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?amount=10]

| | Derek, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day.

_And this week, he directed one at me._

Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is _terrified_ that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people.

Derek, I'm not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too.
