clean_body: Here’s what he said: | | | Derek, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day. And this week, he directed one at me. Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is terrified that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people. Derek, I'm not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too. = So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me. He called me a “radical left lunatic.” If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it. You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Derek. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Right-wing special interests won’t quietly walk away from this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251212-907&t=1&akid=911%2E294397%2EYVCzlR)
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251212_1_ak.Jvtmat&amount=10&refcode=em20251212-907&t=3&akid=911%2E294397%2EYVCzlR)
Moments like this don’t come around often.
With Justice Rebecca Bradley, one of the most extreme justices currently on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, announcing she’s not running for reelection, we have a rare chance to _expand_ our progressive majority.
But let me be clear: **Right-wing special interests won’t quietly walk away from this race.**
They’ve already handpicked a far-right candidate to run, Maria Lazar, who has aligned herself with election conspiracy theorists and celebrated the overturning of _Roe v. Wade._
And now that Elon Musk is signaling he’s ready to jump back into politics to meddle in key elections like this one, we should expect their attacks to get even louder and more extreme.
That’s why we have to rally behind Judge Chris Taylor as soon as possible to strengthen her campaign’s defences heading into the election year.
[**This is our window to build the early strength Chris needs before the far-right’s spending spree begins. Will you step up with a $10 contribution today?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251212_1_ak.Jvtmat&amount=10&refcode=em20251212-907&t=4&akid=911%2E294397%2EYVCzlR)

Thank you. Every early donation makes a real difference in whether we win this seat and protect Wisconsin’s future.
— Tammy

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Why does ICE get to hide its face while breaking the law?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
This email is long, but you need to know why I introduced the NOEM Act

| |
---
Team, When I was in Iraq, I led Marines into combat through streets where people were shooting at us. I never wore a mask. Accountability matters when you carry a weapon, enforce authority, and wear your country’s flag on your shoulder. Yet here at home, ICE agents are allowed to raid neighborhoods, detain families, violate rights, and hide their faces, all while operating with near-total legal immunity. That is not law enforcement. It's lawlessness. **This week, I introduced legislation to change it.** It’s called the National Oversight and Enforcement of Misconduct Act —**the NOEM Act** — and it does something ICE agents never expected Washington to have the courage to do: it allows victims of constitutional violations by federal immigration officers to sue those officers in federal court, just as they can sue state and local police. Right now, if an ICE officer violates someone’s Fourth or Fifth Amendment rights — even an American citizen — victims have almost no path to justice. That ends if the NOEM Act becomes law. This is a narrow, targeted reform with huge implications. It does not duplicate broad proposals; it closes the loophole ICE has been abusing in our towns and cities, the gap where misconduct is most rampant and accountability is most absent. ICE is not above the Constitution. And if they break the law, they should answer for it in court. My entire career has been about challenging systems where the powerful escape accountability. I do not wait for permission to fix what is broken. But passing this bill will require political courage and strength. We need a Senate willing to demand accountability for federal agents who abuse their power. If you agree that our government should answer to the Constitution, not escape it, I’m asking you to help build the movement behind this fight. **[Chip in $25 today to help me take this fight to the Senate:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160173/588555500/2090747700?refcode=251212_sm_noem_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTIyODdlYS05OGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8moIcthwyBTxuovcTB8wgM0a8DtdNBMzRVsNVIVz1dQ=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160180/588555507/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251212_sm_noem&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTIyODdlYS05OGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8moIcthwyBTxuovcTB8wgM0a8DtdNBMzRVsNVIVz1dQ=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160181/588555508/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251212_sm_noem&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTIyODdlYS05OGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8moIcthwyBTxuovcTB8wgM0a8DtdNBMzRVsNVIVz1dQ=)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately.
When law enforcement violates the law, America does not get safer. We get weaker. The NOEM Act is a step toward restoring accountability and a government worthy of the people it serves.
Thank you for being in this fight with me.
— Seth

### About Seth Moulton

clean_body: This email is long, but you need to know why I introduced the NOEM Act | | Team, When I was in Iraq, I led Marines into combat through streets where people were shooting at us. I never wore a mask. Accountability matters when you carry a weapon, enforce authority, and wear your country’s flag on your shoulder. Yet here at home, ICE agents are allowed to raid neighborhoods, detain families, violate rights, and hide their faces, all while operating with near-total legal immunity. That is not law enforcement. It's lawlessness. This week, I introduced legislation to change it. It’s called the National Oversight and Enforcement of Misconduct Act —the NOEM Act — and it does something ICE agents never expected Washington to have the courage to do: it allows victims of constitutional violations by federal immigration officers to sue those officers in federal court, just as they can sue state and local police. Right now, if an ICE officer violates someone’s Fourth or Fifth Amendment rights — even an American citizen — victims have almost no path to justice. That ends if the NOEM Act becomes law. This is a narrow, targeted reform with huge implications. It does not duplicate broad proposals; it closes the loophole ICE has been abusing in our towns and cities, the gap where misconduct is most rampant and accountability is most absent. ICE is not above the Constitution. And if they break the law, they should answer for it in court. My entire career has been about challenging systems where the powerful escape accountability. I do not wait for permission to fix what is broken. But passing this bill will require political courage and strength. We need a Senate willing to demand accountability for federal agents who abuse their power. If you agree that our government should answer to the Constitution, not escape it, I’m asking you to help build the movement behind this fight. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. When law enforcement violates the law, America does not get safer. We get weaker. The NOEM Act is a step toward restoring accountability and a government worthy of the people it serves. Thank you for being in this fight with me. — Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/12/2025
body:
What Colorado redacted from a federal prison letter—and why it matters
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Records show the state [withheld key details](https://link.email.joinrmv.) from a federal request to transfer Tina Peters—just as [President Trump issued her a full pardon](https://link.email.joinrmv.), calling her a victim of political targeting. Lawmakers revisited [rising wolf-reintroduction costs](https://link.email.joinrmv.) amid budget strain, [new regulations](https://link.email.joinrmv.) are set to take effect in 2025, and Jefferson County Jail faces a [wrongful-death lawsuit](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Coloradans still gave big on [Colorado Gives Day](https://link.email.joinrmv.), donating a record $56.5 million, while Elbert County residents continue [fighting Xcel Energy’s power-line push](https://link.email.joinrmv.) through private land.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** A new study found electricity costs rising fastest in states with [aggressive green-energy mandates](https://link.email.joinrmv.) (like Colorado), fueling nationwide concern as Americans increasingly worry about soaring energy bills.
🗣️**Commentary Spotlight...** Today’s commentary examines Colorado’s [failures in the Tina Peters case](https://link.email.joinrmv.), urges a [return to truth and peace](https://link.email.joinrmv.) over fear-driven headlines, and warns that artificial intelligence is quietly reshaping humanity [without public consent](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Another piece exposes how Colorado’s accessibility law has become a [costly burden on small and rural communities](https://link.email.joinrmv.), while a final explainer cautions that GOP [infighting over “opting out”](https://link.email.joinrmv.) of primaries could erase Republican primary ballots and disenfranchise nearly one million voters.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, December 12, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[What Colorado redacted from a federal prison letter—and why it matters](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
The state confirmed it received a request from the Bureau of Prisons regarding the transfer of former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters to federal custody.
What the public has not been allowed to see is why the federal government made it in the first place.
Colorado released a copy of the Bureau of Prisons letter earlier this month, but only after heavily redacting its substance. State officials said releasing the withheld information would be “contrary to the public interest.” The redactions removed nearly every explanation the federal government provided for why it sought custody at all.
An unredacted version of the same letter, reviewed by Rocky Mountain Voice, tells a more complete and more consequential story.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[Opt out explained: Why Colorado Republicans could lose their primary ballots](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **“Opting out” would eliminate Republican primary ballots entirely:** Under Colorado law, if the GOP opts out of the primary, no Republican voters—including nearly one million registered Republicans—would receive a primary ballot, handing nominations to a small group of party delegates instead of voters.
* **Many Republicans misunderstand what opt-out actually does:** The article explains that opting out does not remove unaffiliated voters from GOP primaries; it abolishes the primary altogether—unlike the separate lawsuit challenging Proposition 108, which would preserve Republican ballots while excluding unaffiliated voters.
* **Opt-out would disenfranchise military, rural, and working voters:** By shifting nominations to assemblies and conventions, the process would sideline overseas service members, seniors, parents, and rural voters who cannot attend in-person meetings—concentrating power in the hands of a few thousand activists.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[Good News or Fake News: Peace — Real News with Integrity](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
_If hope teaches us to look forward, then peace teaches us how to stand firm right now._
_But here’s the tension every Coloradan feels—especially during the holidays: We live in a culture that profits from our anxiety. Fear sells. Outrage spreads. And when everything is loud, peace is mistaken for passivity... when in reality, peace is a kind of strength, a power that shapes who you are. Therefore, the question for you is, “What source is shaping who you are—the Good News or the fake news?” Because trusting the Good News builds confidence in the peace you carry._
_Or in other words, PEACE is Real News with Integrity. It’s not fragile. Peace is not the absence of conflict. Simply, peace is the inner integrity of a life aligned with truth._
_On the other hand, fake news fractures people, whereas Good News puts them back together._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Trump announces full pardon of Tina Peters in Truth Social post**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 11** _President Trump posted on Wednesday that he is granting a full pardon to former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters, who has served 14 months of a nine year prison sentence. He announced it in a Truth Social post late in the afternoon._ __
[**Colorado’s systems have failed Tina Peters again and again**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | STATE | DECEMBER 11** _On December 8, 2025, three events collided in Colorado that no honest observer can dismiss as coincidence. A federal judge dismissed Tina Peters’ habeas corpus petition, admitting she raised “important constitutional questions” about whether a state court punished her for her speech, then refused to consider those questions because of the Younger doctrine._ __
[**Kansas case and new immigration report deepen scrutiny of Colorado’s stance on SAVE**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY JEN SCHUMANN | NATIONAL | DECEMBER 10** _A Kansas mayor’s felony voting case is renewing national attention on how noncitizens end up registered to vote and what states can do to prevent it. The issue is gaining urgency as federal agencies expand the Systematic Alien Verification for Entitlements program, known as SAVE, while Colorado and several other states reject federal data-sharing efforts even as federal law requires them to maintain accurate voter rolls._
__
**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
🍕 **DID YOU KNOW?** Americans eat roughly 3 billion pizzas every year.
|
---

Why? ➜ The Electoral College is the reason Trump won in 2016, despite losing the popular vote by millions ➜ Joe Biden nearly lost the presidency in 2020, even though he won the popular vote by a historic margin ➜ Every day, new leaders join our movement, which means we can abolish the Electoral College and give us a true democracy We’re so close to getting rid of the Electoral College, but we need to bring in more pro-popular vote supporters across the country to cross the finish line. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us ditch the Electoral College? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We keep talking about this because it's true: 16 states plus DC have already indicated that they're willing to scrap this electoral scheme and move to a national popular vote. It's clear that our democracy needs reform to be protected. But we're only going to be able to forge the country we deserve if we stand up for our rights, push back against the gerrymandering and voter suppression, and finally make a national popular vote a reality. Too much is at stake for us to give up now. Help put us over the top in the states we need to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [] Thank you, The Voter Action Project Electoral College Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? subject: This is the tipping point and we cannot mess this up

body:
We have very real momentum in this race and we have to capitalize on it or we risk losing all the progress we’ve made.
| | | |

Peter,
What happens next will determine if Lauren Boebert continues her chaotic, cruel reign in Congress, or whether we fire her, right now, while we have the chance.
This is much greater than just another routine election. Defeating top Trump ally and MAGA darling Lauren Boebert this election would effectively end Trump's stronghold on Congress. His list of absolute allies would dwindle and we can reclaim power for the people.
Boebert's fundraising is abysmal. She is misusing campaign funds for personal expenses (aka partying with Kid Rock), and GOP donors are abandoning her in droves.
Meanwhile, our fundraising is reaching new heights--because of your support. Last quarter, we outraised Boebert 5:1. If we work hard enough, we could dwarf her this Q4.
And finally, I need you to remember that Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in my district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
There is something incredible happening here, and we have to be ready to take things to the next level to win.
[That's why I am asking for your support directly. Defeating Boebert would devastate MAGA and end Trump's iron grip on Congress. Can I count on you to chip in to my campaign to unseat Boebert? If you're on the fence, even $25 or $5 is not only appreciated but will make a real impact:](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016bgd3F6stpP41cvSJcb580pe1mYn_Hyn4aPP-TM97fpiE_z0tCE7BU-msl_QMhUmp01NZC3HWFnRBNBudw2HVpBZvh23m2QF5ep1YDg_P0gnbiUbkzvDYxzBLXNXZSKhgeCOlZ99fTr6gYy5Kd6crM41yfwub155aQWBUPRsn28WgLxS9Q0JKiPZr3YyI9zQ7ambEvziqM5QDZMh_LMQWmiXJjs8ogHJtGtNEz1PFAsMFFTl44yEEQ==&c=A7gpUzcgBZnOqHrybcNYeobK49BjWRjJRi6q3OXv0QY_7a4xFDdtrA==&ch=lNdX5Y5AKJwBZDth2m0Kk7yM5gDWHpWtWklYbBasvYuk0UCDyjg21w==)

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Announcing: Redistricting Action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
All On The Line is now Redistricting Action
|
---

Peter,
Our democracy is at an inflection point.
President Donald Trump is shamelessly demanding that politicians manipulate maps in order to preserve political power.
And lawmakers in too many state legislatures across the country are falling in line, weakening the voice of the people by passing egregious gerrymanders.
Meanwhile, anti-democracy groups are assaulting voting rights on multiple fronts — from challenging the Voting Rights Act in court to openly undermining an accurate count in the next census.
Peter, these are not separate fights. They’re all connected. And they represent our new reality. We’re in an era of perpetual redistricting and ever-increasing attacks on the American people’s freedom to vote.
**That’s why we’re announcing that All On The Line is becoming Redistricting Action — a name that captures both who we are and what this moment demands. Because redistricting isn’t just a policy fight — it’s an ongoing struggle for a representative democracy.**
[**This change is about rising to the challenges we face with the urgency they require — taking action together to build a representative democracy. Add your name and let me know I can count on you to do your part in the critical mission ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160388/588556492/1419027664?source=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1_email_20251212-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251212-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1_&utm_campaign=Rebrand1&refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1_email_20251212-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDg1OGVlLTk5ZDctZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EytcT1b69zOIfb_hPMXejLD6sVXxIcxl3KbrE4xuZP4=&emci=d12b9b9d-8dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dd858ee-99d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
In February 2019 when President Barack Obama and I launched the All On The Line campaign, we wanted to design a nationwide grassroots movement for fair maps and fair representation.
From the start, that movement has been about empowering local organizers to become redistricting experts by offering free training and providing the resources activists need to make a difference in their communities.
And it worked.
Volunteers across the country have testified at hearings, protested against unfair maps, and organized their neighbors to demand accountability from those in power.
**Together, we’ve built a people-powered movement that has changed the conversation on redistricting and made a real impact in the fight for fair representation.**
But since the last redistricting cycle and especially this year, we’ve entered a new era of mid-decade gerrymandering, court battles, and anti-democracy power grabs. The reality is, if we want a government that actually reflects the people, we need fair maps — and that requires staying engaged, organized, and ready to fight.
Redistricting Action is here to do that work. Peter, we were built to meet that challenge. But we need partners, allies, voters, and supporters like you to stay in the fight with us.
[**If you believe it’s time for fair districts and a truly representative democracy, please share your name today to kick off this new, urgent phase of our work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160389/588556493/1419027664?source=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1_email_20251212-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251212-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1_&utm_campaign=Rebrand1&refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1_email_20251212-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkZDg1OGVlLTk5ZDctZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EytcT1b69zOIfb_hPMXejLD6sVXxIcxl3KbrE4xuZP4=&emci=d12b9b9d-8dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dd858ee-99d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

clean_body: All On The Line is now Redistricting Action | Peter, Our democracy is at an inflection point. President Donald Trump is shamelessly demanding that politicians manipulate maps in order to preserve political power. And lawmakers in too many state legislatures across the country are falling in line, weakening the voice of the people by passing egregious gerrymanders. Meanwhile, anti-democracy groups are assaulting voting rights on multiple fronts — from challenging the Voting Rights Act in court to openly undermining an accurate count in the next census. Peter, these are not separate fights. They’re all connected. And they represent our new reality. We’re in an era of perpetual redistricting and ever-increasing attacks on the American people’s freedom to vote. That’s why we’re announcing that All On The Line is becoming Redistricting Action — a name that captures both who we are and what this moment demands. Because redistricting isn’t just a policy fight — it’s an ongoing struggle for a representative democracy. In February 2019 when President Barack Obama and I launched the All On The Line campaign, we wanted to design a nationwide grassroots movement for fair maps and fair representation. From the start, that movement has been about empowering local organizers to become redistricting experts by offering free training and providing the resources activists need to make a difference in their communities. And it worked. Volunteers across the country have testified at hearings, protested against unfair maps, and organized their neighbors to demand accountability from those in power. Together, we’ve built a people-powered movement that has changed the conversation on redistricting and made a real impact in the fight for fair representation. But since the last redistricting cycle and especially this year, we’ve entered a new era of mid-decade gerrymandering, court battles, and anti-democracy power grabs. The reality is, if we want a government that actually reflects the people, we need fair maps — and that requires staying engaged, organized, and ready to fight. Redistricting Action is here to do that work. Peter, we were built to meet that challenge. But we need partners, allies, voters, and supporters like you to stay in the fight with us. Sincerely, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from Redistricting Action by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
Open to begin your exclusive focus group interview.

| | | | Peter - Marsha Blackburn here!
My team has noticed that you are one of the most active conservatives from FL! I was very impressed with your support and commitment to the America First movement.

body:
We have very real momentum in this race and we have to capitalize on it or we risk losing all the progress we’ve made.
| | | |

Peter,
What happens next will determine if Lauren Boebert continues her chaotic, cruel reign in Congress, or whether we fire her, right now, while we have the chance.
This is much greater than just another routine election. Defeating top Trump ally and MAGA darling Lauren Boebert this election would effectively end Trump's stronghold on Congress. His list of absolute allies would dwindle and we can reclaim power for the people.
Boebert's fundraising is abysmal. She is misusing campaign funds for personal expenses (aka partying with Kid Rock), and GOP donors are abandoning her in droves.
Meanwhile, our fundraising is reaching new heights--because of your support. Last quarter, we outraised Boebert 5:1. If we work hard enough, we could dwarf her this Q4.
And finally, I need you to remember that Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in my district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
There is something incredible happening here, and we have to be ready to take things to the next level to win.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time.
Hi Peter, it’s Jon.
If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-ossoff-email-20251212?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98541?refcode=em20251212-9820&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9820%2E614464%2E86tZUc)**
Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.
There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections.
_But I have you, Peter._
Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.
Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
Yes, this election will be tough.
But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
_Let’s do it again._
So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and Heartland Patriots today. Here’s the link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-ossoff-email-20251212?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98541?refcode=em20251212-9820&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9820%2E614464%2E86tZUc)**
Thank you,
Jon

---|---|---

name: Dan Driscoll, Campaign Manager
subject: I'm always thinking ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to prepare for everything that's to come.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160829/588557771/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjhjOTc5MC05Y2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMXSplbfukPucarE61FxTLwyS3tpN585FUAKmX2ITyg=)

Hey, Peter! It's Dan here, Christina's Campaign Manager.

It's my job to prepare for everything, _and I mean everything_ , that this campaign can expect before Election Day. As we stare down the start of 2026, I want to give you some insight into what I'm anticipating in our race for IA-01:

➡️ Millions of dollars thrown at Mariannette Miller-Meeks to help her save this seat _(That's on top of the hundreds of thousands Speaker Mike Johnson just threw her way this month!)_

➡️ Outside special interests giving everything they can to keep IA-01 in their pockets

➡️ Attack ads against Christina to try and stop her from winning this race

➡️ More votes in Congress from Miller-Meeks that prove she doesn't work for Iowans

This list might seem daunting, Peter. But for me, it's nothing I can't handle, because this is exactly what we've been preparing for since day one. And truthfully, there's no better candidate than Christina Bohannan in this race.

I believe in Christina. Each day, I see the work she does to keep this campaign moving, to keep the focus on Iowans and their needs and concerns.

Just like Christina, I'm ready to give this campaign my all, but I need you with me. I sat down with our Finance Team, and we came up with a mid-month fundraising goal to help us stay on track for December. We need to raise $10,000 by midnight Sunday.

**[Will you help me keep this campaign in fighting shape with a donation today? Chip in any amount you can here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160830/588557772/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___dan_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___dan_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=668c9790-9cd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjhjOTc5MC05Y2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMXSplbfukPucarE61FxTLwyS3tpN585FUAKmX2ITyg=)**

clean_body: We need to prepare for everything that's to come. | = Hey, Peter! It's Dan here, Christina's Campaign Manager. It's my job to prepare for everything, and I mean everything , that this campaign can expect before Election Day. As we stare down the start of 2026, I want to give you some insight into what I'm anticipating in our race for IA-01: ➡️ Millions of dollars thrown at Mariannette Miller-Meeks to help her save this seat (That's on top of the hundreds of thousands Speaker Mike Johnson just threw her way this month!) ➡️ Outside special interests giving everything they can to keep IA-01 in their pockets ➡️ Attack ads against Christina to try and stop her from winning this race ➡️ More votes in Congress from Miller-Meeks that prove she doesn't work for Iowans This list might seem daunting, Peter. But for me, it's nothing I can't handle, because this is exactly what we've been preparing for since day one. And truthfully, there's no better candidate than Christina Bohannan in this race. I believe in Christina. Each day, I see the work she does to keep this campaign moving, to keep the focus on Iowans and their needs and concerns. Just like Christina, I'm ready to give this campaign my all, but I need you with me. I sat down with our Finance Team, and we came up with a mid-month fundraising goal to help us stay on track for December. We need to raise $10,000 by midnight Sunday. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: name: Haley Stevens
subject: Did you see me on your TV this morning?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Why I introduced articles of impeachment against RFK Jr.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1630%2E49239%2E-IEu3p)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10356?t=2&akid=1630%2E49239%2E-IEu3p)
---
Hi there, null,

Did you catch me on TV this morning? I joined Ana Cabrera on _MS NOW_ to talk about why I just introduced articles of impeachment against RFK Jr.
**The truth is, there might not be anyone more dangerous in Trump’s Cabinet right now.**
RFK Jr. has fired the CDC director, leading to department-wide confusion and uncertainty. He’s purged essential government scientists and doctors. He’s gutted research into cancer, HIV, addiction, and mRNA technology – research that saves lives and powers Michigan’s innovation economy. **_He misled members of the U.S. Senate under oath._**
I called for his resignation months ago. But when I saw him standing next to Trump as he told pregnant women not to take Tylenol – claiming, with zero proof, that it could cause autism – I hit my limit.

I’m serious about defending public health and Michigan families – that’s why we need to hold RFK Jr. accountable. And that means removing him from office. We need thoughtful leaders who put science over BS. Facts over conspiracy theories. People over politics. RFK Jr. has proven – _over and over again_ – that he is not one of them.
That’s why I intend to lead the charge to remove him from office – but it's not enough.

We must elect leaders who believe that science should drive policy, who will fight for our families, our health, and our future. That's a big part of why I'm running for Senate.
**As one of the only open seats ranked as a “Toss Up,” Michigan is a critical battleground in our fight to flip the Senate blue and provide a much-needed check on Trump’s anti-science agenda. Republicans spent nearly $80 million to win here last year, and they almost succeeded – so I’m personally asking:[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help me raise the resources it’ll take to win and help Democrats reclaim the Senate majority?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10357?t=3&akid=1630%2E49239%2E-IEu3p)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10402?t=4&akid=1630%2E49239%2E-IEu3p)

Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10361?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1630%2E49239%2E-IEu3p) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10356?t=9&akid=1630%2E49239%2E-IEu3p)

Thank you,
Haley

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160859/588557885/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA4ZmNjNi05Y2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAOdb_p9NLjC_bDcDtoFKqYHEZOdNgVZxBfF3cfbECs=)
---
Peter, **This week has been a powerful reminder of who Becca Balint is and why her voice is so essential in Congress.** Just days ago, Becca stood up against a cruel and degrading decision: officials altered Admiral Rachel Levine’s official portrait to replace her name with the name she used before transitioning. This was an intentional act meant to erase and disrespect her identity. Becca didn’t hesitate to call it out. She didn’t waver. She spoke up because dignity and respect are not negotiable. _**And yesterday, she did it again.**_ Becca stood beside journalist Dylan Collins — a Vermonter and American reporter who was seriously injured when an Israeli tank fired on a clearly marked group of journalists in southern Lebanon. She didn’t mince words. She didn’t soften the truth. She showed what it looks like when a member of Congress refuses to let violence, intimidation, or authoritarian behavior stand unchallenged. [**If you believe that courage should be met with support and leadership should never stand alone, now is the moment to act! Click here to chip in today and show Becca that YOU HAVE HER BACK!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160861/588557888/-86120070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA4ZmNjNi05Y2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAOdb_p9NLjC_bDcDtoFKqYHEZOdNgVZxBfF3cfbECs=) **[HAVE BECCA'S BACK TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160863/588557890/-86120070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA4ZmNjNi05Y2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAOdb_p9NLjC_bDcDtoFKqYHEZOdNgVZxBfF3cfbECs=)** Becca shows up for people who are being hurt, silenced, attacked, or written out of their own stories. She stands with the _vulnerable_ , the _marginalized_ , the _targeted_ and she refuses to pretend that cruelty is normal or that injustice is inevitable. **That’s why this moment matters.** Becca’s leadership is rooted in a simple but powerful truth: **When one of us is targeted, all of us are targeted. And when one of us is defended, all of us are lifted.** Her words were clear, forceful, and grounded in values we desperately need more of in Washington:
* Accountability is not optional.
* A free press is essential to a functioning democracy.
* Silencing, intimidating, or harming people for doing their jobs is unacceptable.
* Every person deserves safety, dignity, and the protection of their government.

**This isn’t performative. It’s who Becca is**. **[If you want to make sure Becca can keep fighting — loudly, fearlessly, and with integrity — please click here and kick some money her way today! We need our movement to have her back while she has ours!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160864/588557892/-86120070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA4ZmNjNi05Y2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAOdb_p9NLjC_bDcDtoFKqYHEZOdNgVZxBfF3cfbECs=)** **Your support tells Becca that when she steps up for others, she’s not standing alone. clean_body: | = Peter, This week has been a powerful reminder of who Becca Balint is and why her voice is so essential in Congress. Just days ago, Becca stood up against a cruel and degrading decision: officials altered Admiral Rachel Levine’s official portrait to replace her name with the name she used before transitioning. This was an intentional act meant to erase and disrespect her identity. Becca didn’t hesitate to call it out. She didn’t waver. She spoke up because dignity and respect are not negotiable. And yesterday, she did it again. Becca stood beside journalist Dylan Collins — a Vermonter and American reporter who was seriously injured when an Israeli tank fired on a clearly marked group of journalists in southern Lebanon. She didn’t mince words. She didn’t soften the truth. She showed what it looks like when a member of Congress refuses to let violence, intimidation, or authoritarian behavior stand unchallenged. = = Becca shows up for people who are being hurt, silenced, attacked, or written out of their own stories. She stands with the vulnerable , the marginalized , the targeted and she refuses to pretend that cruelty is normal or that injustice is inevitable. That’s why this moment matters. Becca’s leadership is rooted in a simple but powerful truth: When one of us is targeted, all of us are targeted. And when one of us is defended, all of us are lifted. Her words were clear, forceful, and grounded in values we desperately need more of in Washington: Accountability is not optional. A free press is essential to a functioning democracy. Silencing, intimidating, or harming people for doing their jobs is unacceptable. Every person deserves safety, dignity, and the protection of their government. This isn’t performative. It’s who Becca is. = Your support tells Becca that when she steps up for others, she’s not standing alone. You’re right there beside her. Thank you for believing in the kind of leadership that rises to meet moments like these. — Team Balint If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: We can meet this moment — if we get back to basics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Will you take a moment to read my op-ed?

Peter,

The Trump presidency is dangerous — for our country, our democratic institutions, and for the people we're supposed to serve as elected officials.

But Trump’s presidency also gives Democrats an opportunity that we can’t afford to miss. As the Trump Administration abandons rural America with policies in the Big Ugly Bill that take away healthcare, close down rural hospitals, and make it harder to attract rural investment and jobs, we have the chance to turn red-leaning rural states and districts blue.

In order to take advantage of this opportunity, we need to be sure that we are truly listening to voters’ concerns, offering solutions that help them in their daily lives, and make sure that we talk like normal human beings.

These steps are simple, and trust me, they work. I’ve won three times statewide as a proud Democrat in a state that Donald Trump carried by 30 points just last year. **I am living proof that Democrats with the right message and right approach can win anywhere—even in deep-red Kentucky.**

In my new op-ed for the _Washington Post_ , I lay out the playbook for how Democrats can meet this moment and expand the map by running with clarity and purpose. How we cut through the chaos, bring people together, and stay focused on the issues that actually impact everyday life. I hope you'll read it — and if you believe in this work,**[I hope you'll consider chipping in today to help In This Together PAC support leaders who are committed to decency, solutions, and putting people first. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160901/588558127/1089852515?refcode=em25_251212_wapo_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251212_wapo_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=cc389a61-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode2=cc389a61-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MzODlhNjEtOWRkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceHnSNJb-LAnBrkv7LFRAPEMsLskOWzqZphVnMrtD9Y=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160902/588558128/1089852515?refcode=em25_251212_wapo_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251212_wapo_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cc389a61-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MzODlhNjEtOWRkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceHnSNJb-LAnBrkv7LFRAPEMsLskOWzqZphVnMrtD9Y=)
* * *
**Opinion: Democrats Face a Critical Moment. Here's How We Meet It.**
_By Andy Beshear, Governor of Kentucky and Incoming Chair of the DGA_
"Tackling affordability is not enough. To truly lead again, Democrats must be the party of aspiration.

When I look at our country, what worries me is the widespread belief that the American Dream is unattainable, even dead. This is the same American Dream — the promise that if you work hard and play by the rules, you can get ahead — that has inspired generations and lifted America to great heights.

This concern transcends party lines. Families know how much their grocery and utility bills have gone up, and how unaffordable rent or the mortgage is getting. But they also know that the vacation they took as children has slipped out of reach...."

**[CONTINUE READING →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121160903/588558129/-1284005962?pwapi_token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..yu7q9EKA3LcBeuBuRo70qLVy95f6zlyfo4oxyAMAUpA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MzODlhNjEtOWRkNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ceHnSNJb-LAnBrkv7LFRAPEMsLskOWzqZphVnMrtD9Y=&emci=e6e4daf6-c1d6-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cc389a61-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=17458827)**

* * *

Thanks for taking the time,

Andy

name: Massachusetts Democratic Party
subject: 2026 MassDems Convention Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
From the Heart of the Commonwealth, we’re thrilled to welcome Democrats from every corner of Massachusetts to the DCU Center in Worcester on Friday, May 29th, and Saturday, May 30th, for the 2026 Massachusetts Democratic State Convention.
Worcester is ready. Our city has always been a home for Democratic organizing, community strength, and grassroots grit, and next May, we'll bring that spirit to the Convention floor. Thousands of delegates, activists, and community leaders will come together as we formally consider statewide Democratic candidates and chart the path toward victory in 2026.
This convention will be a powerful moment of unity, momentum, and purpose. We’re building together, fighting together, and celebrating together – and Worcester is the perfect place to launch that work.
We’ll see you in Worcester!
Sincerely,
Congressman Jim McGovern
U.S. Representative, Massachusetts’ 2nd Congressional District
Mayor Joe Petty
Mayor of Worcester
State Senator Robyn Kennedy
First Worcester District
State Senator Michael Moore
Second Worcester District
Representative Daniel Donahue
16th Worcester District
Representative Mary Keefe
15th Worcester District
Representative David LeBoeuf
17th Worcester District
Representative John Mahoney
13th Worcester District
Representative James O'Day
14th Worcester District

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: They fail. We mobilize.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, organizetexas
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=87fbf4c3-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=87fbf4c3-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
Peter,
When MAGA electeds aren’t attacking our rights, they’re hurting our pocketbooks.
Senate Republicans voted down legislation to extend Affordable Care Act tax credits [https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/senate-rejects-plans-to-address-sharp-rise-in-health-care-premiums] on Thursday, meaning that millions across the country will now see a steep increase in their healthcare costs at the start of next year.
There’s no excuse for this. What we’re seeing is a complete disregard for working-class families. Literal lives are at stake. NOW is the time to pool our resources and electorally fight back.
DONATE to TOP PAC if you agree Texans of all walks of life deserve accessible, affordable healthcare. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=87fbf4c3-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=87fbf4c3-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=87fbf4c3-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
2026 is right around the corner, Peter. Midterms will be here before we know it, and we’re already putting pieces in place to hit the ground running in the new year.
Your contribution provides us with the fuel we need to engage and electorally mobilize more Texans on issues that impact ALL of us, such as healthcare.
PITCH IN $5, $15, $25 or any amount you can to boost our get-out-the-vote work in next year’s elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=SenateGOPFail&amount=15.00&refcode2=87fbf4c3-9dd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa]
Winning a healthier, more vibrant Texas will take time and effort, but with your continued support, we’ll get there. Together, let’s keep building a future where ALL Texans – no matter our age, race, faith, gender, or background – have a chance to live full lives and thrive.
– Texas Organizing Project PAC

Your contribution provides us with the fuel we need to engage and electorally mobilize more Texans on issues that impact ALL of us, such as healthcare. PITCH IN $5, $15, $25 or any amount you can to boost our get-out-the-vote work in next year’s elections. [] Winning a healthier, more vibrant Texas will take time and effort, but with your continued support, we’ll get there. Together, let’s keep building a future where ALL Texans – no matter our age, race, faith, gender, or background – have a chance to live full lives and thrive. – Texas Organizing Project PAC [] Texas Organizing Project PAC P.O. Box 120296 San Antonio, TX 78212-9496 United States [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe using the link below.

But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! Sincerely, Mike Johnson56th Speaker of the House On behalf of House GOP HQ (Platinum Committee)| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Exciting news about Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Mandela Barnes is the right fighter for Wisconsin
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121225_B1_Schiff&t=2&akid=5710%2E196590%2EAfNSc-) Hi friend, Adam Schiff here. **I wanted you to hear this exciting news from me directly: I’m endorsing Mandela Barnes to be the next Governor of Wisconsin.[Will you chip in $15 or $27 to power this campaign into 2026?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121225_B1_Schiff&t=3&akid=5710%2E196590%2EAfNSc-)** I’ve taken on some of the toughest battles against the Trump Administration – I know what kind of fighter it takes not only to defend against harmful policies, but to put forth a bold vision that actually helps working people. That’s how I know Mandela Barnes is the right person in this race. Mandela is going to stand up for the middle class because the story of how the middle class is being squeezed in this country is something he understands all too well. And he’s taking on the fight for the middle class by pushing to expand Medicaid in Wisconsin, reverse the damage brought on by Trump’s tariffs, and lower the cost of everyday necessities. Mandela has your back. While politicians cater to special interests and the ultra-rich, too many people have been left behind — Mandela is stepping up to the plate to serve people in all corners of Wisconsin. Mandela has been on the frontlines helping roll back Scott Walker’s legacy in Wisconsin. We can’t just stop there — he has the experience and energy to deliver on making life more affordable, providing real relief to farmers, and expanding access to quality healthcare. I’m going to be honest: if we are going to keep up our momentum, this governor’s race is ground zero to do just that. **[The national GOP wants to reverse the important progress that’s been made in Wisconsin — can I count on you to chip in $15 or $27 today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121225_B1_Schiff&t=4&akid=5710%2E196590%2EAfNSc-)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121225_B1_Schiff&t=5&akid=5710%2E196590%2EAfNSc-)

name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Gospel Stops Hijacker, Heroic First Graders, and Elfis
body:
The pilot of a Samaritan's Purse aircraft thwarted a hijacking in South Sudan by [sharing the Christian Gospel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDsO2zAQRE9DdRTI1b9gkUad06YU1uJSok2JBJe24NsHTnKDlIMBBvPer9tyQx_8uf3Eg4zb3FJcXE66OFAplJctcqLAJSbe_QPXJ-WdcvTrAgo6qUFqWCz68Fm6yhpHBNRUZPTQd93QDC1Uu7mPdlWNncbWWdQ9UUO9u2MPq1bjpLHy5rumQQNoNXZT3U-TWhXo_t4QTKsVrSLrS8z1I_qz7OTCJ74p12s8qmD2UhKL5oeAWcB8XVd9ccJvKWD-0giYuWAh-S9cJFNGzyS3aCXjgdkXPFmmV2aSnAifLOOrSHSFskwBT5J_Dfhzk3RaloyOwkfAXGVj0-VD8NwPolXbgT78uVb-2-nbwO8AAAD__wqckEg) with the armed man who had sneaked onto the plane and demanded to be flown to Chad.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAUAE-Du1jwsE1cUESK3OW3v0QYHvhliUEGJZvbr7JX2H40I83_m7lZSrTHf_aBOsRgWshmx1dN2BoeJuZaMNWWS93obt0XHhsemZwBDuNJwEmA8ZbS24yd1wERUHaohZrGUUk1QLdpKRXycFbrxFflxaBgUJNAZ89SAAy-I_2xCRAAgp_HuZ_mmTsOYlolwuw8Gzh6avno75n2tmFI7_zEo3f50SW9tVYqkxcGC4MlYqvv3ZZGEfcPwWB5ksfcl60wudgQKJFtyOR1zcnbgt-CwdTIM3kNKWDMHr2AKzoYL92hfXlRSlQnxQYeH5bSb7j9-dhTw08AAAD__8CagQY) | |
# Friday, December 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** This week, _Feel Good Flyover_ brings you a story about an [unusual 3-year-old](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SrCAUhJ9GMyw4_jAEBDcxm5tuaCEclVnkWMCO5dtvOa-wUQdd3dX9fT2np_HBx_W_2VEv6zKVhaaIZw5YCqZppXxgyIWOvPmXsd-YNkzk7QQceiaACZic8eGa-trpBRGwrVELOfS9bGUH9aYlx0Uqh5IPi5qN5J19DDgo6axUwva113ebAAEg-KNXzaAUtxzEMLcIyrqq4-h8odS8yMey4RIuemNqLO110FspR67afxWMFYzneTZxtveL269gzAelkisY7Yb51pZdaBKj4NhMF_PRecNmtLRjZiel4DK76CeumAtLpqBjnyg7grkwsWSjgU6qTtZJu-P0Ifg8yKrj6258-Mwqf-b51vAbAAD__-jljZk) from India who was named the world's youngest rated chess player. He defeated opponents nearly nine times his age to earn the recognition, as we report below. A can't-miss episode of the _[Feel Good Flyover Podcast](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHsbUA0OlKlOTrarUBRF42KTEWIAd-fZVe4Ue4P-l7_NiLjamuExX-0AdpmBayGbBZ03YGhYz5bpiqi2vdY53676xzFhydAYYyBOHEwfjbUyHkdTrgAgoKGquBimVUD3QWbsxSOQiyN47KxxKD4B9UNwyqaQINOrfGwcOwNmLHLthHJljwIebQBidJz1DH1su3T3Hpc0Y0pF3LJ3LD5r03NpaiXglcCZwPvLWtu6GBM74zu329rV_XCdatF-fMaVYB0V6Nj1sTH99-zd81_ATAAD__w2sbg8)_ with Amy Hess features an interview with "The Singing Cowboy," an Austin musician who has granted more than 60 musical last wishes through bedside concerts. Watch and listen to this exclusive interview [here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGnwVsszsEYe2C4UpTpJltVqQsicGyTkmABsZW3r9JX6Pp90m_4f57N2YYYHvPF3klP82TqlMyD9hKpVspmTmWlWGpayxJu1n1TXiin4AxylAfAA6DxNsSXkY3XExGSaEiD6qVUQnXYLJpjJ2Bw3o0KvPQgHAcPg1Ry8KOzsgn6rQECIvBBjm0_jtxxhP4qCEfnWcfJh5pye0vhURea4ittlFuX7k3US61rYeIfwxPD077v7Ss96_NK7_-92OoWJk4bE0f6D_Z5_No-LjPDvjJxVLI0Wft1DzGG0ivW8fluQ_zF65-rbBp_AgAA___eYnZh). If you're curious about the latest theories and emerging research being discussed around memory and brain health, today's sponsor, [Synaptigen's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAUAE-Du1jwsE1cUESK3OW3v0QYHvhliUEGJZvbr7JX2H40I83_m7lZSrTHf_aBOsRgWshmx1dN2BoeJuZaMNWWS93obt0XHhsemZwBDuNJwEmA8ZbS24yd1wERUHaohZrGUUk1QLdpKRXycFbrxFflxaBgUJNAZ89SAAy-I_2xCRAAgp_HuZ_mmTsOYlolwuw8Gzh6avno75n2tmFI7_zEo3f50SW9tVYqkxcGC4MlYqvv3ZZGEfcPwWB5ksfcl60wudgQKJFtyOR1zcnbgt-CwdTIM3kNKWDMHr2AKzoYL92hfXlRSlQnxQYeH5bSb7j9-dhTw08AAAD__8CagQY) newest presentation, offers a provocative look at how scientists are rethinking where our memories live.
|
---
## Pilot Uses Gospel to Stop Hijacker
The pilot of a Samaritan's Purse aircraft thwarted a hijacking in South Sudan by [sharing the Christian Gospel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDsO2zAQRE9DdRTI1b9gkUad06YU1uJSok2JBJe24NsHTnKDlIMBBvPer9tyQx_8uf3Eg4zb3FJcXE66OFAplJctcqLAJSbe_QPXJ-WdcvTrAgo6qUFqWCz68Fm6yhpHBNRUZPTQd93QDC1Uu7mPdlWNncbWWdQ9UUO9u2MPq1bjpLHy5rumQQNoNXZT3U-TWhXo_t4QTKsVrSLrS8z1I_qz7OTCJ74p12s8qmD2UhKL5oeAWcB8XVd9ccJvKWD-0giYuWAh-S9cJFNGzyS3aCXjgdkXPFmmV2aSnAifLOOrSHSFskwBT5J_Dfhzk3RaloyOwkfAXGVj0-VD8NwPolXbgT78uVb-2-nbwO8AAAD__wqckEg) with the armed man who had sneaked onto the plane and demanded to be flown to Chad. Franklin Graham, President and CEO of the Boone, North Carolina-based Christian aid group, recounted that after the hijacker pulled a gun and threatened to kill the pilot, the pilot shared that "God loves him," causing the man to [begin crying and surrender](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAMhk8jbwok-qF40NDFW7p2NGSJtpnKliExCXL7wgV6gm4k8ON_fF-38eYo0r58ug3tvMwjz2nc8VUiMmMel1QOjIXTUVa6O_-NecWcyI-goJUapIYxOIrvsa2CnREB6wqtNl3bmto0UK22dh2aqWmw60N77WszITplrsFMTmvfV2RPNw0aQKtr21-6vldege6mGqH3QTQKA3HKl3uinVec4zs9MV982qpoV-ajiPpDwCBgKAd6zo8tJu_iueVUCRh2L2DY0mNnR_v546sIGM5oAYMGAYM6r-I2l4ndLos8HrmglAfFxFL-IZAyUHGFMcuMkXCusg3Hi2Kk0hnRqGVzFH_L8b-pPi38BAAA__8lN43z). The plane landed safely in Wau, where South Sudanese authorities took [the man into custody](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuy4yAQAE-DMlRi9MEKCDZR5k03VGEYpPEiUMHYKt9-a987wrtAd3X_ua93S5HS9tseaMIWVg55TXjViMxY1i3XE2PlfNadntb9xbJjyeRW6GCUCqSC1VuKn3VsvAmIgH2DRulpHHWvB2h2cwsWAkxzUM6GSTt9849Bw0O73lqPY0PmP02BAlDdbZzbaZ4714GaHj3C7LwYOvTEubTPTIl3DPGT31hal48mmp35rKL_JWARsFzX1VZ72EJsUz1fpWKbyyZgsYXJRRSwVLaMByaWOUmPToL87qO0SUqy5hfvsr68TQKWphh_XhQj1UmLodsOS_HLzT-e9jbwLwAA__9-5IUI). No one was hurt, and the aid group says it's reviewing security protocols.
## Farmers Finish Late Friend’s Harvest
About 75 farmers from more than 10 communities showed up earlier this month after North Dakota farmer Randy Fyllesvold died in a crash [to finish his final harvest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OnjAQxJ8Guv1klr8uKK6xkuJSJBddiQxe8N4ZG9nOh8jTR9wrpJ0ZjWZ-76_Tq2bHfvuhdxrXbZ3yGiZPZ3KUM8VpC-kgl3I4kuUPvXxStBQDLxMKbKFCqHAymt01taUZVyKkuqSx6ru27eu-wdKO0uhBCmrmeui7eZGkpZCt6OQwN9QhljzebRVWiJUYWvnopBSLwKqba0K5mKIRZDiH-PgI7LOl1V3hSfGxhL10o835SEX9UqAqUJ3n-Uh_vL_S5_X3ThSothAM3L8KVK0c6gIViFrCd3hn5-DFnfpK8JN22meK8GY5ffl9C0rHnWKCXzac8PuAtwCKPScLSjtHHlRk8gbSLWsH33R8UsplHM1xsnOcur5oxLZrdl9783-Dfo74LwAA__-ZSpMv). Twelve combines, seven grain carts, and over 40 trucks showed up to clear 1,400 acres of corn. The effort was led by fellow farmers Wyatt Thompson and Andy Gates, who coordinated logistics with local grain elevators to ensure a smooth, large-scale operation. [Watch a video report](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssuIA_BoZKldUO6doRYbjYpDhYQGzl7av0FbqeI_2G__dVX02I4b58mQ2VX7yuPuk7niVirZj1ksqOsdS0lzXcjP3BvGJOwWqgIC8MLgy0MyE-tWyc8oiAvEHF-k7KnvcCmlU5MVg_wjCAmdEiOi-EkUJSy2dmZtME9dIYMABGBzm23ThSS4F1M0cYrSOCogs15faWwr2u6OMzHZhbm7YmqrXWvRD-RmAiMJ3n2T7Toz5mfP2vxVS7Ej4dhL9fP8Rl65k8ps8mK7efIcZQup4IumwmxD-y_rvFoeA3AAD__5BsdF8). Randy’s widow, Kharra, [called the scene “breathtaking](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbFu3DAMhp9G3nSQKNuKBw-HFF6K3BIUQboYOos6KZUlQ2IuvQ599uLc9Ak68SNA_vh_8uVpfjIhhnQ5mRVHd3EzuTwn_KgRibDMl1w3jJXyVn14M8sPLB5LDssMAjougUuYrQnxNneNHR0ioGpwlLrvOq10C40fe92i0XropXZWuO5spFVOgFIdGtOKJox3NQkSQIqHbjj0wyAWAbI_K4RhsawVaAPlcnjLIZFHF2_5iuWw5LWJoyfaKlNHBhOD6W6_GBuylFocgkdT6D7IYHJo6L2gZTCdY86rNdbeGExLToSJGEz_YokHbvMvTJVnx50pK5bKt0CL5yFxytyFFKq_FxO5N-WKlbjLhUdD-LnBXQmY7G5LMXX8zdSR8Ccx9eXFY2LQgfjU3jmhKTscE0Xc8XHvT7mQZ_D4nN_LgnvSDsTzt9Pp9S99ff3elNFuHyHGUHvNWnFZTYj7gei_P3sd4U8AAAD__33Dtkg),” thanking everyone who helped finish the job her husband started.
## Lost Cat Survives 5 Months in Wild
Shadow, a family cat from Oklahoma, [survived five months alone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7iYyY7DjgmKbdG_bLS0WxmZeMCAgjvL3K-8vvPpeXd1z_nytX4YDx_23OUhv-7a2La2R3jVQa1TWPdVMobaUq-dvY59UPJXEdsUBFQgEgaszHD6r6p3eiJDGnrSYJ6XmcZbYe63EcrcKUZpJzG6521GQRZQTLmq0UvasrzWBAlEMd7XcpmUZ7IBi-jsSLtZ1ciDHLZXbd-LYPG3hk04qN5uOPmjfWq7d-KvDR4ePTCkHuqIOH9Y0ePsEVK3J5MC9CscdLiJIEUoyDlrhDAcXY18hvWr4QH2Vk0-qwBGaJ7AmGsfm6tsnU4UtFVBwpNh8BSHuk5Sj6It2-c0hcJ3mTg77YTj8v9h-7PbU-C8AAP__xamRJg) in the Canadian Rockies after vanishing during a summer road trip. He was finally found near Liard Hot Springs, British Columbia. Two Canadians, Christine Sutherland and Bruce Kosugi, [are helping get him home](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2S3CAQhJ9GylDB6O8UEDjZ7Jw6VI1gWGaNYAvmTrVv71q_woXdQVd_35_P_RM5cb7_xpNsuIddQtkzXS2RCNX9XtqTUpPybJEf6P5SjVQLux00zMqAMrB75PTa597bQAQ09mTNuszzOq4T9NFObvbjdhDCrNfFBDP6ZaKPY0TtcVmxZ_teM2AAjP6Yt2HZNu00mOUYCTbnu0mTZyl1eBTOEimkV_mmOrhy9slGkWfrxl8d3Dq4Xdc1uMMNDju4vVk6uDnM6N_5qCzconIlfZ0Hv6tQqqgm6lFiVpUae8rSVKWvzEIqlSbKoaiLJSo8qbLDrAKenF5qG1atR6Onvlr_vDglbsvaTfp-Iqf__-THYr8t_AsAAP__dN-P6Q). Despite being allergic to cats, Kosugi drove Shadow eight hours, and Sutherland will fly him to Winnipeg, where the family will reunite and drive the final stretch. The Barton kids even offered to skip Christmas gifts to help cover travel costs, a gesture that speaks to just how much Shadow means to the family.
|
---

clean_body: The pilot of a Samaritan's Purse aircraft thwarted a hijacking in South Sudan by with the armed man who had sneaked onto the plane and demanded to be flown to Chad. | | | | | | Friday, December 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! This week, Feel Good Flyover brings you a story about an from India who was named the world's youngest rated chess player. He defeated opponents nearly nine times his age to earn the recognition, as we report below. A can't-miss episode of the with Amy Hess features an interview with "The Singing Cowboy," an Austin musician who has granted more than 60 musical last wishes through bedside concerts. Watch and listen to this exclusive interview . If you're curious about the latest theories and emerging research being discussed around memory and brain health, today's sponsor, newest presentation, offers a provocative look at how scientists are rethinking where our memories live. | Pilot Uses Gospel to Stop Hijacker The pilot of a Samaritan's Purse aircraft thwarted a hijacking in South Sudan by with the armed man who had sneaked onto the plane and demanded to be flown to Chad. Franklin Graham, President and CEO of the Boone, North Carolina-based Christian aid group, recounted that after the hijacker pulled a gun and threatened to kill the pilot, the pilot shared that "God loves him," causing the man to . The plane landed safely in Wau, where South Sudanese authorities took . No one was hurt, and the aid group says it's reviewing security protocols. Farmers Finish Late Friend’s Harvest About 75 farmers from more than 10 communities showed up earlier this month after North Dakota farmer Randy Fyllesvold died in a crash . Twelve combines, seven grain carts, and over 40 trucks showed up to clear 1,400 acres of corn. The effort was led by fellow farmers Wyatt Thompson and Andy Gates, who coordinated logistics with local grain elevators to ensure a smooth, large-scale operation. . Randy’s widow, Kharra, ,” thanking everyone who helped finish the job her husband started. Lost Cat Survives 5 Months in Wild Shadow, a family cat from Oklahoma, in the Canadian Rockies after vanishing during a summer road trip. He was finally found near Liard Hot Springs, British Columbia. Two Canadians, Christine Sutherland and Bruce Kosugi, . Despite being allergic to cats, Kosugi drove Shadow eight hours, and Sutherland will fly him to Winnipeg, where the family will reunite and drive the final stretch. name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier more than 375 times.
#

Team —
Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times.
That's not easy.
First off, the landing area of an aircraft carrier is only a few hundred feet in length. That’s about 1/40th the length of a runway at a military airbase. But what makes this even more complicated is that your runway is moving through the water. It moves to the right because of the angled deck, and bobs up and down like a cork, and rocks left and right in the ocean. It’s challenging during the day and often feels impossible at night. Naval aviators have to do this in all kinds of conditions... rain, snow, fog, and during combat when the ship is often blacked out so it can’t be found by the enemy.
He did this 375 times, and every time any naval aviator does this, he or she is risking their life for their country. And then he launched on a rocket ship and into space four times in a spacecraft that is more complicated and more difficult to operate than any other machine ever built by humans.
So, when Mark says he isn't intimidated by Donald Trump and the White House, Pete Hegseth at the Department of Defense, or Kash Patel at the FBI... you can take his word for it.
But that doesn’t mean we can underestimate them. They have the full weight of the executive branch behind them, and they're bearing down on Mark.
Mark was successful at every one of those landings and space missions because he prepared for them, and because he had a huge team behind him. This is no different, so we are humbly asking you:
[**Please, make a donation to Mark so he knows we're ready for whatever Hegseth and Trump throw at him. It'll add up fast if tons of people do their part and chip in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=liftoff-pac-em-25/.wDfCNk&refcode=em251212-1-lp&t=1&akid=6291%2E6688874%2EOu-bbS)

body:
| Hi there, Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows here. _Mother Jones_ just published a major story on the Trump administration’s attempt to build a national voter purge machine – and Maine is at the center of the story. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121162119/588562073/114605485?refcode=em-12.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGU4YTA5ZC05ZmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5vIy9QAJ6rpjiYA9-oQpMXC2EuMSzNudD6MlcS5VGo=)
**Your Private Data Is Building Trump’s Voter Purge Machine**
_“The election deniers are now ascendant in the federal government,”**says Bellows,** who spent eight years as the executive director of the Maine ACLU before assuming her current post._
---
Here’s what’s happening:
The Trump Justice Department is trying to force states to turn over sensitive, personal voter data that would be used to build a centralized national database of every voter in America. That includes Social Security numbers, license data, party affiliation, and more.
**Make no mistake: this is an orchestrated effort to undermine our democracy, intimidate election officials, and silence voters.**
This isn’t about election integrity. It’s about building the infrastructure for mass voter purges, fueled by junk data, conspiracy theories, and political retaliation.
Your privacy, your rights, and your freedom to vote are not bargaining chips. They are the bedrock of our democracy – and that’s exactly why I refused to comply with this request.
But here’s the reality: standing up to these attacks takes a movement – people like you, raising your voices and showing that Maine will never back down.
[**That’s why I’m asking: before midnight tonight, will you contribute $20 between my campaign and DASS? If you believe in protecting free and fair elections from political interference, now is the time to donate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121162120/588562074/114605485?refcode=em-12.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGU4YTA5ZC05ZmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5vIy9QAJ6rpjiYA9-oQpMXC2EuMSzNudD6MlcS5VGo=)

If they’re not hiding anything... why are they panicking?
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121162641/588563784/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTdiMzJkZi1hMWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t1lhaUed6BOrIR1s8aNHg2iWVEh8z8M-cB0iims4SLo=)

My team and I spent six days combing through over 20,000 documents, and the emails we uncovered raised serious, serious questions about Donald Trump’s relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.
So what happened?
_We released the emails. Republicans erupted. Trumpworld panicked. _
And suddenly — magically — they decided they did want to release the files they fought for years to bury.
**Here’s why: They only move when we force them to.**

So let's give them more of it.

This isn’t about partisanship. It’s about transparency and refusing to let powerful men hide behind power structures ever again.

_You know what I say? When the people in charge refuse to tell the truth, it’s our job to force it out of them._

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121162804/588564326/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBhMzZiMS1hMmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ti0JIsG2rVHPO52itycZ1Qhit-nRj0juNCFNJSJiZck=&emci=fc89fe4a-a0d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=df0a36b1-a2d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121162805/588564327/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBhMzZiMS1hMmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ti0JIsG2rVHPO52itycZ1Qhit-nRj0juNCFNJSJiZck=) ****
_Indiana Senate Rejects Gerrymandered Maps_ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121162806/588564328/1030726503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBhMzZiMS1hMmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ti0JIsG2rVHPO52itycZ1Qhit-nRj0juNCFNJSJiZck=&emci=fc89fe4a-a0d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=df0a36b1-a2d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) On Thursday, the people won. The full State Senate rejected Donald Trump’s call for new maps by a 31-19 margin. This is the culmination of months of hard work from Hoosiers all across Indiana who called and wrote to their legislators to reject this map and put Hoosier interests above those of Washington D.C. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Indiana Senate Rejects Gerrymandered Maps On Thursday, the people won. The full State Senate rejected Donald Trump’s call for new maps by a 31-19 margin. This is the culmination of months of hard work from Hoosiers all across Indiana who called and wrote to their legislators to reject this map and put Hoosier interests above those of Washington D.C. Hoosiers, this win is because of all of you. Your advocacy is powerful, and when we all stand together, we send a powerful message. Mike Braun Can’t Do Math, Or Doesn’t Know How Many State Senators There Are Governor Mike Braun took a loss during yesterday’s redistricting vote, and he is not giving up his focus on this partisan sideshow and power grab. Despite the failure of redistricting by a 31-19 margin, Governor Braun claimed that a “small group” of misguided state senators voted to reject the maps. However, it was not a small group. 21 of 40 Republican State Senators voted against the maps. Braun’s comment has been ridiculed on social media over the last 24 hours, including with a community note added that the proposal was not rejected by just a “small group”. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, instead of a regular piece of legislation, we are highlighting the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee’s addition of Indiana to its 2026 Target Map. Democrats did well in elections all across the country in 2025, including in state legislative special elections. The DLCC is planning on expanding Democratic seats in Indiana Together, we are bringing Hoosiers to the table to end the Republican supermajority in the State House. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 8th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

It has been the privilege of my life to serve this community – as a Councilmember, Mayor of the City of Glendale, representative in the State Assembly, and now your member of Congress.
I’ve always been a fighter for our progressive values. I’ve championed bold policies to create more affordable housing, protect our reproductive freedoms, protect local jobs, and make California a model for environmental sustainability and clean renewable energy.
Even when ‘they’ said it was impossible to cut outdated regulations, protect our environment, and make housing more affordable, I proved them wrong -- and I’m excited to keep delivering for you in Congress.
Unfortunately, delivering means less time doing my least favorite thing – fundraising. I don’t believe money alone should dictate whether or not I stay in office, but ever since _Citizens United_ left the door open to unfettered money, I cannot completely ignore it.
That’s why I need to ask today:
