I’ve always been a fighter for our progressive values. I’ve championed bold policies to create more affordable housing, protect our reproductive freedoms, protect local jobs, and make California a model for environmental sustainability and clean renewable energy. Even when ‘they’ said it was impossible to cut outdated regulations, protect our environment, and make housing more affordable, I proved them wrong -- and I’m excited to keep delivering for you in Congress. Unfortunately, delivering means less time doing my least favorite thing – fundraising. I don’t believe money alone should dictate whether or not I stay in office, but ever since Citizens United left the door open to unfettered money, I cannot completely ignore it. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12931559?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

This week marked **the final committee week** , bringing an important phase of our work in Tallahassee to a close. I am looking forward to being back in the district and spending time with family during the holiday season. As we head into the new year, **I am excited to begin Session** and continue fighting in Tallahassee for the priorities and values of the constituents I am proud to represent.

**My fellow legislators and I remain focused on putting Florida first!** Our state continues to lead in so many areas, and it is important that we continue promoting legislation that protects freedom, encourages fiscal responsibility, and upholds our conservative values. **I look forward to sharing more updates as we make progress in the weeks ahead.**

As always, please do not hesitate to [contact my office](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ee65ff6c03&e=d1c1b9864f) if there is something we can do for you. My team and I would be more than happy to help you in any way we can.
---
| | _**Committee Meetings**_
---
|
---
| **I have the honor of serving on several important committees for the upcoming 2026 Legislative Session.** Committee week six is now complete, and these meetings continue to shape the policies and priorities we will carry into the new year.
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=718786e39f&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Human Services Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=60d1254e65&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=3ce0ec5eaa&e=d1c1b9864f)

---
| | _**Events & Receptions Attended in Tallahassee**_
---
|
---
| **I had the opportunity to attend several events and receptions in Tallahassee,** including the **Florida Coalition kick-off reception** , the **Floridian Partners Holiday Party** , and an **ALEC reception**. These gatherings provided valuable opportunities to connect with fellow leaders, discuss key issues, and continue building relationships ahead of the upcoming legislative session.
---
| | _**Meetings in Tallahassee**_
---
|
---
| Had a productive meeting with the **Suncoast League of Cities** to discuss property tax relief and how we can better support families, homeowners, and local communities.

Grateful for their insight as we work together on responsible solutions that ease the burden on taxpayers while ensuring our cities have the resources they need to thrive. **Looking forward to continued collaboration on meaningful, results-driven relief for Floridians.**
---
|
---
|
---
| I spent time this week with **180 Consulting** to discuss my **[HB 529: Community-Based Care Lead Agency and Subcontractor Liability.](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=bcd7f8e343&e=d1c1b9864f)**

**We had an important conversation about how this legislation impacts accountability, child welfare providers, and the families they serve.** Ensuring that our community-based care system is both effective and responsibly structured is essential to delivering the protection and stability Florida’s children deserve.

I appreciate their expertise and engagement as we continue working toward policies that strengthen our child welfare network and support the dedicated organizations doing this critical work.
---
|
---
| Met with **local law enforcement** to discuss **[HB 299](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=19f3da9048&e=d1c1b9864f)** , a bill that would establish a framework for “blue ribbon projects,” a new type of planned community designed to balance environmental protection with future development needs. I appreciated hearing feedback on how this proposal could impact public safety, law enforcement operations, and land use across our state.
---
|
---
|
---
| I had a productive meeting with the **Florida Association of Rehabilitation Facilities** to discuss the essential services they provide to individuals and families across our state.

We talked through their **legislative priorities** , the **challenges their members** are facing on the ground, and the **opportunities we have to strengthen support for rehabilitation providers** so they can continue delivering high-quality care.
---
| | | _**Events Attended in the District by Staff**_
---
|
---
| Attended**Grace Christian School’s** church service with students and had the opportunity to hear several songs they will be performing at their upcoming Christmas program. It was so exciting to see these 1st-4th graders worshiping our savior together and signing their little hearts out.
---
|
---
|
---
| Members of my staff attended the **Ocala/Marion County Tourism Annual Meeting** to hear updates on local tourism efforts and community initiatives.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Members of my staff attended the **Home for the Holidays adoption finalization event** at the Marion County Judicial Center, where families celebrated the official completion of adoptions in a festive holiday setting. This annual event highlights the importance of permanency and provides children with the opportunity to begin the holiday season in loving, forever homes.
---
|
---
| Looking forward to closing out the final committee week next week as we prepare for the 2026 legislative session, which begins on January 13. Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the Florida House! I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=b2f2281216) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=b2f2281216).

---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Happy Hanukkah, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
As Larry and I prepare to light the first candles of our menorah this weekend to mark the beginning of Hanukkah, I can't help but think about what has motivated and guided me my whole life: the Jewish principle of _tikkun olam._
It means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than the way we found it. Those values are what first led me to want to give back to my community and my country by running for office. That’s how I ended up becoming the only former synagogue president and just the third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate.
Today, _tikkun olam_ is guiding me to fight back against Donald Trump’s reckless agenda that is harming the American people and leaving our country in a far worse place than before he ever stepped into the White House.
**I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on my team in this fight. And as we celebrate the Festival of Lights, I hope I can count on you to help us light the way toward making more progress for American families.**
**[Will you please make a generous gift of $5 or more now? Every dollar will help make it possible for Democrats to take back our Senate majority so we can stop Trump’s agenda and go back to making positive change for communities in Nevada and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121163119/588565424/284602619?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5651-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmVlNGE4Mi1hNGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Acbn-qRx0DiwR64u-bv0BwqrbW4D90RYFJyoZgArp2w=)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, As Larry and I prepare to light the first candles of our menorah this weekend to mark the beginning of Hanukkah, I can't help but think about what has motivated and guided me my whole life: the Jewish principle of tikkun olam. It means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than the way we found it. Those values are what first led me to want to give back to my community and my country by running for office. That’s how I ended up becoming the only former synagogue president and just the third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. Today, tikkun olam is guiding me to fight back against Donald Trump’s reckless agenda that is harming the American people and leaving our country in a far worse place than before he ever stepped into the White House. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you on my team in this fight. And as we celebrate the Festival of Lights, I hope I can count on you to help us light the way toward making more progress for American families. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, friend. Hanukkah Sameach! Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: Personal note from Marsha Blackburn
body:
I don’t know what I would do without you!

| | | | Exclusive message from Marsha Blackburn for TOP supporters ONLY:Hi, Peter,
It’s Marsha Blackburn, and I personally wanted to reach out to you today to say THANK YOU. As I sit down to write this email, I'm filled with gratitude. I am thinking about all the fantastic supporters like you who've stood by me every step of the way.
You have always been such an incredible supporter of me and my cause, and you deserve recognition. From the bottom of my heart, I am truly grateful for you and wanted to make sure you knew.
Your unwavering commitment to our shared values and your trust in me to fight for them in Washington are what fuel my passion and drive me to keep pushing forward.
I think back on all the battles we've fought together - from taking on the liberal elites who want to erode our Constitutional rights, to standing strong against the radical Left's attempts to undermine our values and our way of life. Through it all, you've been a rock, a true champion of our cause, and I'm honored to have you by my side.
As we look to the future, I know that the road ahead won't be easy. The forces of liberalism and socialism will stop at nothing to undermine our progress and push their radical agenda. [But I know that with supporters like you, we can overcome any obstacle and achieve great things.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
That's why I'm counting on you to continue standing with me in this fight. Your support is crucial to our success, and I'm asking you to pitch in today to help us keep pushing forward.
Every dollar counts! Your support will help us take on the tough battles ahead and emerge victorious.
\- Marsha Blackburn | [ Chip in NOW >>> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-58UHUqDEog)
---
[ SUPPORT MARSHA BLACKBURN ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-qRSRMZfP4fkEqmfEZkV6Q)
---

| |
---

Here’s the deal, Peter: I was one of only six Democrats to flip a Republican held seat in 2024, and we won by an extremely narrow margin. Now, Republicans are hell-bent on flipping this seat red again — and they’ve already launched attack ads against me for standing up to Trump and his disastrous agenda!

**We’re going to need strong grassroots support to fight back against their attacks and ensure we have the resources we need to keep OR-05 blue and help Democrats take back the House majority in 2026.**

[**So will you step up today and join this grassroots team by supporting my re-election campaign and EMILYs List? This is one of the most important House races in the country, so we’d really appreciate your support, Peter.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121164001/588568273/1206721245?refcode=WUEFHL23_20251212_BynumSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057469&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWE0Y2VlOC1hNWQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7YCllhABE8kASbsHKcSPeshn7BwaPMPlBlP9AlkS_s=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Janelle Bynum here — I’m reaching out to personally ask for your help: = | = Here’s the deal, Peter: I was one of only six Democrats to flip a Republican held seat in 2024, and we won by an extremely narrow margin. Now, Republicans are hell-bent on flipping this seat red again — and they’ve already launched attack ads against me for standing up to Trump and his disastrous agenda! We’re going to need strong grassroots support to fight back against their attacks and ensure we have the resources we need to keep OR-05 blue and help Democrats take back the House majority in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Janelle = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
This will take less than a minute, and I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121164103/588568525/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDVmMjA3Yy1hNmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QuU-I2B1riuBs4hqrKmoUIYE8_CLDdrUvLrKk1uMa4=)
---
| Peter,

This will take less than a minute, and I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday.

I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important.

At the end of this month, our campaign faces the final FEC filing deadline of the year. This is the moment the numbers go public and everyone will see if Democrats have what it takes to win next year.

As Chair of BOLD PAC – the campaign arm dedicated to electing more Latino Democrats to Congress – I know exactly what’s at stake. Republicans have 5 times more cash on hand than Democrats, and they’re ready to spend every penny attacking our communities and pushing their extremist agenda.

[_**If we don’t close the gap, we risk falling behind before the fight even begins. Will you chip in just $10 today so we can show Republicans we’re ready to compete?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121164104/588568526/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-12-14_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDVmMjA3Yy1hNmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QuU-I2B1riuBs4hqrKmoUIYE8_CLDdrUvLrKk1uMa4=)

subject: Breaking down the Slaughter case

body:
If you think this stops at the FTC, you’re not paying attention. | |

Peter, **BREAKING: The Supreme Court looks like it’s poised to hand Trump the power to fire independent agency heads, just because they’re not on Team MAGA.** The Court heard arguments this week in _Trump v. Slaughter_ , centered around Trump’s firing of independent FTC commissioner Rebecca Slaughter. And the MAGA justices indicated that they may well give Trump the green light to steal power and control away from the FTC. **But if you think this power grab stops at the FTC, you’re not paying attention.** Because if presidents can just purge anyone who disagrees, what happens to consumer protections? Labor rights? Financial regulation? Fair elections? [**This case isn’t just about government procedure or legal theory—it’s about more power for Trump, and less power for the people. We broke down everything you need to know in our newest video. Can you watch, like, comment, and share the video right now to spread the During oral arguments, Justice Kagan warned this would give the president massive unchecked power. Justice Sotomayor said it could “destroy the structure of government.” **They’re right.**
Agencies like the FTC are supposed to be independent. Their purpose is to serve the public, not the president.
**But Trump doesn’t care—hee wants full power over every agency of government. And the MAGA justices are poised to hand it to him.**
This isn’t reform. It’s a coup in slow motion.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2a7901e644a143bd89601256d5d6684b&_e=9_qUIx0I3GdWk9XTaj8JN_WOy2F3PO-TBjCijWvjPLatXfpUEWzQ7YxSaCvM9Br7iQ8Kij-dYzs_fn0q4bsmFupqhMc13Hz2PG-aW8uZ1UzmjjRxjrs52t8HCa7j2sG-rj_F0GV804Ov6yEMsbyRD76mcGkCpkeE3wCepM-_trYP5SOQ_GL8Vb9AYcDRiYrRwCGb6DojDxXogOxhPTh3XJtB95uWjdQwNaj76SfgdCKl5ftrF2ZfZUcF3NscKO5YLEdBhHDSB-4zpb7rutYnKKB0wAg1WWZwmvONdQYwhweK8_nleyMUPF5dsR_yT4kc9Ebg2Jmmx9ECC3D7rcM9qfBSQdMdBr9aCLCzKBtSbM1zG6Hyh1RJxjEuBDIXMu0OZKdKNdn0T4Wvy7g5kRJF4rs__JX0OyTm0bUX7XWhVxoDsAAgryCKwQP_fi9QE4kYJCUa4lUknA1rZrjFv4W9SJ2ma1s2JidVHPW5KYkIklyHIGebeiPMhMCnWQYqEMVaRF2MWh33HkZNKw28rXsV-Ntvni3AjzaUeBDMoG3aQCz_96iCi26wtcZk39UPu8Qga5bN3evq2uV3ElAjJjiLUWoizG1WKNvgJJKcMdjRC-adByRi7ZKBTImAt3l7_TXi-HscLETQijTVBQ18u3RHBhcgY7JSmoHIAz39gElrvXQvWo-sE3Pt4tarfyQguKM0WltaioIwgyzFPmkovtDlXACaVCO7r-p8V76GVUGM8k1FWClKvtR2_Z-s_1EJjWvKJJ426DEuVKyprEiXycYh6S5NWuyJlzrlT8f2V3qFBxHgQA1DWhxA-DdZNLfQcXXPPV1LT4GXIprhpydr6W9V6nZ2kJFIJzHNWdfEchp_yjc5hqyu5Qv06z_QTeHjhDZ1Bu9Sp-eNX_-orq1Uu6QiVLQsa0xX0LYW5Hlw0uVb6vs%3D)Politics today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks.
**But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. **

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't “just money.” It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That’s why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. grateful,Vivek Ramaswamy the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse.**| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: Nida Allam
subject: I won’t let their legacy die
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
How I approach public service
#
Hi Peter,
My name is Nida Allam, and I’m running for Congress in my home district of NC-04, to topple a crypto and AIPAC-funded incumbent and fight for our values.
I never planned to run for office, and in fact, never clocked public service as something that could be for me.
Then, I was devastated by tragedy as a college student.
When I was 21 years old, a hate crime left me personally shattered. Three of my best friends, Deah, Yusor, and Razan, were brutally murdered in their home for being Muslim, a faith that I share.
They had dedicated their lives to serving communities at home and beyond. I was broken, but their parents, with incredible strength and love, asked us not to let their legacy die—to continue to remember the three of them and cherish them in our work.
I have let that promise guide every single chapter of my life since then, and it’s why I’m jumping into this race now. **[If you’re with me and you’re ready to create a brighter future and push for the progress we deserve, then I need you. I’m going up against a corporate and dark money-funded incumbent, and we need a people-powered grassroots movement if we’re going to win. Peter, split a contribution right now between my campaign and Justice Democrats.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251212-na.x86qgY&refcode=em20251212-37271&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37271%2E1203867%2EjHSaO4)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251212-na.x86qgY&refcode=em20251212-37271&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=21&akid=37271%2E1203867%2EjHSaO4)**
At this moment, it has never been more critical that we stand for something—not just against someone.
I have spent my entire life and career in public service fighting for what matters: **Medicare for All** and affordable healthcare for everyone, a **Green New Deal** that creates jobs while protecting our planet, **affordable housing** to keep our friends and neighbors from being priced out of their homes, and **a future where ICE and CBP aren’t rewarded for kidnapping our neighbors.**
**[The first 24 hours after a campaign launch is the most important, because it’s when folks will be determining if we have a path to victory. Can you chip in a split contribution between my campaign and Justice Democrats right now to help us make a big splash on week 1?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251212-na.x86qgY&refcode=em20251212-37271&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=22&akid=37271%2E1203867%2EjHSaO4)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251212-na.x86qgY&refcode=em20251212-37271&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=23&akid=37271%2E1203867%2EjHSaO4)**
With love,
Nida

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251212-37271-footer&t=24&refcode2=37271_1203867_jHSaO4&akid=37271%2E1203867%2EjHSaO4)**

name: Tina Kotek
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

As Oregon’s Governor, I stand up for our values every single day. When President Trump tried to send the National Guard into Portland, I pushed back against his unlawful use of the military and kept troops off our streets.

I’m running for re-election because our work is far from finished, and the stakes are really high right now. Can you chip in any amount to help my fight to defend our shared values? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?]

I fight to keep our state a place where everyone, regardless of their background, has a fair shot at success and can contribute authentically to their community.

I defend Oregon values by protecting abortion access and provider safety, supporting vote-by-mail, and leading the West Coast Health Alliance with other governors to safeguard public health.

But our hopes for Oregon are under threat. We are seeing the Trump administration attempt to dismantle the very foundations of our community and our democracy.

I have, and always will, protect Oregon from these threats.

From my start as an advocate at Oregon Food Bank to fighting to make sure every child has health care and a roof over their heads, I am driven by the North Star of building a stronger Oregon for all of us.

As Governor, I'm pushing back against rising costs and am laser-focused on what matters:

* Tackling the homelessness crisis by declaring a State of Emergency, opening 1,700 new shelter beds, and keeping 24,000 households housed.
* Easing financial burdens on families by making prescription medication more affordable and protecting families from rising utility costs.
* Fighting back against President Trump's damaging agenda including his tariffs and cuts to Medicaid and food assistance programs.

I’m committed to bringing Oregonians together, beyond partisan lines, to create lasting change.

Whether it's investing in summer learning to better help our kids or expanding access to addiction treatment, every step forward is a win for Oregon.

Together, we can keep Oregon a beacon of hope and progress for a country in turmoil. There’s more work to do, and I’m ready to lead us into a brighter future, protecting our values and our people from the challenges we face.

If you’re with me, please pitch in to support my re-election campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=25]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-launch]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]

body:
Virginia families are weighing in - your voice is needed.
| | |

| Peter, Before Christmas begins, we need to hear directly from Virginia conservatives about something serious: _**Are Virginia families truly safe this holiday season – especially under Mark Warner 's failed leadership?**_ _Christmas is supposed to be a time of peace, comfort, and community._ But with rising crime, fentanyl flooding our neighborhoods, and Mark Warner blocking key measures needed to secure our state, many Virginians are feeling the opposite. That's why we're launching an official _**Christmas Safety and Security Poll**_ – to understand how families across the Commonwealth are feeling today. And because of Bryce Reeves' unique background – _**U.S. Army Ranger, narcotics detective, small business owner, and proven conservative leader**_ – your input helps guide the mission ahead.
---
| | [TAKE THE POLL](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fchristmas-safety-and-security-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251209_Reeves_Safety%2526SecurityPoll%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019b14ba5440-6a3c2c08-d998-4929-a95b-2493df6da6c1-000000/ozD50Y2aalpLCBvwAU9EdiBJ3gk=456)
---
| This poll will measure:
* Whether Virginians feel safer or less safe this Christmas
* Who they trust to protect their communities in 2026
* Whether voters want stronger conservative leadership to support President Trump's security agenda

_Mark Warner has spent decades in Washington making our communities_ _**LESS SAFE.**_ ** _Bryce Reeves spent decades on the front lines making them_**** _SAFER._** Your voice matters – especially now, as Christmas arrives and families gather across Virginia. [** _Please take a moment to answer the Christmas Safety & Security Poll: >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fchristmas-safety-and-security-poll%3Futm_campaign=20251209_Reeves_Safety%2526SecurityPoll%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/3/0100019b14ba5440-6a3c2c08-d998-4929-a95b-2493df6da6c1-000000/MnFK1h6VZQJnHdezmV_dJS8lTFM=456)

clean_body: Virginia families are weighing in - your voice is needed. | | | | | | | | Peter, Before Christmas begins, we need to hear directly from Virginia conservatives about something serious: Are Virginia families truly safe this holiday season – especially under Mark Warner 's failed leadership? Christmas is supposed to be a time of peace, comfort, and community. But with rising crime, fentanyl flooding our neighborhoods, and Mark Warner blocking key measures needed to secure our state, many Virginians are feeling the opposite. That's why we're launching an official Christmas Safety and Security Poll – to understand how families across the Commonwealth are feeling today. And because of Bryce Reeves' unique background – U.S. Army Ranger, narcotics detective, small business owner, and proven conservative leader – your input helps guide the mission ahead. | | | This poll will measure: Whether Virginians feel safer or less safe this Christmas Who they trust to protect their communities in 2026 Whether voters want stronger conservative leadership to support President Trump's security agenda Mark Warner has spent decades in Washington making our communities LESS SAFE. Bryce Reeves spent decades on the front lines making them** SAFER. Your voice matters – especially now, as Christmas arrives and families gather across Virginia. | | | Thank you for weighing in and for standing with a fighter who puts Virginia families first. Team Reeves Polling HQ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | or

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Before your weekend starts
body:
I need your help today.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
Hi Peter, I wanted to catch you before the end of the day. I know this is an especially busy time of year for a lot of us, and I hate to interrupt your holiday preparations — but in a race this competitive and consequential, there can be few days off. **Even as we celebrate the holiday season, our election is heating up.** The national Republican Party has made a clear calculation about this U.S. Senate seat: They know that it’s key to holding their majority and maintaining one-party control in Washington, so they will spend _any_ amount of money trying to defeat us. **Peter, it’s already started.** Far-right PACs and dirty money groups aligned with the GOP are already spending hundreds of thousands against me. Experts think that by the end of all this, it could even be the first U.S. Senate race with a total cost of more than $1 billion. In the short term, our opponent and his allies are going to be on the lookout for our financial filing report due at the end of this month to determine where and when to pour in even more cash. That’s why this is our most important fundraising deadline yet, Peter. The strength we are able to show on our end-of-quarter filing report, and whether or not we reach our one million dollar goal, will have a real impact on what we face in the coming months. **We need to have the strongest possible start to this election year, so we need to hit this goal and keep pace with our opponent’s big-money machine.** **[Are you with me? I’m personally asking you to pitch in by Monday to help us hit the halfway mark to our goal, halfway through the month.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2620?t=7&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2620?t=8&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
---
Grateful for any help you can give,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2620?t=9&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=155%2E124072%2EoOmevD)

He’s telling the courts he has the right to put the military in our streets because of an “ongoing rebellion.” California is a state of hardworking immigrants. I won’t allow him to harm, hurt, or touch a single Californian under my watch.** Because I know, after dealing with this guy for the last 10 years, you have to stay on offense. Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. I want to take a minute to explain why this is such an important month for our campaign. Once the end of this month rolls around, we’ll have to submit a report to the Federal Elections Commission detailing our grassroots support and how much we’ve raised during this fundraising quarter. It’s important for a lot of reasons, but most of all, it shows the momentum our campaign has as we head into 2026 — which matters more than ever now that we have a primary challenger. **This campaign means a lot to me. It’s about growing our economy, lowering healthcare costs, supporting public education, and bringing real accountability to Washington.** My record speaks for itself, and I have been proud to stand up for our shared progressive values in Congress by advancing legislation like the ICE Badge Visibility Act, the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act, Medicare for All, and the Block the Bombs Act. But Peter, taking back the House majority next year is the only way we’re going to get our country back on course. With just three seats separating control of the House, Republicans are doing whatever it takes to cling onto the majority. That’s why we have to show, loud and clear, that we’re not backing down. I’d love nothing more than for our report to reflect the support of thousands of grassroots supporters just like you who believe in this campaign and the future we’re fighting for. **[I’m never going to come to you with fake deadlines or constant alarms — but we do have a real goal to meet, and your support truly makes the biggest impact. So please, if you can, pitch in today to help us take back the House and get our country back on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121165318/588572809/-1566497354?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_121225_MM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk1YTc0Yi1hZGQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIoD4fUMDTu5NAMaWARYJBnFAVtuI5okHQIFYQgqLgI=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Valerie’s ready to keep fighting for our schools, families, and communities. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. I want to take a minute to explain why this is such an important month for our campaign. Once the end of this month rolls around, we’ll have to submit a report to the Federal Elections Commission detailing our grassroots support and how much we’ve raised during this fundraising quarter. It’s important for a lot of reasons, but most of all, it shows the momentum our campaign has as we head into 2026 — which matters more than ever now that we have a primary challenger. This campaign means a lot to me. It’s about growing our economy, lowering healthcare costs, supporting public education, and bringing real accountability to Washington. My record speaks for itself, and I have been proud to stand up for our shared progressive values in Congress by advancing legislation like the ICE Badge Visibility Act, the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act, Medicare for All, and the Block the Bombs Act. But Peter, taking back the House majority next year is the only way we’re going to get our country back on course. With just three seats separating control of the House, Republicans are doing whatever it takes to cling onto the majority. That’s why we have to show, loud and clear, that we’re not backing down. I’d love nothing more than for our report to reflect the support of thousands of grassroots supporters just like you who believe in this campaign and the future we’re fighting for. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for being part of this team. Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Amy Phan West
subject: The boat that changed everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Phan West for Congress 2026**
body:
**,**
Yesterday I told you about the [327 votes we need to flip CA-45](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Fr%2Fb65733b73fed8371a83b3d465%3Fct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjQ5O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1NjtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5M2M5ZDEyNjVmY2E0MzA2MzczOTMiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU2O319%26/1/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/TbBs5Lf-maX4Ps4No_r0EHRKkqc=456).
Today, I want to tell you how I got here.
Not to California. Not to Santa Ana, CA 92704.
To **AMERICA**.
It's 1985. Vietnam is under communist rule.
Half of my family has already been killed by the regime.
My father - a fisherman - sees what's coming. He knows if we stay, we'll never be free.
So he makes the hardest decision of his life.
He hides his wife and children in the bottom of his fishing boat.
We leave everything behind.
[Contribute Now](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Fr%2Fb65733b73fed8371a83b3d465%3Fct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjQ5O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1NjtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5M2M5ZDEyNjVmY2E0MzA2MzczOTMiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU2O319%26/2/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/W26COIXMd2hzhY7ZC-gIip7pW8g=456)
* * *
We're at sea for **3 days**.
The water runs out.
I don't remember much - I was five and a half years old - but I remember the fear.
My family has told me the stories.
The things we saw.
The things that happened on that boat.
I've seen horrific things I can't describe in an email. Women and children lost. People dying from starvation... and worse.
My grandfather was shot 16 times while laying on my father's lap.
Things too horrific to fully describe.
But we were the **LUCKY ones**.
A German oil tanker found us.
They gave us water. Food. Hope.
They brought us to Thailand.
For 30 months, we lived in refugee camps.
First Thailand. Then the Philippines.
Waiting. Hoping. Praying that America would take us.
And in 1987, after background checks and medical screenings and endless paperwork, the United States said **YES**.
We landed in Huntington Beach, California.
My parents had $20 in their pockets.
They spoke no English.
They had no family here.
But they had **FREEDOM**.
And they had **HOPE**.
* * *
, that's why I'm running for Congress.
My parents risked EVERYTHING for the American Dream.
They watched their own family members die.
They survived unspeakable horrors.
They did it all so their children could grow up FREE.
Now I see the same patterns in America.
Government overreach.
Socialist policies.
Suppression of dissent.
I've LIVED under communism.
I know what it looks like.
I know where it leads.
Derek Tran won by 653 votes.
And he's pushing policies that look dangerously familiar to someone who fled them.
CONTRIBUTE TODAY:
→ [**Chip in $30** \- Support refugee outreach in Little Saigon](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Fr%2Fb355cef6690f500c1c7c96680%3Fct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjQ5O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1NjtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5M2M5ZDEyNjVmY2E0MzA2MzczOTMiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU2O319%26/1/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/_bJXF267nLHpmE872uhCGllkqqc=456)
→ [**Contribute $85** \- Fund a week of grassroots organizing](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Fr%2Fba1149cba34776d14aedcdff2%3Fct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjQ5O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1NjtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5M2M5ZDEyNjVmY2E0MzA2MzczOTMiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU2O319%26/1/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/2RyLe4CPA8khRByxeV666enYsbk=456)
→ [**Donate $195** \- Become a Freedom Fighter (VIP)](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Fr%2Ffbb9f6304fdb12c272d867a94%3Fct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjQ5O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1NjtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5M2M5ZDEyNjVmY2E0MzA2MzczOTMiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU2O319%26/1/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/sKlE42OibfuukJIHSz_vqLArKQk=456)
I can't stay quiet.
I didn't choose this fight.
But when you've seen what I've seen, when you've lost what I've lost, you recognize the warning signs.
, I'm not a career politician.
I'm a refugee who knows what we're fighting to preserve.
[Help Me Fight Back](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Fr%2Fb65733b73fed8371a83b3d465%3Fct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjQ5O31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjE1NjtzOjQ6InN0YXQiO3M6MjI6IjY5M2M5ZDEyNjVmY2E0MzA2MzczOTMiO3M6NDoibGVhZCI7czo1OiI0MzU4MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTU2O319%26/3/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/krcKUsbD-X_YJeMNd6Q7NMsdjYI=456)
Thank you for being part of this fight.
More soon,
Amy Phan West
**Vietnamese Refugee | Mom | Fighter**
Republican Candidate for Congress, CA-45
**P.S.** \- My family paid the ultimate price for freedom. We left behind graves we can never visit. That's what freedom cost us. I won't let it be taken for granted here.
★ ★ ★
**Paid for by Amy Phan West for Congress 2026**
Amy Phan West for Congress
3843 S. Bristol St. #604
Santa Ana, CA 92704
[Unsubscribe](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Femail%2Funsubscribe%2F693c9d1265fca430637393%2Fdpwillis67@gmail.com%2F3ca0b935a3811a5ed0d426a862bb464cfdc253299743ed1106f44a5059ecd6c7/1/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/TUjx6hsSlzGz5T_dYoDTWIQbYCQ=456) | [View in Browser](https://8gh0l61y.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Feblastem.com%2Femail%2Fview%2F693c9d1265fca430637393/1/0100019b14c5914b-336e814a-eca3-4f9f-8993-22228ea1edbb-000000/tNhNQL7ElKB7oVRTw7BALygB6ZE=456)

name: Blue Dog Democrats

It was a frustrating week of the bureaucracy doing what it does best—slowing down everything. I heard through the grapevine that a Democrat Senate staffer was holding up my bill to defund the Taliban. I looked into it, and I busted them. I won’t back down. I had 900 BILLION reasons to vote against the National Defense Authorization Act. Money for Ukraine, money for Syria, and money for Iraq just to name a few. Three thousand pages. Four days. No way to know what all is in it. NUH UH. NO MORE.

clean_body: ...it’d be efficient and effective. | | | | | | | | Friend, Yesterday I celebrated a very politically incorrect Christmas with my annual 15-minute Carhartt Christmas Party. Pure efficiency. Congress could learn a thing or two. It was a frustrating week of the bureaucracy doing what it does best—slowing down everything. I heard through the grapevine that a Democrat Senate staffer was holding up my bill to defund the Taliban. I looked into it, and I busted them. I won’t back down. I had 900 BILLION reasons to vote against the National Defense Authorization Act. Money for Ukraine, money for Syria, and money for Iraq just to name a few. Three thousand pages. Four days. No way to know what all is in it. NUH UH. NO MORE. Last night, I had the honor of being invited to the White House to celebrate Christmas, and as I was walking out, the President’s Marine Corps Band was playing “Silent Night.” It officially feels like Christmas. Thank y’all for sending me here, Tim | | Join the conservative movement! Chip in to help us pave the way for a solid Republican agenda. | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|---

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory

clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBDszp9UoBWhPB_3HUc4je2CCg8AC8GddxAsyi5Wo9XE2fhgDPGEiWzooLGJCmyNNsCJpSnK3Y7RlXplHOS34U3YvRcDHaZQRWOK7H2g953NyNa_AgZIURDf9S2Ta4KAZxw/4md/p-wXSMYKSFWbUPUFti6eAQ/h0/h001.VfmeCLIn87EEmfoL6SkeFPZx-ISpH7ycWWM-_LTSMNI)

She did it again, Peter.

Marie Gluesenkamp Perez just joined 22 other Democrats to PROTECT DONALD TRUMP from impeachment. This wasn't some BS headline seeking filing. This was to force discussion on considering having the Senate hold a trial to hold Trump accountable for calling for the death penalty applied to 6 sitting members of Congress for informing our military it is their duty to not follow illegal orders. Marie loves to talk about "compromise." Her entire political identity is built on being "bipartisan and 'an independent voice.'" **But that 's just code for co-signing MAGA.** Don't take my word for it. Take THEIRS. A Republican think tank recently rated Marie as the MOST Trump-aligned Democrat in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9ajF-pQa8W6ufQJt8PtZRQvYHG_3q6LlBmlI_K7koUD5CYoe5MRiS2sWwKzybqIyxIqcV9ocsWrVDzx-rjDKayj9K2I7PqoHFwFS-r0VyHS2onC547GDMnw5d7VP7xLk7Q3pidov26LjYBA46RbzruslTw_eim8WHALneqy1XGo097j0d0KXwlVTrp6oC66JbcCAJRP96tlGoaTKxWdPT-B1ikh4sWAJ-pt3kzIQDAIoCZ4XGhWj5RhAaZKK2uiCdtMUMjQq1kFD3H_wxJtc30XXw_fRTftni_hGC9RYf4w/4md/p-wXSMYKSFWbUPUFti6eAQ/h1/h001.VMcrLUvyLe08ODe2G1aU5pbCOhBY5OHOFKDMrBD20po)

**That's not compromise. That's surrender.** Real compromise means working in good faith to get things done while holding firm to your core values. I'm always willing to **compromise to move legislation forward**. I'll negotiate. I'll find common ground. I'll work with anyone who's serious about helping working families. But**I will not compromise my values**. And neither should your representative. Marie has sold out the people of Washington's 3rd District over and over again. She **voted to empower ICE** to become a rogue paramilitary force that's now maiming people in Vancouver. She voted for legislation **restricting healthcare access**. She **caves to corporate special interests** instead of fighting for the working families she claims to represent. **When your representative is bankrolled by corporate interests, don't be surprised when she votes like it.**
---
[ **CHIP IN TO BUILD A PEOPLE-POWERED CAMPAIGN** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9ajF-pQa8W6ufQJt8PtZRQvYHG_3q6LlBmlI_K7koUPBkliWeODbZ70YwUPf3RKWi0xILZ8zYwILt3sj--uuwVSzsd72JW-WKCbtyunj64_jigtvdnrNe9V2HUhozj70SpS2bgt0VcULdIi-Vk95V_4oJ-8HZ76MwLcYPnb45vnqDGTtQYf7SuoaZR8B9v1K3yeX_lPeAirp87M0ZBoou6xHj4IxgA1ME0qNj1Kvc56jG_TGPseIZPqz_1loTLIdRfc1xM8dj5nh8eln-KpETX4s5PoiV55JRXgKR-i2Q6w/4md/p-wXSMYKSFWbUPUFti6eAQ/h2/h001.hcee-b1Pv5YvRdJ6GDglPfdIZwKaPMOalMIKtYZhaxw)
---
We're building something different here. Our campaign is rooted in community -- not funded by special interests like AIPAC or corporate PACs looking to buy influence. When I get to Congress, I'll compromise on tactics. I'll negotiate on timelines. **I'll work across the aisle** when it means actually delivering results for Southwest Washington. **But I will NOT compromise on:**
* Defending our neighbors from ICE brutality
* Protecting reproductive freedom
* Fighting for working families over corporate profits

Marie's version of "compromise" means giving Republicans what they want while claiming it's bipartisanship. That's not leadership. That's giving up to get on, dressed up in focus-group language. **Southwest Washington deserves a representative who knows the difference.** [**Can you chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now to help us replace fake compromise with real representation for the people of WA-03?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9ajF-pQa8W6ufQJt8PtZRQvYHG_3q6LlBmlI_K7koUBd2ayCp_vMNLS1-G8ciW139E8_m-pU6YFxQhLntqLnF40RKtmAD3hMNUN2211JeuE6xjFevHRrlasO0icfq8E5eSLF0oHROb8bsBjyiImrg0slE-YElsoUssnED7Q_r4HYrSd_FEZjsO0erHpULmUrDPCpuuvyctwqevwbEGOiCavP86rHN-Xy41G81acTUN-sF5IFx4DAGPm82v9s4DKmbKDfKI_SZrdV_y1l6K4EXocLkRY5DlN01rVkcyNRzGg/4md/p-wXSMYKSFWbUPUFti6eAQ/h3/h001.7r2ml5amyc_qHhSooPeCgUkB3J1XxABJykARf0gbyPk) We're building a movement that puts people over PACs, values over political calculation, and community over corporations. **If you're ready for a representative who will actually fight for you -- not just fold to make Republicans happy -- join us**. We must VOTE BLUE, BUT IT MATTERS WHO! Let's Heal Washington, Brent Hennrich

Real compromise means working in good faith to get things done while holding firm to your core values. I'm always willing to compromise to move legislation forward. I'll negotiate. I'll find common ground. I'll work with anyone who's serious about helping working families. ButI will not compromise my values. And neither should your representative. Marie has sold out the people of Washington's 3rd District over and over again. She voted to empower ICE to become a rogue paramilitary force that's now maiming people in Vancouver. She voted for legislation restricting healthcare access. She caves to corporate special interests instead of fighting for the working families she claims to represent. When your representative is bankrolled by corporate interests, don't be surprised when she votes like it. We're building something different here. Our campaign is rooted in community -- not funded by special interests like AIPAC or corporate PACs looking to buy influence. When I get to Congress, I'll compromise on tactics. I'll negotiate on timelines. I'll work across the aisle when it means actually delivering results for Southwest Washington. But I will NOT compromise on: Defending our neighbors from ICE brutality Protecting reproductive freedom Fighting for working families over corporate profits Marie's version of "compromise" means giving Republicans what they want while claiming it's bipartisanship. That's not leadership. That's giving up to get on, dressed up in focus-group language. Southwest Washington deserves a representative who knows the difference. We're building a movement that puts people over PACs, values over political calculation, and community over corporations. If you're ready for a representative who will actually fight for you -- not just fold to make Republicans happy -- join us. We must VOTE BLUE, BUT IT MATTERS WHO! Let's Heal Washington, Brent Hennrich | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a proud Washingtonian, a working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Brent Hennrich for Washington (WA-03), please .

name: Team AOC
subject: When we log into ActBlue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
When we log into our ActBlue account, this is one of the first numbers we see:
**$18.47 is our average online contribution for the year so far.** Alexandria and our whole team is so proud of that number because this campaign is powered by everyday people and by workers.
Thousands of $18 donations have allowed us to:
* Distribute over 1,700 turkeys to families in The Bronx and Queens last month,
* Provide more than 3,000 backpacks to kids in New York City as they headed back to school,
* Pay our organizers and staff a living wage,
* Keep Alexandria on the road this year, bringing a message to fight the oligarchy to red, blue, and purple districts across the country.

So what do you say? [If you can, will you chip in any amount today that is meaningful to you to power our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251212.KIHftF&refcode=em20251212-10389-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10389%2E2526796%2Evz9Xt9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251212.KIHftF&refcode=em20251212-10389-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10389%2E2526796%2Evz9Xt9)**
Whether you can donate today or not, thank you so much for being a part of this campaign.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251212?refcode=em20251212-10389-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10389_2526796_vz9Xt9&akid=10389%2E2526796%2Evz9Xt9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251212-10389-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10389%2E2526796%2Evz9Xt9)**

---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

# Elon Musk fires back at Newsom's attack of his son
Elon Musk put Governor Gavin Newsom in his place after insulting Musk's child in response to an America PAC policy video posted Thursday.
* **Video sparks anger:** Musk's PAC, America PAC, posted a video to X Thursday hihglighting Newsom's pro-transgender sycophancy, to which Newsom's official office account responded, "Correct. We're sorry your daughter hates you, Elon" referring to Musk's son who now goes by Vivian Jenna Wilson, proclaiming transgender womanhood in 2022.
* **Musk 's response:**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/541d9e2c-4336-433e-945e-b0893d4a09db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Musk 's aid:** Friday rapper Nikki Minaj even stepped in to support Musk, "Get on the nearest jet ski & let that beautiful hair blow in the wind," she said. "It will make you happier than this race that you will not win.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0b713cd-421d-4a4c-b0d5-c27a2c7a1762?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

* * *
# **Disney: White House never contacted company about Kimmel**
Disney Entertainment co-chair Dana Walden revealed Thursday the Trump administration made **[no contact with the company](https://substack.com/redirect/3adf2855-08e9-4c6a-9375-3804aaabcfe9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during its September suspension of "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" despite the president's public commentary on the situation.
* **No direct pressure confirmed:** Walden told Bloomberg's "The Circuit" that nobody from the White House reached out during the multi-day suspension following Kimmel's on-air suggestion that Charlie Kirk's alleged assassin was a Trump supporter.
* **Internal decision rationale:** The executive explained Disney paused the show to "take the temperature down" during an "extremely heated" situation and have conversations with Kimmel to "protect our employees" and consider their audience, rejecting liberal claims that FCC Chair Brendan Carr pressured ABC.
* **Trump weighed in publicly:** The president told reporters Kimmel "was fired because he had bad ratings more than anything else, and he said a horrible thing about a great gentleman known as Charlie Kirk," adding "They should have fired him a long time ago..."

Walden dismissed reports of massive Disney+ and Hulu cancellation surges as "highly exaggerated," touting a strong quarter for the company.

# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/a6fe7c1b-addd-4336-af66-61cd0e45e32d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a6fe7c1b-addd-4336-af66-61cd0e45e32d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

* * *
# **Melania Trump 's makeup artist says beauty industry canceled her**
The First Lady's longtime makeup artist Nicole Bryl revealed Wednesday she faced an **[industry-wide shun](https://substack.com/redirect/6f17673c-7939-4338-b6b4-b986b6569f48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for her relationship with the Trump family, despite working with them for decades.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1e954464-ed8d-467c-b064-ef99047bfc24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Complete freeze-out:** Bryl told Ahmad Ashrafi's "Return on Identity" podcast that former business associates stopped answering calls, ceased sending product samples, and refused meetings after she continued working with Melania Trump, explaining "beauty didn't become beauty anymore, it became political."
* **Ultimatums issued:** Multiple potential clients demanded Bryl scrub Trump references from her Instagram, cease discussing the relationship publicly, and "denounce that this is your client" as conditions for doing business, presenting her with a choice between financial stability and loyalty.
* **Refusal to capitulate:** Despite economic pressure and widespread rejection, Bryl cited her hatred of bullies and admiration for Melania's character as reasons for standing firm: "I love my client...She's one of the most amazing people I've ever known or worked with..."

Bryl acknowledged her initial naivete about why the beauty industry turned against her but said the experience ultimately created strength through adversity.

Complete freeze-out: Bryl told Ahmad Ashrafi's "Return on Identity" podcast that former business associates stopped answering calls, ceased sending product samples, and refused meetings after she continued working with Melania Trump, explaining "beauty didn't become beauty anymore, it became political." Ultimatums issued: Multiple potential clients demanded Bryl scrub Trump references from her Instagram, cease discussing the relationship publicly, and "denounce that this is your client" as conditions for doing business, presenting her with a choice between financial stability and loyalty. Refusal to capitulate: Despite economic pressure and widespread rejection, Bryl cited her hatred of bullies and admiration for Melania's character as reasons for standing firm: "I love my client...She's one of the most amazing people I've ever known or worked with..." Bryl acknowledged her initial naivete about why the beauty industry turned against her but said the experience ultimately created strength through adversity. | | | | ---|---|--- | Dec 10 | * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=%2BdRuI%2FFI31V1sHlVDHnAilD00FQH2TiqDmukaU91MHrxT3BFQwSYzF9KMY6dOM5PcPLzRQj6qLP6AdVMa36kuYjryD%2BwAO9OrZPXRZpZVeH1ArqCQ3v%2BBOT8nbZZuntfkddPW15SmdUVE5XnVNYxZKCV%2FKz0pXKsny2LTKBJ5eO0hEBiFHH8mJ9ql8vLQpq6y3h8PspPnjhEI9wfPimnW48QzbT9spDYMW0IYGl%2B%2BAMSXpzh%2BvRSLfQSJoK1nGpKjxebtvtql2vhRAsqOm%2Bz326diKi5nJ7bGjysnVzpkTaD1ceepP2HsiivmJfU3blwRJNXyVE3LB4mECfLo0awK1LvNtUzigjbgAhFC8RxXjjtxytOu1e1MNTJrY4UKtsS43VFAF3YClwlK%2FncZPZmZ353XlYHgPshc1lq7g9DeqAQzxIkKxX5JsmrIYq9FU9q)

This week, Republicans once again failed to extend the ACA tax credits. If they continue to vote down the extensions, healthcare costs are about to explode at the start of 2026.
* First, Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Law gutted Medicaid causing millions of Americans to lose their healthcare.
* Then, this pushed hospitals across the nation into bankruptcy, worsening our healthcare shortage.
* Now, with Republicans set on expiring the ACA tax credits, the cost of healthcare coverage is set to rise astronomically at the beginning of 2026.

Some families in our district are already being impacted and have called into Dr. Ruiz’s office to report the higher costs they’ve been seeing. Some are even seeing their monthly premiums increase by _thousands._ **These are not just facts and statistics — these are _real_ patients, _real_ people, and _real lives on the line._** As one of the few physicians in Congress, Dr. Ruiz understands the stakes of skyrocketing healthcare costs and he’s working overtime to restore these critical tax credits. But Republicans are targeting this seat for 2026, trying to replace him with someone who'll rubber-stamp their healthcare cuts. [He needs your help to fight back and stay in Congress. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

subject: The MyPillow guy is OFFICIALLY challenging Tim

body:
Far-right Mike Lindell announced his campaign for governor.
Team,
**MAGA extremist and MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell just officially launched his campaign for governor of Minnesota.**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=partner_ms_tw_em_20251212_poweredbypeople.ll3JRS&refcode=ema20251212-240534&t=2&akid=240534%2E444211%2EVQuUD1)
Lindell has made a name for himself kissing up to Donald Trump and pushing far-right conspiracy theories, especially around the 2020 presidential election results — not to mention selling subpar pillows. He’s a snake oil salesman caught up in multiple legal fights who wants to bring Trump extremism to Minnesota.
As crazy as Lindell seems, he could become the Republican nominee and win — _especially with the backing of Trump and his billionaire donor network._
**We need to fight back NOW. That’s why we’ve launched an emergency 48-hour goal to raise $50,000 from grassroots supporters like you.**
[**Can you split a donation between our campaign and Powered by People to ensure we reach our goal and defeat Mike Lindell?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=partner_ms_tw_em_20251212_poweredbypeople.ll3JRS&refcode=ema20251212-240534&t=3&akid=240534%2E444211%2EVQuUD1)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4606242e-5c69-40a4-916e-d4b4e31b9ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
David Shuster's **Weekly Wrapup** is back--and this one pulls absolutely no punches.
If you're trying to make sense of a political week that somehow managed to be both deeply alarming and darkly absurd, this video is required viewing. David does what he's always done best: cut through the noise, ground the chaos in facts, and connect dots that far too many outlets either miss or deliberately ignore.
This week's wrap begins with a political shocker out of **Indiana** , where a Republican-led state senate delivered a stunning rebuke to Trump's redistricting ambitions. Despite public denials from GOP leadership, David walks through the documented pressure campaign--from Trump himself to J.D. Vance--and explains why this failed vote matters far beyond one red state. It's not just a setback; it's a crack in the armor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4606242e-5c69-40a4-916e-d4b4e31b9ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
From there, David zooms out to the **Hispanic vote** , where warning signs are flashing red for Trump and Fox News alike. Miami's dramatic political flip--nearly three decades in the making--signals deeper trouble for Republican math heading into 2026. David explains why redistricting strategies built on minority support are collapsing in real time, and why even conservative polling is now confirming it.
* * *
Subscribe for more of David Shuster's Weekly Wrapup.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.xp19MyzwbLLUYEWCNpIGjvESZ_9ZkAR17k8b_FZXVtY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=181469826)
* * *
Then comes the truly surreal. As deportation policies spark widespread backlash and legal challenges, DHS Secretary Kristi Noem finds herself facing public protests so extreme they border on performance art--including literal exorcisms. David breaks down the law being violated, the congressional testimony that exposes it, and why this moment reveals a broader collapse of accountability inside the administration.
And yes--there's Trump himself. Falling asleep at public meetings. Lashing out at reporters. Floating bizarre technology fantasies that sound less like policy and more like late-night fever dreams. David doesn't sensationalize it. He documents it--and lets the pattern speak for itself.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4606242e-5c69-40a4-916e-d4b4e31b9ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The episode closes with one of the most pointed **AI Clips of the Week** yet: satire sharp enough to sting, and smart enough to land.
David ends where he always does--reminding us to keep laughing, keep paying attention, and keep standing up.
Because informed citizens are still the last line of defense.
* * *

---|---|---
