name: Tom Fitton
subject: Epstein Files Update!
body:
[INSIDE JW]

HUNTER BIDEN LAPTOP UPDATE!

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36654&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tLnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9elNMRGRHV19YS2smdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d805c0ba46e21547879ac3bc580be3ea56f62a553d3eaa195c7b24cc3402b515]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN’S INFAMOUS
LAPTOP

The Hunter Biden saga drags on as the government clings to details
about his laptop.

In our latest effort to pry this information loose, we filed a Freedom
of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36647&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1sYXB0b3AtY29tcGxhaW50LTA0MjQwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=492e2c83e7080068452e7d637a1abb0959e0f6d59c9afc3c8cbd22f437ea1631]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI investigative
records concerning Hunter Biden’s abandoned laptop, which contained
extensive evidence of Biden family business dealings (Judicial Watch
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36647&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1sYXB0b3AtY29tcGxhaW50LTA0MjQwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=492e2c83e7080068452e7d637a1abb0959e0f6d59c9afc3c8cbd22f437ea1631]
(No. 1:25-cv-04240)).

The Justice Department’s refusal to release these basic
investigative records raises serious questions about transparency and
potential interference in one of the most consequential political
stories in recent history. We will fight in court to get the public
the answers it is entitled to under the law.

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the FBI failed to respond to a January 29, 2025, FOIA request for:

All FBI investigative reports, witness interview summaries, memoranda,
and other records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden's
laptop.

All emails, text messages, Lync messages and other electronic
communications records related to the Hunter Biden laptop.

IRS whistleblowers confirmed that the FBI became aware of Hunter
Biden’s laptop as early as October 2019 and verified its
authenticity in November 2019. The FBI took possession of it in
December 2019
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36644&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tL2FydGljbGUvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24tdGltZWxpbmUtZ3VuLXRheC1jaGFyZ2VzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2a64ef79d854e37e5c8bddd62b9958bf0106a4c28de241fa52222ac145f0467a].

In October 2020, through information obtained from Hunter Biden’s
laptop, the New York Post began publishing reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=28754&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjAvMTAvMTQvZW1haWwtcmV2ZWFscy1ob3ctaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludHJvZHVjZWQtdWtyYWluaWFuLWJpei1tYW4tdG8tZGFkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9d97eafdff47932cce6d5dcd720f7cf141ab201b8c0ee69fdde50ad8feb96916]
about the Biden family’s business arrangements.

In an August 2022 letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36645&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucm9uam9obnNvbi5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3NlcnZpY2VzL2ZpbGVzLzdDRDQ0RTE2LUJGMEItNDk1RS04Qjg3LTkwMDQ2N0Y2OUU1MD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=54a66eb3b304a8331d419bd1e3b6bdc98a5d9a45edb759ca8a01027a7320cc09],
Senator
Ron Johnson (R-WI) highlighted whistleblower concerns about the
handling of the FBI’s investigation, noting that the Bureau appeared
to take no visible action for months despite possessing the verified
laptop well before the 2020 presidential election.

We have filed numerous FOIA lawsuits seeking transparency on the
Hunter Biden investigations and related matters.

In July 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=35655&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXBhcmRvbi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8df3c1c905ba935c1bb0ba287d93f0f75374b58ff8f73d4bd45be4b5433e900b]
the
Justice Department for all records from the Offices of Attorney
General, Deputy Attorney General, and Associate Attorney General
regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of Hunter Biden (Judicial
Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=35644&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1wYXJkb24tY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMTQzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a0f888458093e3d121a00021c8b6945e203221eaa169412a8ea994a21695d506]
(No. 1:25-cv-02143)).

A hearing was held in July 2025 in the FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=35613&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLWZhbWlseS1idXNpbmVzcy1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c0bbca80fb93ae579fa2d746a2c1bac3adb365f1d5f322588429200898d02fcd]
against the National Archives for Biden family records and
communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as
communications between the Bidens and several known business
associates (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=29587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmF0aW9uYWwtYXJjaGl2ZXMtYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=804670007417aaa30f3a612bee5601c40e5041b71fe0feb0d88fefe7d6eb8ad6]
(No. 1:23-cv-01432).

In February 2025, we filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=34557&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaXJzLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24taHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=32bbb25c3f516c55aacb25a6d7e726cb481d0cdedad1342b8ae45e5ca7ce9200]
against the Justice Department for records and communications
regarding the Internal Revenue Service’s investigation of Hunter
Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=34532&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMzODcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3b210bcec63d199413125ee3b073cd0c143c998e3b07907fa8c28f41c52eb42a]
(No.1:24-cv-03387)).

In June 2024, we received records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=34534&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW5mYW1vdXMtaHVudGVyLWxhcHRvcC1sZXR0ZXIvXeKAr2Zyb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d55849d948107d556da3f9dba23a64c4f51d3fd19c77034e6c7c6fa975aa72ce
the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former
acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission
to publish a letter

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BOSTON MAYOR FOR DETAILS OF MARIACHI BAND PRESS
CONFERENCE

At an August 19, 2025, press conference, Boston Mayor Michelle Wu
reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36650&F=T&&hash=941b86ce75635366a6d611024d15475ac6eb2703941673b41e35ee0d8e404180]
vowed to resist the Justice Department’s efforts to secure
cooperation from local governments with federal immigration
enforcement. The event opened with mariachi music performed for
attendees as Wu positioned Boston as a defiant “sanctuary”
jurisdiction in opposition to federal law.

To see what’s behind this event, we filed a Massachusetts Public
Records Law lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36649&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtYm9zdG9uLW1hcmlhY2hpLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzM5NS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8c819caa0919795ca8796a310bde77c961fc3ec5a16cbd6befd7ba7a6b901991]
against the City of Boston for details about the press conference
during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s
demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law (Judicial
Watch v. City of Boston
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36649&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtYm9zdG9uLW1hcmlhY2hpLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzM5NS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8c819caa0919795ca8796a310bde77c961fc3ec5a16cbd6befd7ba7a6b901991]
(No. 2584 cv 03395)).

We filed the lawsuit in the Suffolk County Superior Court after the Wu
administration failed to respond to our public records request for
emails of Mayor Wu and her immediate staff about Attorney General
Bondi’s demands that Boston modify its sanctuary-city policy and
cooperate with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, as well as
records related to the appearance of a mariachi band at the August 19,
2025, press conference.

U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) reported that in
September 2025 it and federal partners arrested
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36655&F=T&&hash=c5b621e24fa911f28ac73fc8bd4dbe6158e07d080fccb8b096c8e70866bc4541.]
more than 1,400 illegal aliens in Massachusetts – including
murderers, rapists, drug traffickers, child sex predators and members
of violent transnational criminal gangs. Acting ICE Director Todd M.
Lyons said, “Every illegal alien we arrested during the operation
was breaking U.S. immigration law, and hundreds were violent criminals
who should never have been allowed to roam freely in our
communities.”

Mayor Wu staged a racist political spectacle instead of cooperating
with federal law enforcement – even as dangerous criminal aliens are
at large in her city. Boston residents deserve to know why the
mayor’s office refuses transparency about this event and why city
hall is stonewalling lawful public records requests.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1ldmFuc3Rvbi1pbGxpbm9pcy1tYXlvci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=24fe523f52b659b69aff65fbc9bd77b57bcd88427d52dffe2f26786b64537081]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HILLARY CLINTON’S BROTHER,
TONY RODHAM

What’s currently in the public record about the schemes of Hillary
Clinton’s little brother Tony likely just scratches the surface.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36656&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRvbnktcm9kaGFtLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDIzNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c40abc053f246e3932cb1655b9115398681f1bd0a154bfa3afacb8ef8b7717a9]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for FBI records on Hillary
Clinton’s deceased brother, Tony Rodham (Judicial Watch v U.S.
Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36656&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRvbnktcm9kaGFtLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDIzNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c40abc053f246e3932cb1655b9115398681f1bd0a154bfa3afacb8ef8b7717a9]
(No.1:25-cv-04237)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia
after the Justice Department failed to respond adequately to a June
10, 2019, FOIA request for FBI records about Rodham. We are asking
for:

All records related to Anthony Dean Rodham, born in August 1954 in
Park Ridge, Illinois, who died on June 7, 2019, including but not
limited to: investigative reports; 302s; witness statements;
Confidential Human Source reporting (FD 1023 forms); meetings/contacts
(FD 209a forms); cables; letterhead memoranda; and communications sent
to and from FBI officials regarding Mr. Rodham.

In August 2019, the FBI acknowledged it had located over 13,000 pages
of records responsive to the request, as well as audio and video files
that are potentially responsive to the request. After years of delays,
in May 2025, the FBI again acknowledged possession of responsive
records and asked if there was still interest. We acknowledged our
continued interest in having the request processed without
modification of its scope. Having received no further response from
the FBI, we filed suit.

Clearly, the Justice Department has been sitting on a wealth of
information, and we intend to obtain it.

Rodham for decades
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36657&F=T&&hash=94671f772c14e21c86d42b91d4de27b14194279cae59e8eec8a3a649c72bd11d]
used his connections with the Clintons to further his failing career.
Rodham described himself as a “facilitator” and had a range of
opportunities, like addressing Chinese investor conferences and
joining an advisory board of a company seeking permission to mine for
gold in Haiti. Among other controversies, Rodham also pursued
contracts in post-earthquake Haiti, seeking a $22 million housing deal
while Bill Clinton co-chaired the recovery commission, a proposal that
collapsed.

While Hillary Clinton was secretary of State, former Virginia Governor
Terry McAuliffe and Rodham were beneficiaries of the EB-5
cash-for-visas program
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36658&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhlLWViLTUtc3dhbXAtY29udC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d9d13b6686051d2c398152d923052d7332c7341dbeb047205235aa9c05f08381],
in which they
raised at least $46 million
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=9905&F=T&&hash=034b42aab611261e09ace424e83feb380e142e3fbd24cfe7c5d34a684b0bdb6c]
from investors for their GreenTech Automotive electric-car company.
Greentech filed for bankruptcy
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36659&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9ncmVlbnRlY2gtYXV0b21vdGl2ZS1maWxlcy1mb3ItYmFua3J1cHRjeS0xNTE5Nzc1Nzk1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e397c0340624ebfd6a87aa69a9878e7e5ec0bfe88f5d860fedbfbaf6a62f1ea5]
in February 2018.

Through our FOIA investigations and lawsuits we have uncovered other
incidents involving Rodham.

In August 2017, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36660&F=T&&hash=f3e8875234e33fdc16d8ccd0a68d03b175c72bdc72c3b1c45cf1ca77ae6707be]
records from the State Department revealing repeated use of unsecured
communications for classified information and numerous examples of
Clinton Foundation donors receiving special favors from former
Secretary of State Hillary Clinton’s staff. The emails also reveal
instances of Rodham seeking to leverage his influence as Clinton’s
brother. In January 2010, Confidential Assistant Monica Hanley
forwarded to Abedin a request from Rodham, on three issues
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtaHVtYS1wcm9kdWN0aW9uLTE5LTAwNjg0LXBnLTQ1OS00NjAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4f2237c7a8ee05bef4663110e34424a2d96421a8982073e662a336aac53c8e87].
One involved help on a “green card renewal,” another involved a
visit by someone of which Abedin said they “wanted to regret,” and
a third involved a job for someone whose CV Rodham forwarded to State.

In July 2017, we received
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36662&F=T&&hash=d6308fee717cb32148bf943ef589e6d04e1492cbdce9507c0917d17ef5c76db9]
records from the State Department revealing incidents of Huma Abedin,
deputy chief of staff to former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton,
providing special State Department treatment to major donors to the
Clinton Foundation and political campaigns. The heavily redacted
documents from Abedin’s non-government account included an email
from Rodham to Abedin revealing that he acted as a go-between for a
Clinton Foundation donor, Richard Park. The records also revealed
Clinton Foundation executive Doug Band instructing Abedin to “show
love” to Clinton donor Andrew Liveris.

BILLIONS OF TAX DOLLARS SPENT IN FAILED EFFORT TO REBUILD
AFGHANISTAN

Afghanistan offers a clear lesson: You can’t smoothly impose Western
democracy on a quasi-feudal Third World country. Our Corruption
Chronicles blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36637&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFpbGVkLXBsYW4tdG8tcmVidWlsZC1hZmdoYW5pc3Rhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a94cba17cc002d42e51e2f79a31d37a46057879df2aac440bf6589389fad13b1]
on
the billions of your tax dollars that were haphazardly thrown at the
attempt to rebuild Afghanistan.

For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145
billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26
billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the
final report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36663&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2lnYXIubWlsL1BvcnRhbHMvMTQ3L0ZpbGVzL1JlcG9ydHMvc2lnYXItZmluYWwtcmVwb3J0LnBkZl1wdWJsaXNoZWQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8dfb27fc569ef67b933bec471a14370ad1f57a31c841e673def3c68a370e4351
by the Special Inspector General for Afghanistan Reconstruction
(SIGAR). The United States also left behind over $38 billion in
military equipment and military and civilian infrastructure, the audit
reveals, offering enraging details about the U.S. government’s
costly debacle to restore a terrorist nation that promptly returned to
Taliban rule the moment American troops left in 2021. Even after the
Biden administration’s disastrous military withdrawal, hundreds of
millions of dollars in humanitarian aid kept flowing into the coffers
of fake charities created by the Taliban
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=30603&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFsaWJhbi1jcmVhdGVzLWZha2Utbm9ucHJvZml0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0d2ab888ba02eb3bdf72ef1987bb599ab3c692de244c77036a3e5f2795649cd2].
The
terrorist group also received at least $239 million in development
assistance
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78275&L=36664&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFsaWJhbi1nZXRzLTIzOS1taWwvXWJlY2F1c2U/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f43f7639bb078fca29148263868f7399bfeee6af84f810441aeb1d82fe311158
the State
Department did not screen award recipients, failing to comply with its
own counterterrorism partner vetting requirements before disbursing
dozens of grants to local entities in the central Asian Islamic
nation.

“The Afghan government’s stunningly rapid collapse in August 2021
laid bare a fragility concealed by years of confident assertions of
progress,” the new SIGAR report states. “The gap between ambition
and reality was vast, with deteriorating conditions continually
stymying objectives that proved to be unrealistic.” Investigators
blame multiple factors for the U.S. failure to transform a war-torn,
underdeveloped country into a stable and prosperous democracy. “For
example, early and ongoing U.S. decisions to ally with corrupt,
human-rights-abusing powerbrokers bolstered the insurgency and
undermined the mission, including U.S. goals for bringing democracy
and good governance to Afghanistan,” the audit says, adding that
efforts to improve Afghanistan’s economic and social conditions also
failed to have a lasting impact and that despite nearly “$90 billion
in U.S. appropriations for security-sector assistance, Afghan security
forces ultimately collapsed quickly without a sustained U.S. military
presence.” The cost of the failed Afghanistan reconstruction plan
was “immense,” investigators found, and includes tens of thousands
of people— including more than 2,450 U.S. servicemembers—killed.
Many more were injured, among them more than 20,700 U.S.
servicemembers, the watchdog writes.

SIGAR, which was created in 2009 and will officially shut down at the
end of January 2026, has identified at least 1,327 instances of waste,
fraud, and abuse for a total of at least $26 billion from 2002 through
the middle of 2021. The cash started flowing shortly after President
George W. Bush launched military operations in Afghanistan following
the 9/11 attacks as part of the war on terror. Even after Afghanistan
fell back to Taliban rule in 2021, the U.S. remains its largest donor
disbursing over $3.83 billion in humanitarian and development
assistance, much of it managed by the famously corrupt United States
Agency for International Development (USAID), which was dismantled by
the Trump administration. Nevertheless, the money is still flowing to
Afghanistan, with disbursements of $120 million in the March 2025
quarter alone, according to the SIGAR report. Past failures have not
stopped Uncle Sam from cutting the checks. The report offers a
multitude of examples of the waste over the years, including $7.3
billion on an ineffective counternarcotics program that did little to
stem the production and exportation of illicit drugs; $4.7 billion on
a failed stabilization project to keep insurgents out of an area after
they had been expelled by security forces; $675 million on wasteful
business development programs aimed at reducing violence to enhance
stability and economic normalcy; $486 million for unused aircraft for
the Afghan Air Force; $335 million for a USAID constructed power plant
that was not utilized and $85 million for an unfinished—and never
used—hotel across from the U.S. Embassy in Kabul.

Most of the projects that seemed legitimate were also wasteful and
failed to accomplish their goal, the final in-depth probe confirms.
For instance, the U.S. allocated $90 billion to Afghanistan Security
yet the nation’s security forces collapsed quickly without sustained
U.S. Military presence. Investigators warn that the costly failure to
rebuild Afghanistan was predictable. “Unlike past reconstruction
efforts in places like post-World War II Europe or Japan where the
United States successfully rebuilt countries whose modern economies,
industry, and infrastructure had been degraded by war, Afghanistan was
a severely underdeveloped state,” SIGAR writes. “U.S. efforts
there were often trying to create capabilities, systems, and
institutions of a type and quality the country had never possessed.”

Until next week,

clean_body: [INSIDE JW] HUNTER BIDEN LAPTOP UPDATE! [] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN’S INFAMOUS LAPTOP The Hunter Biden saga drags on as the government clings to details about his laptop. In our latest effort to pry this information loose, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI investigative records concerning Hunter Biden’s abandoned laptop, which contained extensive evidence of Biden family business dealings (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-04240)). The Justice Department’s refusal to release these basic investigative records raises serious questions about transparency and potential interference in one of the most consequential political stories in recent history. We will fight in court to get the public the answers it is entitled to under the law. We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the FBI failed to respond to a January 29, 2025, FOIA request for: All FBI investigative reports, witness interview summaries, memoranda, and other records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden's laptop. All emails, text messages, Lync messages and other electronic communications records related to the Hunter Biden laptop. IRS whistleblowers confirmed that the FBI became aware of Hunter Biden’s laptop as early as October 2019 and verified its authenticity in November 2019. The FBI took possession of it in December 2019 []. In October 2020, through information obtained from Hunter Biden’s laptop, the New York Post began publishing reports [] about the Biden family’s business arrangements. In an August 2022 letter [], Senator Ron Johnson (R-WI) highlighted whistleblower concerns about the handling of the FBI’s investigation, noting that the Bureau appeared to take no visible action for months despite possessing the verified laptop well before the 2020 presidential election. We have filed numerous FOIA lawsuits seeking transparency on the Hunter Biden investigations and related matters. In July 2025, we sued [] the Justice Department for all records from the Offices of Attorney General, Deputy Attorney General, and Associate Attorney General regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:25-cv-02143)). A hearing was held in July 2025 in the FOIA lawsuit [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives [] (No. 1:23-cv-01432). In February 2025, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records and communications regarding the Internal Revenue Service’s investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:24-cv-03387)). In June 2024, we received records [ the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission to publish a letter [ former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review was approved in just six hours by the CIA (Judicial Watch v. Central Intelligence Agency [] (No. 1:23-cv-01844)). In January 2024, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as Big Tech censorship of the Hunter Biden laptop story (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-00079)). In October 2022, we sued the DOJ [] for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:22-cv-02821)). We filed a lawsuit against the U.S. State Department on April 20, 2022, for messages sent through the SMART [] (State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:22-cv-01066)). In December 2020, State Department records [] obtained through a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. Previously in this case, State Department records [] included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:20-cv-00229)). JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BOSTON MAYOR FOR DETAILS OF MARIACHI BAND PRESS CONFERENCE At an August 19, 2025, press conference, Boston Mayor Michelle Wu reportedly [] vowed to resist the Justice Department’s efforts to secure cooperation from local governments with federal immigration enforcement. The event opened with mariachi music performed for attendees as Wu positioned Boston as a defiant “sanctuary” jurisdiction in opposition to federal law. To see what’s behind this event, we filed a Massachusetts Public Records Law lawsuit [] against the City of Boston for details about the press conference during which Wu publicly defied U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi’s demands that Boston comply with federal immigration law (Judicial Watch v. City of Boston [] (No. 2584 cv 03395)). We filed the lawsuit in the Suffolk County Superior Court after the Wu administration failed to respond to our public records request for emails of Mayor Wu and her immediate staff about Attorney General Bondi’s demands that Boston modify its sanctuary-city policy and cooperate with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, as well as records related to the appearance of a mariachi band at the August 19, 2025, press conference. U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) reported that in September 2025 it and federal partners arrested [.] more than 1,400 illegal aliens in Massachusetts – including murderers, rapists, drug traffickers, child sex predators and members of violent transnational criminal gangs. Acting ICE Director Todd M. Lyons said, “Every illegal alien we arrested during the operation was breaking U.S. immigration law, and hundreds were violent criminals who should never have been allowed to roam freely in our communities.” Mayor Wu staged a racist political spectacle instead of cooperating with federal law enforcement – even as dangerous criminal aliens are at large in her city. Boston residents deserve to know why the mayor’s office refuses transparency about this event and why city hall is stonewalling lawful public records requests. In October 2025, we sued [] the Office of the Mayor of Evanston, IL, for records related to obstruction of federal immigration enforcement. In January 2025, we sued [] Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson’s office for records regarding his vow to resist the Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON HILLARY CLINTON’S BROTHER, TONY RODHAM What’s currently in the public record about the schemes of Hillary Clinton’s little brother Tony likely just scratches the surface. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for FBI records on Hillary Clinton’s deceased brother, Tony Rodham (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:25-cv-04237)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond adequately to a June 10, 2019, FOIA request for FBI records about Rodham. We are asking for: All records related to Anthony Dean Rodham, born in August 1954 in Park Ridge, Illinois, who died on June 7, 2019, including but not limited to: investigative reports; 302s; witness statements; Confidential Human Source reporting (FD 1023 forms); meetings/contacts (FD 209a forms); cables; letterhead memoranda; and communications sent to and from FBI officials regarding Mr. Rodham. In August 2019, the FBI acknowledged it had located over 13,000 pages of records responsive to the request, as well as audio and video files that are potentially responsive to the request. After years of delays, in May 2025, the FBI again acknowledged possession of responsive records and asked if there was still interest. We acknowledged our continued interest in having the request processed without modification of its scope. Having received no further response from the FBI, we filed suit. Clearly, the Justice Department has been sitting on a wealth of information, and we intend to obtain it. Rodham for decades [] used his connections with the Clintons to further his failing career. Rodham described himself as a “facilitator” and had a range of opportunities, like addressing Chinese investor conferences and joining an advisory board of a company seeking permission to mine for gold in Haiti. Among other controversies, Rodham also pursued contracts in post-earthquake Haiti, seeking a $22 million housing deal while Bill Clinton co-chaired the recovery commission, a proposal that collapsed. While Hillary Clinton was secretary of State, former Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe and Rodham were beneficiaries of the EB-5 cash-for-visas program [], in which they raised at least $46 million [] from investors for their GreenTech Automotive electric-car company. Greentech filed for bankruptcy [] in February 2018. Through our FOIA investigations and lawsuits we have uncovered other incidents involving Rodham. In August 2017, we uncovered [] records from the State Department revealing repeated use of unsecured communications for classified information and numerous examples of Clinton Foundation donors receiving special favors from former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton’s staff. The emails also reveal instances of Rodham seeking to leverage his influence as Clinton’s brother. In January 2010, Confidential Assistant Monica Hanley forwarded to Abedin a request from Rodham, on three issues []. One involved help on a “green card renewal,” another involved a visit by someone of which Abedin said they “wanted to regret,” and a third involved a job for someone whose CV Rodham forwarded to State. In July 2017, we received [] records from the State Department revealing incidents of Huma Abedin, deputy chief of staff to former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, providing special State Department treatment to major donors to the Clinton Foundation and political campaigns. The heavily redacted documents from Abedin’s non-government account included an email from Rodham to Abedin revealing that he acted as a go-between for a Clinton Foundation donor, Richard Park. The records also revealed Clinton Foundation executive Doug Band instructing Abedin to “show love” to Clinton donor Andrew Liveris. BILLIONS OF TAX DOLLARS SPENT IN FAILED EFFORT TO REBUILD AFGHANISTAN Afghanistan offers a clear lesson: You can’t smoothly impose Western democracy on a quasi-feudal Third World country. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] on the billions of your tax dollars that were haphazardly thrown at the attempt to rebuild Afghanistan. For nearly two decades the U.S. government spent a breathtaking $145 billion on a failed plan to rebuild Afghanistan and at least $26 billion of it was lost to waste, fraud and abuse, according to the final report [ by the Special Inspector General for Afghanistan Reconstruction (SIGAR). The United States also left behind over $38 billion in military equipment and military and civilian infrastructure, the audit reveals, offering enraging details about the U.S. government’s costly debacle to restore a terrorist nation that promptly returned to Taliban rule the moment American troops left in 2021. Even after the Biden administration’s disastrous military withdrawal, hundreds of millions of dollars in humanitarian aid kept flowing into the coffers of fake charities created by the Taliban []. The terrorist group also received at least $239 million in development assistance [ the State Department did not screen award recipients, failing to comply with its own counterterrorism partner vetting requirements before disbursing dozens of grants to local entities in the central Asian Islamic nation. “The Afghan government’s stunningly rapid collapse in August 2021 laid bare a fragility concealed by years of confident assertions of progress,” the new SIGAR report states. “The gap between ambition and reality was vast, with deteriorating conditions continually stymying objectives that proved to be unrealistic.” Investigators blame multiple factors for the U.S. failure to transform a war-torn, underdeveloped country into a stable and prosperous democracy. “For example, early and ongoing U.S. decisions to ally with corrupt, human-rights-abusing powerbrokers bolstered the insurgency and undermined the mission, including U.S. goals for bringing democracy and good governance to Afghanistan,” the audit says, adding that efforts to improve Afghanistan’s economic and social conditions also failed to have a lasting impact and that despite nearly “$90 billion in U.S. appropriations for security-sector assistance, Afghan security forces ultimately collapsed quickly without a sustained U.S. military presence.” The cost of the failed Afghanistan reconstruction plan was “immense,” investigators found, and includes tens of thousands of people— including more than 2,450 U.S. servicemembers—killed. Many more were injured, among them more than 20,700 U.S. servicemembers, the watchdog writes. Alabama U.S. Senator Katie Britt thinks it should come as no surprise that Birmingham is making headlines this week for its latest big-league corporate get.

It was announced yesterday that Fannie Mae, a federally chartered mortgage-finance giant, is relocating its San Francisco, California workforce to Birmingham, Alabama under the direction of Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte and President Donald Trump.

On Thursday, Britt (R-Montgomery) celebrated that move, saying it will result in high-quality jobs, including finance, servicing and accounting roles relocating to Alabama next year.

“I’m proud to celebrate this announcement today, which reflects the hard work and talents of Alabama’s skilled workforce and pro-jobs environment,” Senator Britt said.

“This move will not only boost economic growth in our state but will also contribute to meeting the housing needs of families across the country.”

DOTHAN, Ala. (WDHN) – Enterprise native, Sen. Katie Britt, made a stop in her hometown to speak to high school students at a speaking event, hosted by the Wiregrass Republican Youth Outreach Program.

The Wiregrass Republican Youth Outreach Program is a group influencing young adults to be involved or interested in politics.

The program invited Sen. Katie Britt to speak to high schoolers in the Wiregrass about life and career advice and her start and role in politics.

U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) told Fox News this week that Congress must confront the growing dangers children face online, warning that Big Tech continues to put “profits over protecting our children.”

Her comments came during an appearance on “America’s Newsroom,” where she reacted to Australia’s newly announced social media restrictions for minors. According to a press release from Britt’s office, the Alabama senator said the mounting evidence of harm has become impossible to ignore.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | Alabama U.S. Senator Katie Britt thinks it should come as no surprise that Birmingham is making headlines this week for its latest big-league corporate get. It was announced yesterday that Fannie Mae, a federally chartered mortgage-finance giant, is relocating its San Francisco, California workforce to Birmingham, Alabama under the direction of Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte and President Donald Trump. On Thursday, Britt (R-Montgomery) celebrated that move, saying it will result in high-quality jobs, including finance, servicing and accounting roles relocating to Alabama next year. “I’m proud to celebrate this announcement today, which reflects the hard work and talents of Alabama’s skilled workforce and pro-jobs environment,” Senator Britt said. “This move will not only boost economic growth in our state but will also contribute to meeting the housing needs of families across the country.” | | DOTHAN, Ala. (WDHN) – Enterprise native, Sen. Katie Britt, made a stop in her hometown to speak to high school students at a speaking event, hosted by the Wiregrass Republican Youth Outreach Program. The Wiregrass Republican Youth Outreach Program is a group influencing young adults to be involved or interested in politics. The program invited Sen. Katie Britt to speak to high schoolers in the Wiregrass about life and career advice and her start and role in politics. | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) told Fox News this week that Congress must confront the growing dangers children face online, warning that Big Tech continues to put “profits over protecting our children.” Her comments came during an appearance on “America’s Newsroom,” where she reacted to Australia’s newly announced social media restrictions for minors. According to a press release from Britt’s office, the Alabama senator said the mounting evidence of harm has become impossible to ignore. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. Will you stand with me? | | | Gulf of America Hat Celebrate conservative leadership and show your patriotism with this unique, high quality, Made-in-America hat. | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. By participating, you agree to the terms & privacy policy for auto dialed messages from Britt for Alabama to the phone number you provide. Msg&data rates may apply. name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121166552/588576899/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.12_Mark-Kelly-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTI1M2I1Yi1iMmQ3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCFKnncSWTcv5p7lA7fWUckfIqMAeMelDfue96eemTc=) Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.

Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.

I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.

But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.

So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.

I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.

We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.

I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: Too much is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
The Left wants this seat. We’re behind pace.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
Peter,

I’ll be direct.
We’re approaching our mid-month fundraising deadline, and right now we are not where we need to be.
Liberal Democrats are working overtime to take back the House, and they’ve made it clear that **competitive seats like NE-02 are central to their plan**.If they flip districts like ours, they flip the majority and everything that comes with it.
**More spending.**
**More government control.**
**Less accountability.**
This is what happens when the Left is in charge.
_**[If you’re able, please chip in now to help keep NE-02 red and stop a Democrat takeover of the House.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**_

Outside groups are already preparing to flood districts like ours with money, attack ads, and misinformation. If we don’t have the resources to fight back early, we risk letting them define this race on their terms.
I’m not willing to let that happen.
That’s why I’m asking you to step up **before this mid-month deadline** and help us stay on pace. Every dollar right now goes directly toward defending NE-02 and stopping liberal Democrats from seizing control of the House.
_**[Stand with me and contribute before the mid-month deadline.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**_
| | [DONATE NOW](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
This race will be close. There are no sidelines. And complacency is exactly what the Left is counting on.
Thank you for standing with me and fighting for Nebraska.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
**Brett Lindstrom**
Republican Candidate for NE-02
P.S. The Left is targeting seats like NE-02 to flip the House. Don’t give them an opening. _**[Donate before the mid-month deadline → DONATE NOW](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)******_

[SUPPORT BRETT](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)

clean_body: The Left wants this seat. We’re behind pace. | | | | Peter, I’ll be direct. We’re approaching our mid-month fundraising deadline, and right now we are not where we need to be. Liberal Democrats are working overtime to take back the House, and they’ve made it clear that competitive seats like NE-02 are central to their plan.If they flip districts like ours, they flip the majority and everything that comes with it. More spending. More government control. Less accountability. This is what happens when the Left is in charge. Outside groups are already preparing to flood districts like ours with money, attack ads, and misinformation. If we don’t have the resources to fight back early, we risk letting them define this race on their terms. I’m not willing to let that happen. That’s why I’m asking you to step up before this mid-month deadline and help us stay on pace. Every dollar right now goes directly toward defending NE-02 and stopping liberal Democrats from seizing control of the House. | | This race will be close. There are no sidelines. And complacency is exactly what the Left is counting on. Thank you for standing with me and fighting for Nebraska. Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for NE-02 P.S. The Left is targeting seats like NE-02 to flip the House. Don’t give them an opening. ** | | | Stay Connected with Team Lindstrom** | | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress.

name: VoteVets
subject: A look back, and a look ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’re leaving 2025 behind us, having won stunning victories across the country, from special elections of all kinds to the gubernatorial elections in New Jersey and Virginia. We’ve taken on and defeated Trump multiple times in court. We have helped make him the most unpopular president in American history.
#
Peter-
Think back to this January, just after Trump had taken office. An entire term was ahead of us, and the easiest days were behind us.
But month after month, we dug in. We built up. We fought back.
We’re leaving 2025 behind us, having won stunning victories across the country, from special elections of all kinds to the gubernatorial elections in New Jersey and Virginia. We’ve taken on and defeated Trump multiple times in court. We have helped make him the most unpopular president in American history.
None of that — none of it — was guaranteed. It took a ton of hard work, grit, determination, and support from you. So, thank you. Truly.
Now, look ahead. 2026 will be the most important midterm election in American history. That’s our best chance at stopping Trump and all of the damage he is doing. And it will be VoteVets candidates that win our majorities in both the House and Senate.
But, same as ever, we can’t possibly do it without you.
[**So, before this year’s final official FEC deadline, we are humbly requesting that you make a donation to VoteVets. $5, or anything you can afford. Please.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.3jrL2s&refcode=em251212-1-160&t=1&akid=34817%2E3013755%2ESrujXn)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Porch pirates are out of control, we’re fighting back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121166689/588577572/1049855509?source=EM_NBI_JG_20251212_PT_PackageTheft_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmMTQ5ZC1iM2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuZGbIf4l5ZiWbkDttyUyPUhyQQ01EimieGvixwnzlM=&emci=0eb5874c-abd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dbf149d-b3d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=37438246) Team,

More than 100 million packages were stolen from porches across America this year. With the holiday season here, that number’s only going to rise, unless we do something about it.

That’s why I introduced the bipartisan Porch Pirates Act, to increase penalties on repeat offenders and give law enforcement better tools to go after organized package theft rings.

This shouldn’t be a partisan issue. It’s about keeping our communities safe, protecting families, and putting an end to the chaos.

**[Will you add your name to support stronger penalties for porch pirates?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121166693/588577577/1049855509?source=EM_NBI_JG_20251212_PT_PackageTheft_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmMTQ5ZC1iM2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuZGbIf4l5ZiWbkDttyUyPUhyQQ01EimieGvixwnzlM=&emci=0eb5874c-abd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dbf149d-b3d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=37438246)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121166696/588577582/1049855509?source=EM_NBI_JG_20251212_PT_PackageTheft_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmMTQ5ZC1iM2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuZGbIf4l5ZiWbkDttyUyPUhyQQ01EimieGvixwnzlM=&emci=0eb5874c-abd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dbf149d-b3d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=37438246)
---
We’re hearing more and more from neighbors in Bergen, Passaic, and across New Jersey who’ve had packages stolen, _sometimes repeatedly_ , and they’re frustrated. I hear them loud and clear.

If someone swipes a holiday gift off your porch, they shouldn’t get a slap on the wrist. We need to treat package theft like the serious crime it is. I’m proud to be leading the charge. But I want to know I’ve got you with me.

**[Sign the petition now to support the Porch Pirates Act — and show you’re with us in the fight against package theft.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121166699/588577585/1049855509?source=EM_NBI_JG_20251212_PT_PackageTheft_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmMTQ5ZC1iM2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuZGbIf4l5ZiWbkDttyUyPUhyQQ01EimieGvixwnzlM=&emci=0eb5874c-abd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dbf149d-b3d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=37438246)**
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121166701/588577588/1049855509?source=EM_NBI_JG_20251212_PT_PackageTheft_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJmMTQ5ZC1iM2Q3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuZGbIf4l5ZiWbkDttyUyPUhyQQ01EimieGvixwnzlM=&emci=0eb5874c-abd7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3dbf149d-b3d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=37438246)

Thanks for speaking out,
Josh

With so much under threat, we’ve got to do everything we can to respond and fight back. |

✅ Travel to other swing states across the country to train and recruit the next generation of elected officials
✅ Spread our message and mobilize voters through advertising
✅ Hold Republicans accountable by calling out egregious attacks on what we stand for
When you chip in with a donation, you’re joining a team of thousands from all walks of life who understand what’s at stake with this election.

I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4b2334edd5de4130beabad45b9580afe&_e=XarrOGYOjwqC8LU5_DiiDe4K2nq_R1EPCXSyDmc5W8Q_39xk2AMS-JoZpi4ZTPBzBrEnZvhsmNyzJFCeGX2PBQrv_NyHcsQCxpc8-tsnX0qcf2pON7pw1UhfTDPQR-BEZUaAxF3SBXGbGwxGOaF8VaZ_Ky8ufRFCZRktSW1Y-mTe4jZLsUjSxKpKXaPOQoE2LKvQRxrghKxYhunjRMjYW04Os-Yi-pONW-zywuOSqX7xdOdtbqWYGOS0z8IS22r2gcY3dSBN3HvGEQTvGs2FDoybm-ihuXTFGq7rP59M9IENEiw3pHAAQqhkgvdRmeWMfAZJ1t4WGTARzJDoIdJi2v_2Puuqyd5Hok3klnOMtL-mmXwnVBVnd-KwmwoywmxZNcv6V0Ivz5zjQjl9XfEVN6DukCN5Y3ZRTq-a7IkBuALQXTtskEnfDyIdyIsb_ZQiqw9476Kh1OiPDvwYOs2cKDB_npQuhpTixdT8Depouue3SWtvFE2nA9mUS-RBwrNZQ1uGEKlj3IoOX6VvIj3_YiuAazN1h8EA3T18kRiCaKDFXd6vBBBbTG08BCbeG3XEonv3MUJqafrrstDmY-md6nLuKbrx-GKNL2SDOPkbUPoD7uE2a60uGbFKcPj4RXe75cbhc9d_Mfh_ILQ1SvqsQyG0o1pPf75zozLfmeirltFAdPOoHH8RCufJV1d1kDUahDb7dRI8--DZhPCl_Qjil1bLJ6ZSGVrwoZFAEbVor00DzULpMVtMb-0j2HXY_SHp)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Picture this: Your hard-earned tax dollars—meant to feed starving kids, house the homeless, and help autistic families in our backyard—stolen by the billions. Not by faceless crooks, but by a network of Somali fraudsters, Tim Walz welcomed with open arms, some wiring cash straight to al-Shabaab terrorists plotting against America.

It's not a movie. It's Minnesota under Tim Walz and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan. **And it's enraging.**

The New York Times dropped the bomb: "How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch." Over $1 billion vanished—more than our entire corrections budget—in brazen schemes: ghost kids "fed" in fake meal programs, phantom therapy sessions for non-existent patients, sham housing for the invisible homeless. 78 of 86 charged so far are tied to the Somali immigrant community Walz and Flanagan have shielded.

**Worse?** Whistleblowers—**over 400 brave DHS employees** —begged Walz to act years ago. Red flags everywhere. His response? _**Retaliation. Monitoring their emails. Threats to their jobs.**_ Discrediting their reports to avoid "racism" smears and keep those precious Somali votes flowing. One employee put it plain: "Walz is 100% responsible... We got the full weight of retaliation."

President Trump saw it coming.

But Walz? He gaslights on Meet the Press: "_**I take responsibility for putting people in jail.**_ "

Federal prosecutors did that, Tim. Not you.

**This is Democratic leadership:** Soft on crime, addicted to power. They audition for D.C. jobs while our state bleeds—kids go hungry, families lose homes, and terrorists get richer. **If it can happen here in the heartland, it'll devour America.**

I’m done watching from the sidelines. My name is Adam Schwarze - I’m a retired Navy SEAL, and I’m ready to serve the people of Minnesota and Americans around the nation in the United States Senate.

I'll haul Walz in for hearings, help identify every stolen cent, and slam the door on this madness.

Strong borders. Ironclad audits. Republican muscle in Washington to protect what's rightfully ours.

_**[But I need you. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today—help me put an end to Democrat fraud and incompetence.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4b2334edd5de4130beabad45b9580afe&_e=XarrOGYOjwqC8LU5_DiiDe4K2nq_R1EPCXSyDmc5W8Q_39xk2AMS-JoZpi4ZTPBzBrEnZvhsmNyzJFCeGX2PBQrv_NyHcsQCxpc8-tsnX0qcf2pON7pw1UhfTDPQR-BEZUaAxF3SBXGbGwxGOaF8VaZ_Ky8ufRFCZRktSW1Y-mTe4jZLsUjSxKpKXaPOQoE2LKvQRxrghKxYhunjRMjYW04Os-Yi-pONW-zywuOSqX7xdOdtbqWYGOS0z8IS22r2gcY3dSBN3HvGEQTvGs2FDnCY3kHwGOMixTWHeoqNR_EZVU6fw1k3SV0FF_82XrBwkpXUnpDhOvuzAaBz9CkAlSIMVlbYlTUGNjkmsW7564nkH_vDgSV2fD7vx7AzcgS7NDc8DGmIv4QBnOu9jWgWUsabc0q-HdjwfJ0mtAaIIqBeFvzQBd6wiCaLJxVIYzV9OyDK3IFGgT6jmx7n_pSGmUC54h-0rY8gjUF7SEIoY6oXUJ37KsvDHY415GBI3pGLOlxJWPoP1zvWaNCqjeKrzomJYPq_noHoKE0vHXZ9ZBurvqEfQafn_hG8ggfkkJxG11Nee2X-erS1hscw0XCWe9BDrNccFkDWwye2SxNVIbmUHRy1UGUqi9BttWUtqHN4Xq7WrqM5uCsrhZgnuMG6C8PlIxu_NFDLZtjNk-DCzHOPDzIoLhFVd9l8ha67L7IRd_Czs4ev4kN7N_d9vzi6lxJrxSK3JFQMAbfCYc04QWPVd_oRu2vO2OTq6aPunYz4) **_

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Peter, we’re asking for your thoughts
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251212-1712-foote&t=1001&akid=1712%2E342411%2EemAqfO ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

At the Squad Victory Fund, we know that the real power of our movement
comes from you — our grassroots supporters. Your ideas, your energy, and
your passion are what drive our work to defend progressive champions,
fight for working families, and build a democracy that works for all.

That’s why we’re asking you to [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-december/?source=em20251212-1712&t=1002&akid=1712%2E342411%2EemAqfO ]take our Priorities Survey. Your input
will directly shape the policies we fight for and the actions we take to
lift up the working class in our fight for justice.

Every response helps us understand what matters most to you. Your
priorities guide our decisions and help us focus our efforts where they’ll
have the biggest impact. This is how we make sure our movement stays
grounded in the values and needs of the people we represent.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-december/?source=em20251212-1712&t=1003&akid=1712%2E342411%2EemAqfO ]Please, if you can, take our Priorities Survey today. It only takes a
few minutes, but your voice will help guide the direction of our movement
for the months ahead.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-december/?source=em20251212-1712&t=1004&akid=1712%2E342411%2EemAqfO ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Together, we’re stronger. Together, we make change happen.

Squad Victory HQ

Trump and the GOP are doing everything they can to roll back progress —
but Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida aren’t backing down.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251212-movement.4evI1G&refcode=em20251212-1712&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1712%2E342411%2EemAqfO ]Can you chip in today to power the Squad’s fight?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1712%2E342411%2EemAqfO

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23729%2E4449941%2E4uQi6o) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23729%2E4449941%2E4uQi6o) [ **_We’ll cut to the chase. Mike Johnson’s House Majority is just INCHES away from DEFEAT!:**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71020?t=3&akid=23729%2E4449941%2E4uQi6o) | [ **ONE:** Democrats just made massive gains in a Special Election in DEEP RED Tennessee.

**TWO:** Marjorie Taylor Greene is retiring. _The tides are really turning against the GOP!!!_

**THREE:** 2026 is the best opportunity we’ve had in YEARS to flip control of the House.

[So, we're launching a MASSIVE fund to raise $25,000 to elect Democrats all over the country who will FLIP the House BRIGHT BLUE!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71020?t=5&akid=23729%2E4449941%2E4uQi6o)

[**We’re begging, can you rush $10 to SAVE the House Majority please? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71020?t=6&akid=23729%2E4449941%2E4uQi6o) | [RUSH $10 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71020?t=7&akid=23729%2E4449941%2E4uQi6o)

Listen, everything is on the line. We can’t afford to let the Republicans win again.

_Democracy. Abortion. Healthcare. Voting Rights._

Every single right we hold near and dear is on the chopping block if we can’t take back the House Majority...

**REMEMBER:** Trump controls all THREE BRANCHES of the government right now. If we don’t flip the House, there’s no telling what awful legislation his MAGA majority will pass next!
